name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zarc09dv20hhqfj4b7ta5frjeouek8eb1bm6ac0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt9805ltuth926poqcikaqu5bqi37cd5mhtc5loo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtvb7cknbmseff7gofolavfia80r1ujdfqaekao_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z244anpjvfq7djbot04hq5rqhutsnfohsmo345ug_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmmnd20bjuf1l33cifnlubmg7l1fb8b82to3ndd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpq024kp4qgai64p9cahhn9s4mbtnt24ajsnvt28_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za4sq496so0v2fcs6a0h7ve2kktbmfu859n2jvfg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9gnifbrq2g2kvbmccmjj18dqf6iklibolkoph00_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9r71qokjnosbols4t46vc36blh33pph2kgukk80_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---

---

---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg5jg8s2c2saot79qvsr0s4e1du4k1en182oe3oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp31cljm4p77c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdfmk5lbqe97tsrf5jrh1k4vsvtreg63rcd7ap0o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c9h2bs)_

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Congressman Gabe Evans
subject: Help me defend our flag.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
I’ve worn the flag on my shoulder in combat zones and as a Black Hawk pilot.

| | | Friend, I’ve worn the flag on my shoulder in combat zones and as a Black Hawk pilot. I’ve sworn to defend it here at home as a police lieutenant. And I’ve watched my family build a life beneath it – grateful to call this country home. **_This Flag Day, I’m defending everything Old Glory stands for. _** **I hope you’ll join me.**
---
[ **DEFEND OUR FLAG** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoonjkma606qo9njid3id3pkpmk6vfcbs4ph47a8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c5h2bs)
---
**_The radical Left wants to tear down everything our flag represents. They want to see our national symbols burned. _** I come from a family that immigrated here from Mexico, searching for a better life. I love this flag, and I’ve dedicated my life to serving it. In the U.S. Army, on the police force and in Congress. I won’t stand for the disrespect I’m seeing, and I hope you won’t either.
---
[ **DEFEND OUR FLAG** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0smepn03lnrmto36tcdjft6m0o5e3pshmo12uj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c5h2bs)
---
If you still believe in America, I’m asking you to stand with me – today. **_[Let’s show them that the American Flag still stands for something worth fighting for.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaip3a1qu9mpgf22pvle5fs86q09u81f951u6s40_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie1o76c5h2bs)_** – Gabe Evans

name: ICE Alerts
subject: Closing the curtains on Tom Homan
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alaskans For Nick Begich
body:
U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement has been shut down

| | | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmp6cbklbqgfpkdmttuohe4ap9tm0quk86tkkoi8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie9pr0clh2bs) [****](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zanispeoe6ij1cp7sju8k3dk5vdg01g2g2sejfc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie9pr0clh2bs)
---
|
---
Friend,

They’re closing the curtains on Tom Homan and ICE.

The U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement has been shut down.

As you read this. Democrats and Liberal activist judges are vowing to shut down President Donald Trump and Border Czar Tom Homan’s mass deportation plans for illegals.
The Woke Media Mob won’t stop lying about Tom Homan, smearing him and President Trump, turning the public against MAGA.

These traitors in robes have delivered a massive counterattack to ICE and Tom Homan’s deportation agenda, prioritizing illegals over Americans.

Illegals and Radical Leftists are committing acts of violence to deter Tom Homan that include doxing ICE agents and rioting in cities across America.
|
---
[STAND WITH ICE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs4l6bdg9gb5ubiu7shnn2vur5c9jbjb01hfb3eg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie9pr0clh2bs)
|
---
The Radical Left doesn’t give a damn about America becoming the next Venezuela.

To Woke Democrats, it’s all about taking down President Trump and Tom Homan no matter what it takes and they don’t care if Americans get murdered by violent illegals in the process.

President Trump, Tom Homan, and ICE agents are putting their lives on the line to Save America, but there is only so much they can do without you.

_**[Your response, right here, right now - will send a message loud and clear that MAGA Patriots stand with President Donald Trump and Border Czar Tom Homan.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zikd099l3jqmr6m5slceat9ggbae7hqniq1vhfno_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie9pr0clh2bs)**_

But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.

Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.

**[So before Democrats continue the aiding and abetting of more illegals, can we count on you to go on the record and say: I stand with President Trump and Tom Homan.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8qanj3t9kb6vud3es8i6bulp5btmj22ld7gllh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie9pr0clh2bs)**

Please. This is the single most important thing you can do today.

Don’t be silent at this most critical moment when so much is on the line.
|
---
[STAND WITH MAGA](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk2d2tebkpqi66c1v60kjp4q5d9nq8slpbjcuhe8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4s3ie9pr0clh2bs)

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 6.13.2025
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-qputkt-didthutlhu-s/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-r/) Jenna Banfield, Election Integrity Director for WisGOP, has been working hard to recruit poll workers and set a new record for Republican poll worker nominations. Coming up, WisGOP, along with the Milwaukee County GOP, is starting a new initiative to recruit bilingual poll workers. Dual language poll workers, especially in Milwaukee, are crucial to ensuring secure elections. We also need more poll workers across the state.Take advantage of the upcoming training in Milwaukee, become a poll worker, and help us reach our goal! [REGISTER HERE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-y/) **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-j/) **Become a Poll Worker!**
Every two years, the Republican Party of Wisconsin submits poll workers to municipalities across the state. These 2 year appointments will be critical to keeping the 2026 elections safe and secure. Learn more about being a poll worker by signing up for a training below! [BECOME A POLL WORKER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-t/)
# **In Case You Missed It**
[**WisDems are Platforming Scandal-Plagued Raphael Warnock at State Convention**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-i/)
The Wisconsin Democrats' decision to trot out Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock as their keynote speaker for the 2025 State Convention in Wisconsin Dells this weekend is a slap in the face to Wisconsin values. By showcasing a scandal-ridden, far-left senator who voted against protecting girls' sports, the WisDems prove they're more interested in woke grandstanding than standing up for Wisconsin families.[**WisDems Need a Trip Back to the Future**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-d/)
This weekend, as WisDems converge on Wisconsin Dells--think Hill Valley's Clock Tower Square, but with less hoverboard flair--they're revealing a flux capacitor-sized disconnect from Wisconsin voters. In 2024, Wisconsinites punched their ticket to the future by enshrining a constitutional amendment to prevent non-citizens from voting in state elections. Now, Democrats are trying to slam the brakes on the SAVE Act, a federal law designed to do the same exact thing--ensure only U.S. citizens vote. Let's hop in the DeLorean and explore this temporal anomaly.[**WisDems Continue Prioritizing Woke Ideas over Quality Education**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-h/)
The WisDems are doubling down on their woke ideologies at their state convention this weekend. Rather than tackling educational failures, WisDems proposed not one, but three resolutions linked to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) and Critical Race Theory (CRT), masquerading as 'accurate history' and 'academic freedom.' This move underscores their growing disconnect from Wisconsin families.[**ICYMI: Wisconsin Democrats are Pulling Candidates from the Loser Bracket**](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-k/)
Oh, Wisconsin Democrats, bless your hearts! In a move that screams "we're out of ideas," the Dems have scraped the bottom of their loser bracket to trot out Randy Bryce and Rebecca Cooke for the 2026 congressional races in the 1st and 3rd Districts. Apparently, Wisconsin Democrats think retrying the same old players is an actual strategy. Spoiler alert: it's not.
# **Worth the Read**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-u/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-o/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-b/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-a/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-f/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-z/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-v/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-qputkt-didthutlhu-e/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-qputkt-didthutlhu-g/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-qputkt-didthutlhu-w/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-qputkt-l-yd)
---|---|---
**PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE Republican Party of Wisconsin | 148 E. Johnson Street | Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-qputkt-931243C5-didthutlhu-yh) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-u-qputkt-didthutlhu-yk/)

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: “In politics, stupidity is not a handicap.” — Napoleon Bonaparte
body:
The day of the knuckleheads is upon us

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=ba8db59651)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “In politics, stupidity is not a handicap.”— Napoleon Bonaparte
“Never argue with a fool, onlookers may not be able to tell the difference.”— Mark Twain

---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| **BREAKING: “Red Flag Day” Declared—Clown Car Parades Flood Connecticut in National Protest of Reality**
**By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator**
**June 14** — formerly known as Flag Day, when Americans take a moment to salute the stars and stripes — has now been unofficially rebranded by the nation’s most dedicated unemployed performance artists as **“Red Flag Day”** , a celebration of public tantrums, handcrafted signs, and confusing chants that even their organizers don’t fully understand.
Across Connecticut, **34 separate interpretive protests** are planned, where a small but determined group of disenchanted interpretive dancers, grievance sommeliers, and TikTok philosophers will rally in passionate opposition to... well, anything that resembles functioning government, borders, or grown-up conversations.
These gatherings, lovingly referred to as **Court Jester Conventions** , are being held to express solidarity with career criminals, illegal border crossings, and anyone who’s ever tweeted “ACAB” while still calling 911 when their Starbucks mobile order gets skipped. The movement’s slogan? “No Jobs, No Peace.”
But fear not, **Normies of America**. There’s no need to argue with the fool circus. Remember what the great (and probably exasperated) Mark Twain said: _“Never argue with a fool, onlookers may not be able to tell the difference.”_ Which is why the best course of action is **not engagement** , but documentation.
Yes, citizen journalists: **grab your cameras, your phones, your emotional support telephoto lenses** — and peacefully observe. Snap a few photos of the pageantry. Think: if Burning Man and a Civics D-minus had a baby. Then send them to dominic@dominicforCT.us so we can lovingly **curate this gallery of democracy’s blooper reel**.
These images will be compiled into an official “Highlight Reel of Wokeness,” available to our **federal candidates and state party leaders** who prefer their political discourse with a side of reality and a dash of basic logic. Because while 19% of the country might think the justice system should only apply to people they don’t brunch with, **81% of Americans are done with the clown show**.
So on June 14, go out. Watch. Record. Don’t poke the performers. And remember: **we win by letting them speak for themselves — loudly, proudly, and incoherently.**
Happy Red Flag Day. God Bless America — and pass the popcorn.

---
|
---
|
# Send you BEST (ONE) Photo to dominic@dominicforct.us
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **A Fool Near You Can Be Found Nearbye**
**No Kings events in Connecticut include:**
* Bethel, 11 am - 12:30 pm, P T Barnum Square
* Bridgeport, noon - 2 pm, Ashccreek Bridge
* Brookfield, 11 am - noon, The "Welcome to Brookfield" Sign
* Canton, 9:30 - 10:30 am, Canton Town Green
* Cornwall, noon - 1 pm, The Green at Cornwall Bridge
* Dayville, 2 - 4 pm, At entrance to Killingly Plaza, off 101 and 395
* Durham, 10 am - noon, Address Private
* East Lyme, 4 - 6 pm, Niantic Green
* Enfield, noon - 4 pm, in front of Town Hall
* Glastonbury, 9:30am – 2pm, Glastonbury Town Hall
* Guilford, 11 am - noon, Town Green
* Haddam, noon - 2 pm, 374 Town St
* Hartford, 11am – 12:30 pm, Address Private
* Manchester, 3 – 5 pm, Center Memorial Park
* Middletown, noon - 1:30 pm, Address Private
* New Haven, 1 - 3 pm, New Haven Green
* New London, 10 am - noon, Courthouse
* New Milford, 10:30 am - 11:30 am, Town Green
* Newtown, 2 - 3 pm, 31 Main Street
* Norwich, 4 - 5 pm, Niantic Green, Franklin Square Roundabout
* Salisbury, 11 am - noon, Routes 41 and 44, on the lawn in front of The White Hart Inn
* Southbury, noon - 5 pm, 77 Main St N
* Stamford, noon - 1:30 pm, Judicial District Court
* Torrington, 1 pm - 2:30 pm, Coe Memorial Park
* Trumbull, 11 am - 1 pm, Address Private
* Warren, 9 am - 10:30 am, Warren Community Center
* Waterbury, 11 am - noon, Address Private
* Westport, 11 am - 12:30 pm, Ruth Steinkraus Cohen Bridge
* Windham, 3 - 4 pm, Main Street & Jackson Street
* Windsor, 4 - 6 pm, Windsor Town Green

---|---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| |
# 🌈Pride in Indianapolis🌈

I am proud to celebrate our city's rich LGBTQ+ community every day, but especially today at our annual Pride Parade.

We know today, while a celebration, is also a protest. Too frequently we have seen the LGBTQ+ community in our state, and our country, under attack.

I will always use my voice to stand up against injustice and to advocate for the rights of every Hoosier. Whether is is using the power of the microphone, listening or marching alongside you, **I am in your corner today and I will be in your corner tomorrow. **
**Going to the parade? Have fun, be safe and stay hydrated. **
## Parade Route Information:
---
|
---
| | [Click Here for More Information About the Indy Pride Parade](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=2d7bf48d6ddcf7cfe732db3f35f4a619ec0ba22cee39546448365ee5f49e77efb1c549dc6ba577334cf3850883c24c8fdd0cb9a561d34e54)
---
| | |
* * *
#
**59th Annual Strawberry Festival**
---
| |
---
As a proud member of Christ Church Cathedral putting on the festival with the Cathedral Women is always one of my favorite days of the entire year, and **this year was no different.**

As team leader of Tent 5, we helped serve over 12,000 pounds of strawberries. The proceeds of this event go directly to supporting nonprofits in our state that help support our communities.

Thank you to everyone who made this day possible, I am already counting down the days until next year!
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| | Thank you to all who spent their Saturday morning with the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus in Indianapolis as we kicked off our summer town hall series.

We work for **YOU** , and your questions, concerns and ideas help us best represent our shared communities at the Statehouse.

I'm grateful to my colleagues in the IBLC for their continued efforts to better Indiana and to Kountry Kitchen for hosting.
---
#
* * *
---
| | | |
---
| |
Hoosiers deserve property tax relief. I stood alongside my colleagues in the Indiana Senate Democratic Caucus in calling for substantive relief this past legislative session that would not destabilize local units of government. Specifically, we called for targeted relief such as**eliminating the burden of property taxes for our seniors and disabled veterans all together.**

Unfortunately, the _Statehouse Republicans _pushed through a bill that faced widespread bipartisan opposition and **passed out of the State Senate by just two votes.**

SEA 1 doesn't offer true relief for those who need it most. **Homeowners with an assessed home value of $125,000 or less are expected to see an increase in their property tax bill by 2028, while our state's wealthiest families will see the largest percentage decrease in the state. **

At the same time, our public schools are projected to lose millions of dollars they would have otherwise received before the passage of SEA 1, leaving public education in our state at risk.

I will continue to advocate for legislation that supports local government, public education in our state and working families who desperately need the relief they have been promised.
* * *
---
| | |
# Summer Meal Assistance Still Available to Hoosier Kids
---
| | I was profoundly disappointed when it was [announced that Indiana was opting out of the SUN Bucks program,](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=2d7bf48d6ddcf7cfcd07e60ff8237c548cb222086ed630cb6d8e335f996d4beac5c64c4245f05cfced36b0c2c7da4bf56f063617119d13a1 "announced that Indiana was opting out of the SUN Bucks program,") which gave families who need assistance [$120 per child ](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=2d7bf48d6ddcf7cf1a470896db9e3b48c1ec0456be1342ffb7f865ca1c0d45dd6cd09655a1d97a9a2201141fc6aa0dc381ff84c75ace69b3 "$120 per child") to help with the cost of summertime groceries.

41% of parents struggle in some way to provide food for their children when school is out, and, with rising grocery costs, this program offered a bit of relief for 669,000 children in our state.
## Despite this significant loss, free summer meal programs are still available
---
| | |
# _Indy Parks Meal Assistance Program_

| | |
* * *
# Upcoming IMPD Listening Sessions
---
| | |
---
As a part of developing a new five-year strategic plan, IMPD is hosting a series of listening session to promote honest feedback and perspective on the department.

This is a wonderful opportunity to get involved in your community and play a role in its future.

The next listening session is for the Southeast District **this Monday** , June 16 from 6:00 - 7:30 PM.

**Unable to attend in person? Complete the community survey[here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=aba073452ec1e53585fb6cee4870b9b7abe43f9024ba3b0120a57cb3afb1e0047c9ec862a5575b4d0d674182ae61860ca10dabcbe6c064aa "here"). **
---
* * *
#
Post-Session Legislation Overview
---
| | | | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=aba073452ec1e535d8a250220ff9c724736722e7c873bfbe48aeae90970a0478b69186c0981f4244048eba0be9fb5f3e6b3960006d4fcfd8)
---
| | [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=aba073452ec1e535d8a250220ff9c724736722e7c873bfbe48aeae90970a0478b69186c0981f4244048eba0be9fb5f3e6b3960006d4fcfd8)
---
Above you can find a quick breakdown of some our wins from this legislative session, as well as some of the legislation that we advocated against.

This past session my colleagues and I worked hard to support legislation that will better Indiana for all who call it home.

Whether it is **addressing the health care needs of both the present and future** , **protecting consumers in the landscape of emerging industries** or**working to improve the lives of the most vulnerable** , the Senate Democrats spent this past session fighting for every Hoosier family.

In the same breath, we fought hard all session against legislation that takes us backwards as a state and neglects those who need the most help.

The Indiana Senate Democrats are already hard at work connecting with constituents to inform our legislative priorities for next session as we continue fighting for the future Hoosiers deserve.
**For more information on these bills, or any others, visit[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=aba073452ec1e535cc39d2e9e74d165c70ce27426df11353bb618688c1bd7033902ac4cf3528610feb3580768a24a1a0efeca0c0bf787fc1 "iga.in.gov").**

name: Congressman Gabe Evans
subject: Help me defend our flag.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ElectGabeEvans
body:
I’ve worn the flag on my shoulder in combat zones and as a Black Hawk pilot.

| | | Friend, I’ve worn the flag on my shoulder in combat zones and as a Black Hawk pilot. I’ve sworn to defend it here at home as a police lieutenant. And I’ve watched my family build a life beneath it – grateful to call this country home. **_This Flag Day, I’m defending everything Old Glory stands for. _** **I hope you’ll join me.**
---
[ **DEFEND OUR FLAG** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3q2gp0iku24u8mcmhddvbvhlrnl1auvkt0d0qag_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg64ob3cdh2bs)
---
**_The radical Left wants to tear down everything our flag represents. They want to see our national symbols burned. _** I come from a family that immigrated here from Mexico, searching for a better life. I love this flag, and I’ve dedicated my life to serving it. In the U.S. Army, on the police force and in Congress. I won’t stand for the disrespect I’m seeing, and I hope you won’t either.
---
[ **DEFEND OUR FLAG** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6ieph8o9ronqc3e5vqvuak7285k7uh5r4r5o3l0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg64ob3cdh2bs)
---
If you still believe in America, I’m asking you to stand with me – today. **_[Let’s show them that the American Flag still stands for something worth fighting for.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh0debf6p4nijappm3ra4pl4dga286lpm4b2asc8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg64ob3cdh2bs)_** – Gabe Evans
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z6m79n8cbi1ps0rdevq3v3uq7f2uehgotjql8a1g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg64ob3cdh2bs)

name: Alea Nadeem
subject: I was held captive in Iraq under Saddam Hussein’s regime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alea for Congress
body:
By the grace of God, and a few brave Americans, I survived and was rescued.

| | | |

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv6kje2phu9g558kp93ijg0us3fl768cfjqtqipo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg64ob1c9h2bs)
---
|

---
| | Friend,
**I was born in America, but my story began under tyranny in Iraq** when my mother was forced to choose which child she would save: me or my sister.

I was kidnapped by my father and survived a childhood under Saddam Hussein’s regime.
By the grace of God, and a few brave Americans, I survived and was rescued.
That experience taught me what real oppression looks like—and why freedom must be fiercely protected.

---

| | [DONATE NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuuh2lclvrs4gdlnbne0ttrssg691ncm05luj988_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg64ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | Shortly after high school, I answered the call to defend our great nation after we were attacked on September 11th, 2001. I enlisted in the Air Force and took the fight directly to the terrorists.
---
| |
---
| Now, as a Lieutenant Colonel in the Air National Guard, my story has come full circle, but my roots shaped who I am: **a fighter, a patriot, and an unapologetic advocate for American values.**
Wherever I’ve served, I’ve brought the working class grit and patriotic values with me, and I always get the job done.

---
| | **__[Today I’m running for Congress to topple a woke Democrat who has been a politician in Washington for 44 years – longer than I have lived.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4g9di8cs1rruipi24k2p7e5k6sgr0m3ba4oif5o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg64ob1c9h2bs)__**
That's 44 years of building a political machine with an endless supply of money, power, and protection.

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlc49anhhom0ljnrvfv44u6fci499unjuhraviho_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zudq2nun6m2qg4es8dlu7pv89sdbqj1dh10400vg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3na8doks5o2onfasn7a2a97hr4un7213v07apr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze141dug88pnte1hb8pftn0es012ugj3arcpim9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo0cku9hsqq89rgrephrrn0kcv1026p66q4p4nho_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqbtjqrlg1vidmk307kehln6dm10sdofqq0oidb0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zric0ml1v5km1utjec4mgmjmr3m88lpgcbu2naj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z17csl6kfljrv6d7gn45uig96u3rnv5cg6meh7hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za92ghn9ktvaadjjac0vlv6pgkt8fmvadl7u0f48_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ntgsnup6nerchq5jhn8tbj8vr3g5a26tuubgvo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sjg6cpj0c3h2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Stand Tall for Flag Day: Defy the Left’s Chaos!
body:
Fly the flag high, honor our nation and the Army, and celebrate Trump’s birthday today!
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **Today, June 14th, we celebrate Flag Day with unyielding pride! We also celebrate the 250 th birthday of our beloved U.S. Army!**
The American flag, adopted on June 14, 1777, by the Second Continental Congress, is more than a symbol--it's a blazing testament to our nation's fight for liberty and hope. Flag Day stands as a rallying cry for patriots who refuse to let American values be trampled.
On the other hand, the Left despises this flag and everything it represents. They cheer on those who burn and deface it, sneering at anyone who dares to show gratitude and honor to the red, white, and blue. Though, in a new twist, they're now desperately urging people attending their protests/riots today to bring American flags! They know the majority of Americans don't approve of them flying foreign flags, especially as they burn our cities.
_However, you and I know the truth about what they really think of our country and our flag._
Today, real patriots honor our flag not because we worship cloth, but because it embodies the blood and sacrifice of those who fought for our liberty. So, fly your flags high, stand tall, and share your love for our flag and our country with others. The Left's protests, disruptions, and even their violence are nothing compared to the resolve of true patriots.
Channel your patriotism into action today--join initiatives like the [Faithblazer Veterans Memorials Challenge](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abf1c157/1edb9794abed540e) to restore faith and pride in our public spaces. I also highly encourage you to post patriotic, pro-America First messages and graphics on social media today, like the graphic below. Feel free to use this graphic in your posts today! __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abf1c157/1edb9794abed5410)
---
| **** ************ The Left's lies and taunts won't intimidate us. We'll fight for freedom and America First, as we always have, with courage and conviction, legally and unapologetically.
And as a bonus, today marks President Donald J. Trump's 79th birthday! Join us in celebrating the man who stands strong for America as we honor the flag that flies as a symbol of our nation's greatness!
Happy Flag Day, Happy Birthday to our U.S. Army, and Happy Birthday to President Trump!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin
P.S. As a result of the Left's willingness to not only lie, but also use violence to oppose America First, **we are going to release an updated version of our "Make America First" how-to guide next week. **Keep an eye on your inbox so that you can easily combat the Left in their efforts to stop the America First agenda.**** __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---

clean_body: Fly the flag high, honor our nation and the Army, and celebrate Trump’s birthday today! | | | | | | Patriot- | ** Today, June 14th, we celebrate Flag Day with unyielding pride! We also celebrate the 250 th birthday of our beloved U.S. Army! The American flag, adopted on June 14, 1777, by the Second Continental Congress, is more than a symbol--it's a blazing testament to our nation's fight for liberty and hope. Flag Day stands as a rallying cry for patriots who refuse to let American values be trampled. On the other hand, the Left despises this flag and everything it represents. They cheer on those who burn and deface it, sneering at anyone who dares to show gratitude and honor to the red, white, and blue. Though, in a new twist, they're now desperately urging people attending their protests/riots today to bring American flags! They know the majority of Americans don't approve of them flying foreign flags, especially as they burn our cities. However, you and I know the truth about what they really think of our country and our flag. Today, real patriots honor our flag not because we worship cloth, but because it embodies the blood and sacrifice of those who fought for our liberty. So, fly your flags high, stand tall, and share your love for our flag and our country with others. The Left's protests, disruptions, and even their violence are nothing compared to the resolve of true patriots. Channel your patriotism into action today--join initiatives like the to restore faith and pride in our public spaces. I also highly encourage you to post patriotic, pro-America First messages and graphics on social media today, like the graphic below. Feel free to use this graphic in your posts today! **____ ** ******** | | | ******** The Left's lies and taunts won't intimidate us. We'll fight for freedom and America First, as we always have, with courage and conviction, legally and unapologetically. And as a bonus, today marks President Donald J. Trump's 79th birthday! Join us in celebrating the man who stands strong for America as we honor the flag that flies as a symbol of our nation's greatness! Happy Flag Day, Happy Birthday to our U.S. Army, and Happy Birthday to President Trump! In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin P.S. As a result of the Left's willingness to not only lie, but also use violence to oppose America First, we are going to release an updated version of our "Make America First" how-to guide next week. Keep an eye on your inbox so that you can easily combat the Left in their efforts to stop the America First agenda. **__ ** ******** | | | | | | | This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved. "" Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: United Sovereign Americans
subject: Happy Flag Day!
body:
USA celebrates the flag and “the republic for which it stands, one nation under God with liberty and justice for all.”
|
---
# USA Celebrates Flag Day 2025!
---
| [ **Watch Our Flag Day Video** ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VXhVLC8wVn6CW32Tx-X5jCZ4bW4CCSrm5xPz-lN2sc1y43m2ndW7lCdLW6lZ3lwW2BlJ9d1rG8XmW2CDc0d6VWH-HW4p92sY6kJvZRW4Q9Stz8xYrNHW4v1ZH37h0JH9N54S9VVD0JRPW6nXF245cDKFdW45vkl96k8qQ2N6v7Qs0k2yH1W6kfvjX8W8qcLW4Q6Fyd99gsHwW2SS28P5YYWJvW93JpQg8QmBfNW67vXXD7d5WLVW2GQgy941R83kW8fFdCS6FMXRKW56lTMK4tlV1GW11R58y62kL2nW7rZ0cF6JgjHkW46Ch6B83fm86W28hh2t3MZ0JRW3GKFnc7lJJyKW636Hz837z_MxW6ZV03n6Py02Df5tMMmT04)
---
USA celebrates the flag and “the republic for which it stands, one nation under God with liberty and justice for all.” This day and every day, our American flag serves as a symbol of freedom and our American ideals, here and across the globe. The only way to secure that freedom is through valid and transparent elections—with real voters, real votes, real counts and real proof—so we can all trust that the true will of the people is represented by those who govern our great nation. Learn more at [www.unite4freedom.com](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VXhVLC8wVn6CW32Tx-X5jCZ4bW4CCSrm5xPz-lN2sc1xv3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3lCW988kQH5VCgH4W16y42b4rsWs2N3M-_H0Gc_5WW3hG18P8rkcpBVgyWwn5KpHdgW71X8Hj670VXxW6xM0Y36G0TLYW39MD0J6R6QGmW1cqCHr98wc3HW3yw_k42klWfZW6p5rMZ3bnH7BW8tkbsq74GtqpN389WFZgNjgzW2Vt5VD8P_pf6W6kZ3361-KFQxW5NPQnh19BGscVcWzXB8JY-_0W6gLGpT525_pWW6MStqx64JFD0N43Bw0yHWYxMf2_qhm204)
## FUN FACTS:
* On June 14, 1777, the Second Continental Congress passed a resolution stating that the flag of the Unites States be 13 stripes, alternating red and white,” and that the Union be 13 stars, white on a blue field representing a new constellation.”

* The color of the flag:
* Red stands for valor and bravery
* White represents purity and innocence
* Blue symbolizes vigilance, perseverance and justice

* While it was designed by Francis Hopkinson, a New Jersey delegate signatory of the Declaration of Independence, it is widely believed that Betsy Ross sewed the first flag.

* The orderly design of 50 stars we fly today was designed by a 17-year-old Ohio student named Bob Heft, who handed it in as a History class project. His congressman forwarded it on to President Eisenhower, and it has been flown since it was first raised July 4, 1960.

---
### _Thank you to all our volunteers for submitting your images!_
We appreciate your participation and patriotism! We apologize if we missed any images that you may have submitted. We were not able to include some of the images we received due to very small image size/quality. Keep reaching our weekly email for more ways to participate with USA initiatives and activities, because together we can become an advocacy force more powerful than money!

## _Happy Flag Day!_
---

name: Craig Riedel for Senate
subject: Riedel Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Craig Riedel
body:
| | | | |
---
Riedel Campaign Update | June 14, 2025
---
Craig Attends Event Celebrating the Center for Christian Virtue

---
|
---
Craig is proud to stand alongside Ohio's two America First Senators, Bernie Moreno and Jon Husted at an event for the Center for Christian Virtue. Craig and Danette attended the event to celebrate the impact that the organization has had on America. Craig issued the following statement:
"I Appreciate all that they do to honor God! America is the greatest country in the world because of its foundation on Judeo-Christian values!"

---
|
---
Craig & Danette Attend Events Celebrating the 1st District

Festival and parade season is heating up all across Ohio's 1st Senate District. Craig and Danette enjoyed attending Hicksville's Sesquicentennial Celebration, the Paulding County Fair, and the Van Wert Peony Festival.
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Craig Attends Events in Hardin County

Over the past month, Craig and Danette spent time in Hardin County. Craig and Danette talked with 1st District constituents in Kenton and stuffed candy bags for parade season with the Hardin County GOP.
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Meet-and-Greet in Putnam County

Craig and Danette had a meet-and-greet in Ottawa where Craig laid out his vision for the 1st District. Craig believes Ohio and America's best days are still on the horizon.

---
| |
---
| Upcoming Meet-and-Greets with Craig and Danette

Craig and Danette will be taking part in two meet-and-greets coming up this month. They will be talking to 1st District voters in Logan County at Russells Point, and in Van Wert County at Ohio City. Come out to meet Craig and Danette and hear Craig outline his priorities for the district!
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| Riedel Interviewed on Local News

Craig appreciated the opportunity to speak with Hometown Stations in Lima about his candidacy for State Senate, as well as important issues facing the State, such as Ohio's income tax and local property taxes.

Click below to watch his interview.

# Saturday, June 14, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1775, the Continental Congress authorized the formation of the Continental Army, calling for the enlistment of skilled riflemen to serve the United Colonies for one year. [This act established](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQBeCnwR0WHsA_BcU27rLtlhbBQzy72EQwieW3X-U29wFuf_TpnPPnttw8JToev_2OjmNeDjxrQmYsCxV_VC70DyvV4jFxfgZf8msBBVaqXnZmWT2lazHN6iIioG7QdYOZxsn2w9BsbgRvVbRhnMwQQKE22Ae82w7XaDT2DbmPpvrOdEoNtm8xoI7WDEHDGEcThVG4EufS_s108IYxXfmNpQ15b5LbmJ9V6F8CZgHzeZ7tcQ-nrxsdD87HJyVg_swSMKccfBIwv6r0Zb_kRpVzuWT0gasEq3iTdyq8rf6S34hcg4BZTxq6yQiYm-LW50kpUe0HYdRj95S--vCPTnw7-B8AAP__saSHYw) what would become the U.S. Army, America's first national institution, more than a year before the Declaration of Independence on July 4, 1776.

A list of the most unique carousels in the U.S. reveals how these antique rides keep the magic spinning with history and charm. [Check out the list below for more](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7YAg3EGhi7e0rWjheERv5ZACs-J8vdV8gvdr-7ROV_n9ewwYb58uitYimXN8GgJiKCuWF1uVPEHGrbqIFG5eVfLsUoudc-nXqg1OEzPVXXBRgAJYwdWGHWaT3oyptutVjGOWsxmDtvmNxDSQBj1Zrz30ou5Q_t645NQgnOjpwE8jFEr40c5x1lFpjgEpFKH74KZdojpWe5QB1-uXbI70a2x8YPJhclF8A0aDUdzVIJ7vjZMLlTdHRKTy5Hx94D-bdEgtR5zTzv0R2Ny6aoNtwemhG0yTPHL1WF6U-hfae5W_gUAAP__Iwd5xA).

Now's your chance to invest in a company that is shaking up the real estate industry with today's sponsor, [Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGOGyEQRU_TvbMFFNB4wSLSyLvJNktUpgu7ErpBgD2a20c9iXKBbP9_qvp6P97DO3Lm_f4dN_IjlbDTR880BrXADfc-Gv-izr0h5VFqxFaeQQllTsKepA4rcv4Mel59IlIEM3m56Iu7GLss88PfbrdEyVlQwpqIDiUkQCUVgLoYvM3sj2vCSi2FWIw9UyRIRi8RlEtOp0kLWnmUdv5ZeB8PSvmzvKidY9nm7B9j1D7Bt0ldJ3Xl_UV9nCtG7OUgjhiuz7GFXp4t0gRvtCHnSdkj3Gjl5zbBW0VeTxXb2Kn1B9e_fcStIt_3L-JfKZ04gYHwR4EUi3EAwonL3PxaPzhn7naZtLgfr76Gjv-y-_LqdwAAAP__klKOhg).

|

## Iran Strikes Israel
Iran launched [retaliatory airstrikes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EFu8yAQBeDT4B0WjLFxFiz-jXf5t11aBMbJtNhEMImV21duq16g2xnp6X3v7TyfPSXarv_9io6XPG-414TMWGYqfqtc6AMr1eIxcb4HX_JjBgW9VIPUZo6e0ms2TXQLImDXoNPWnMZTP1jb3NwlKH0ZAE8xDgEuANZCiEprG_VoVd-QO9LUoI1WyvZDiwG7pTc2dDAuo1mEURiJc2nfM218wyW98hNLG_LaJHdjvlfR_RMwCZj2fW8LPhhLPf7HJZcUBUwrxZhQoq8sYPoGyepfVRLLH6Y8yNKvFOX2CAl9kYxbpbxV-WvuBExNcfG-U0pUByuMuq6e0lch_tOKTwefAQAA___Nqodl) on Israel late Friday, targeting Jerusalem and Tel Aviv after Israeli strikes killed top Iranian military leaders and nuclear scientists. Israeli officials said Iran fired about 100 missiles in two waves. The Iron Dome defense system intercepted most of the missiles, though some caused fires and injured 44 people, leaving two people in serious condition. ## Economic Mood Shifts
Consumer sentiment surged in June, [ending a six-month slide](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdTQokpLsQoWDQKleyqQUGHL5vDZ_hOXaim8fKFd41QAzwIfB9_tj_XCYsHz-dBlmjnUtsLcEzEArkiuNCR_QsJGDxHXzjupz1UoPUo2yt2twmN6r7cIcATSYDuZ-spfzZRinqbvN1voh6MEPo7ImehfdZNwY9TCGS1Tm0uF80NTY216paRhP4MHEwU7e6HM82yisgoBc6XSvWPgGMb3rC-jka-7SfGPemjBXoRehl33fT7mVYxN6gSKfTegl1wLvIx09gI_G19KeGUg2KIwZCkvMG9UXNJkrgeSbKxL-buAZgnRNMj3zJqmm1OQf5x-SHWGMB8yRvF77H8tjvwuzVI9BmO_fDquwt19AW0dz2HZMCds4Cas-s8P0_z9_Sfpr1v8CAAD__15Kmgg), as optimism grew following the Trump administration’s recent rollback of select tariffs. June consumer [confidence rose](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGynSAUheGnwW47iIhaWKSxu2lTOggbIRfBgX2OOW-fMa-Qes3888369bV96RBDOn7qExdyeUt414hEWLZQdKpUwjfWUIvGSPkyuuTXJrgYgCvo5GZ1iJ9NNnZxiAL7BpdulPM0D2ocG7-ITs3TOAmLg-6l7tU077NVjtux2zvcm7A8Na462XE-DqpFg70b5Gh6MblJOiY52kC5tL9zSOTRxU9-Y2lNPpu4eKKrsv4HEysT633frUm7eUYm1ifNxMoVE2vXM7GanOrrxAIVE4UTE0FBbUM6oOCeX8lWoAzny3jw4fBYIOIbI5DXCfDPhYbQgq5wYb4iwoEEjwZIl-AcVJ_Nd-vpjE1Z7HWHGENVI5P8OHWI_9D0X0-_F_E3AAD__2Q0lSE) to 60.5, beating the 54 estimate and marking a 15.9% monthly gain, according to one index of consumer sentiment. Inflation expectations also dropped sharply, with the one-year outlook falling to 5.1%—down from 6.6% last month, and easing from highs not seen since 1981. Consumer confidence remains [divided along political lines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAURb_GdEb2w2AoXOwWdNlmiynRCzwnb8bYke0k4u9HzC9Me690dc_5uCwX5MDx9g93ctWnJdK7BKqV8sIZY6mZv6hwyUihpseKOT0XUNBLNUhtlg05HItpNueJgLqGnLZmGqd-sLa5O6TVW6_81COAvk5kNfYERk-opxFtw-5cU4M2WinbDy2t1Pne2LWD0Y_GC6No45py-5k41jv5cKQX5XZNexPcvdZHEd0fAbOAGa_rSdDe0lkLmP8-C0cqRcD85kz_a8qHgHlNsTx3yrJQrLxTrDJzoSJ1qfIM5EGYJUcfsHKKMtOOHIvUAKPuwUxNdtvjzSFwGaww6rYjh59P9VciXw6-AwAA__9ZCYnu), with Republicans expressing greater optimism about the economy under Trump than Democrats. The Federal Reserve is also expected to hold interest rates steady at next week’s meeting.

Built for traveling carnivals, the ride features 36 jumping horses, with some boasting real horsehair tails. Opened in 2015, [Carol Ann's Carousel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ygzAQQOHTQGdGf0i4UJHGndOmZGSxMhtLiFltzPj2mfgKucA3b97Xdb4GzLjdP0MBz6nOGxwtAzPQjBS2xoQPaNgoQOa6x0D1Z1ZCjSdhT9LMS8D8mk2_-ASgQPfgpTPn6Txa5_rVu2USTkurx2hDujmbbmcQIkojNRglevR_mrDSSCHcaAeIoNNoXNRqSpNJnRGwIFcavituvELKr_oEGmItffYr8946_dGpS6cux3EM5dVKyED4BEpUN94DPYZK905d3v0N8rBy6ckv-4E5Y7OuM-JeAua3yv9a8fTqNwAA__-RHnSn) at Cincinnati’s Smale Riverfront Park honors local wildlife, city parks, and Martha—the last passenger pigeon, who died at the Cincinnati Zoo in 1914. The Herschell Carousel Factory Museum in North Tonawanda, New York, offers a rare chance to experience a working piece of American amusement history. The fully restored [1916 Number One Special Carrousel](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFu7CAQANDTQLcWxhjsguI32-1vUyJ2GOxJsLEAr7W3j5Ir5AJPeh8P9_CUaF_--w1ti9nteNWErWFxVPxeW6EvrFSLx9TyAb7k00khx5vQt1654Cm9neLBRkSJA0fbGzVP86iN4asNs3jOGuYYJuEhqADTM4IH7QP0SgMn-6MJ3ateCDPqDgGHOCoDg5zipCJTAgO1XLrPTHtbMaZ3fmHpIG882bW1o7LhH5N3Ju_XdXXgS8lnxbSdFc-ty2Vh8s6LDcdFKVHVhimxbJ7Sr9H-FH9Z-R0AAP__r6pvAQ) anchors the museum, which also offers hands-on carving classes for visitors.

On this day in 1775, the Continental Congress authorized the formation of the Continental Army, calling for the enlistment of skilled riflemen to serve the United Colonies for one year. what would become the U.S. Army, America's first national institution, more than a year before the Declaration of Independence on July 4, 1776. Israeli officials said Iran fired about 100 missiles in two waves. The Iron Dome defense system intercepted most of the missiles, though some caused fires and injured 44 people, leaving two people in serious condition. . The Trump administration in Israel’s strike, but American forces did assist in shooting down Iranian missiles and projectiles Friday, according to three U.S. officials. Iran with the U.S. that were set for Sunday in Oman, despite President Trump urging Tehran to engage in talks before it's too late. Economic Mood Shifts Consumer sentiment surged in June, , as optimism grew following the Trump administration’s recent rollback of select tariffs. June consumer to 60.5, beating the 54 estimate and marking a 15.9% monthly gain, according to one index of consumer sentiment. Inflation expectations also dropped sharply, with the one-year outlook falling to 5.1%—down from 6.6% last month, and easing from highs not seen since 1981. Consumer confidence remains , with Republicans expressing greater optimism about the economy under Trump than Democrats. The Federal Reserve is also expected to hold interest rates steady at next week’s meeting. List: Top Carousels Ranked A list of the in the country celebrates 10 nostalgic attractions brimming with creativity, charm, and magic. San Antonio’s , the nation’s oldest children’s amusement park, earned a spot with its 1918 hand-carved carousel. Built for traveling carnivals, the ride features 36 jumping horses, with some boasting real horsehair tails. Opened in 2015, at Cincinnati’s Smale Riverfront Park honors local wildlife, city parks, and Martha—the last passenger pigeon, who died at the Cincinnati Zoo in 1914. The Herschell Carousel Factory Museum in North Tonawanda, New York, offers a rare chance to experience a working piece of American amusement history. name: Solar Go Fridge
subject: New Solar-Powered King of Coolers
body:
It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520)
---
| | |
---
_June 14th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | **NEW Solar-Powered
"King of Coolers"
Never Needs Ice!**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520)
---
**No More Soggy Food!** This revolutionary fridge on wheels keeps your food and drinks ice cold... **But it NEVER needs ice!** It may look like an ordinary cooler, but you've never seen anything like this... Instead of ice, it uses advanced technology to keep all your important food and drinks ice cold. So you'll never have to stop for ice every couple of hours... And you'll never have to dip your hands into soggy food or gross puddles of water. And since you'll never need ice, you'll have all that precious cooler space available for MORE of your favorite food and drinks. **And it's super flexible.** This revolutionary Solar Go-Fridge is **not JUST a cooler – it's a refrigerator, freezer, and deep freezer** all in one! It can work as a fridge for hot dogs and drinks, or as a freezer for ice cream, popsicles and frozen meats... And it can even go down to subzero temperatures! **The Solar Go-Fridge
Charges For FREE With
The Power of the Sun!** Unlike other run-of-the-mill coolers, your Solar Go-Fridge... **Charges for FREE in the Sun!** Yes, you can recharge your Solar Go-Fridge using the FREE power of the sun. After all, we couldn’t call it a "Solar" Go-Fridge if it wasn't solar powered... And that's why... **You get a FREE 40-Watt Solar Panel with your Solar Go-Fridge.**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520)
---
You can use your solar panel to power your Solar Go-Fridge on the go... So you can take it to campsites, sporting events, RV trips, tailgates, backyard BBQs, pool parties and so much more... Or use it to power your critical devices. It's like a mini power cell in its own right. It works with phones, tablets and your other critical electronic devices. Plus, if a tree falls on some power lines and cuts the power to your neighborhood, you don't have to worry about the food in your fridge spoiling. **Look What You Can Fit
In Your Solar Go-Fridge** Your Solar Go-Fridge can take any kind of frozen supplies with you. And when we say _any kind of supplies_ , we mean it. It has a small footprint, but has spacious capacity. **You get 42 quarts of space** for your critical items – that's like 46 cans or bottles of water. And no bulky ice bags!
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520)
---
Its compact size and all-terrain wheels make it easy to throw in the trunk. Or to bring with you to tailgates. It's truly small, but mighty. Drinks, hot dogs, medicine and more. It can all fit in your Solar Go-Fridge. **[Limited Time] Get
Exclusive Introductory
Pricing, Plus 11 Bonus
Gifts Worth $388 And
FREE Shipping!** Order now to take advantage of our special introductory pricing, 11 free bonus gifts worth $388, and free shipping. Your exclusive 11 FREE Bonus Gifts package includes:
* **FREE** 40-Watt Solar Panel
* **FREE** 72-Hour Survival Food Kit
* **FREE** Survival Coffee
* **FREE** Survival Cocoa
* **FREE** StarFire Camp Stove
* **FREE** Freedom Flame
* **FREE** Multi-Use Flashlight
* **FREE** Solar Power Digital Report
* **FREE** $25 Certificate
* **FREE** Shipping & Handling
* **FREE** VIP Phone Line

Plus there's an easy payment plan available with no credit check...

[**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520)
---
**But Hurry... Last Time
The Solar Go-Fridge
SOLD OUT In 24 Hours** **There is one catch:** We can't reserve any Solar Go-Fridges or give out any IOUs. You'll need to ACT FAST... Because the last version of the Solar Go-Fridge sold out in 24 hours after only a couple of text messages... And that version couldn't do half the things this NEW model can. So when people find out about this space-age ice chest, there could be a mad rush. **So don't wait...** If you miss out on this special Introductory Pricing, there's nothing we can do. There's only one way to guarantee your Introductory Pricing, FREE gifts and FREE shipping... And that's by clicking the link below to grab your Solar Go-Fridge while they're in stock and ready to ship: [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520) So make sure to grab yours now. **I know you'll love it!** Stay safe and have fun out there,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Go-Fridge** **Kristen G.**
"It was super fun to use. We were gone for four nights, and didn't have to get ice at all. Not having to deal with ice the whole time was amazing. I was worried that it wasn't big enough. But it held absolutely everything I was planning to take because I didn't have to put any ice in there. It didn't have to be as big as my regular cooler." **Randy M.**
"You cannot beat it. It is awesome. No running around, looking for drinks. No more opening up your drink and setting it on the tractor and coming back 20 minutes later and it's warm. Everything's cold. Everything's cold all the time. Just a wonderful, wonderful unit. I am a Type 1 diabetic. It's been keeping my insulin cold to the point where I don't worry about my insulin. I know it's good." **Damon H.**
"We all have lots of coolers. But this is a cooler extraordinaire. Not only is it a cooler, it's a fully-functioning refrigerator. It's great for me being a fisherman and an outdoor guy. I can put a bunch of fish in here and set it at freezing temperatures. And when I get home, my fish will stay frozen and I don't need any ice. It's a great tool. It's absolutely a must for campers and fisherman. It looks like a cooler, but it's actually a refrigerator which makes it a really special thing." **Lisa W.**
"You don't have to stop and get ice anymore. That was one thing I hated to do early in the morning when we had to leave to go out of town to play in a baseball tournament. We had to leave at 5 or 6 or sometimes 4:30 in the morning and had to stop to get ice for our cooler. So this is nice because you just have to set it on refrigerator mode and you get your cold drinks or whatever you put in your cooler. People are already taking pictures with it, trying to find out more information so they could get their own." **Lou H.**
"Please get one or two of them like I did. They will come in handy next time you have a power failure or going on a trip. I use mine whenever we travel or recently when we had a power failure a few weeks ago. You won't be sorry." [**Order Now To Lock In Your
Low Pricing, FREE Bonus
Gifts and FREE Shipping!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21575/6374453/cec049f7ad7262e1353973bf481e5a330aded538/921d299b35e0bcdfe4c6c6e582acf0def078d520)

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1886, avid bird-watcher [Conger Neblett Hagar](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLtywyAURL8GddIAQg8KijTqnDalhseVuBMEHmCM_fcZ-xfSbrG75_zc9pvGgPH81heo-jzSHqGVALVC3mt6om0pX6XCUxfrNcaim8GdUz71dO6Z2J3G8NpF55ShTrIOFFuEXOW6StF5BYwt1gl3jIuhRsxWjEZObDHAD5iZ7FC9y-jMBGOUjWyQ1kzrNNL1cMYBX4mg4LCmPFQPnyNHeKUH5MGmqwvK13ovZPwifCN8a60NtXidYsAIQ8on4ZvX0ZmUfgnfINaMUD7hqXNvUzwh9xHMG7rLyt0bhoBlXoig56UxfHbq_-w8FP8LAAD__wjAe60) was born in Corsicana. Known as the “Texas bird lady,” she is credited with adding over 20 new species to the list of birds that can be found in the state, and she reported sightings of several migratory birds thought to be extinct. Bird watchers, keep your eyes on the ground—[foot-long, toxic worms](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2utCAQhq8GOw0gIhYUX2O3X3tKw88ok6BsgCy7d3_i3sIpJzN55n3en8f2MBjxOv6bE3R972m7oJUItULeanqjaymfpcLbFBcMXsU0ixunfOqp7JnYvMH42UTntaV-YR1oNotFLUotogvaOSt3Q90kjWBO7juX1s6CqVF5YJx3qG8YlUwwRtnIhsXZSU0jVbu3HrgigoLHmvJQA3yD7PGTXpAHl84u6lDrs5DxH-Er4Wtrbbis83u714Svtw_ha0zOxHtMuYb-i-mDOU_IAYzvb8u-4BEqXsd9PyrJZikJX7us_bNhjFjkTAQ9ToPx-7v-rbGX5r8BAAD__1XYgRw) are slithering through North Texas gardens. See more in today’s _Top Stories_. ## Toxic Worms Spread Across North Texas
Weeks of heavy rain have brought an unwelcome visitor to North Texas in the form of [hammerhead worms](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2utCAQhq8GOw0gIhYUX2O3X3tKw88ok6BsgCy7d3_i3sIpJzN55n3en8f2MBjxOv6bE3R972m7oJUItULeanqjaymfpcLbFBcMXsU0ixunfOqp7JnYvMH42UTntaV-YR1oNotFLUotogvaOSt3Q90kjWBO7juX1s6CqVF5YJx3qG8YlUwwRtnIhsXZSU0jVbu3HrgigoLHmvJQA3yD7PGTXpAHl84u6lDrs5DxH-Er4Wtrbbis83u714Svtw_ha0zOxHtMuYb-i-mDOU_IAYzvb8u-4BEqXsd9PyrJZikJX7us_bNhjFjkTAQ9ToPx-7v-rbGX5r8BAAD__1XYgRw). The [toxic and invasive](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2u2zAQhE9DdWvwz5ZUsHAKpUhe2pTCilxZBCjSIPlE-_aBdYV0Cyww833z92v-Qh98fPzBnUx9rWmO1EqgWinPNb28bSnvpdILi93Qx4Jt8bPk8gr8BkLPDn14z7pzZuFuFB0Z0etxGIdh1N1mrBtRSdKKa6VRc-Q9Iu_VdbBK29vYefMJ4zehheBCictol-twVXxY3eJIDkxzcr6mfKkbnSBreKeD8sWmvQtmq_VZmLozOTE5tdYue4mfH5MTRfguTE4fKSan8z6twMcDiz8ITj_ATFCemdD5-AAf4SyCjTIVaBtWqAkaVrtB-q6wpszkhBnud_Hzx-9fU5eNezYfgi-3nmn-2NGHE7D-36yHkf8CAAD__1C1jic) worms are spreading across the region, posing a threat to animals and plants and potentially causing skin irritation in humans. Their hammerhead-shaped heads and [12- to 15-inch length](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGS3CAURE-DMqYAwQgFBE6UrVOHqg98DdgItoBdZm7vGl1h467qfq__fOwfEFPMj99wounPo-wZR0vYO9a9l2d0o9SzdXxCcwFibjBs3AUTirI75XL3ENNrl5M3lvmVT2j4Ile9ar3KKRhl0TKlJSxyUeJApz1jXs4cnFWgYIrmXcbuXHLO-Mxvq7NKq5npw1uPQhPJ0Mde6q0HvECO9CrfWG-unFMyoffPRuZfRGxEbGOMG3x5cK93TMT2F9y_knvAgZaILUHH1onYKsRMHXy1mB-0xoa0HPQypgHOE2tA8PRtT2OmudQe6LU-VeM_R0wptvtCJHucENPF0n_24LcR_wMAAP__oYOJTw) make them easy to identify, though one resident described them as looking "demonic." Hammerhead worms reproduce asexually, meaning if you cut them into pieces, they multiply. Instead of slicing them, experts say you should put them in a bag and freeze them for up to 48 hours.
## Texas Police Allegedly Tracked Woman in Illinois
Illinois Sec. of State Alexi Giannoulias is calling for an investigation into a suburban Chicago police department after Texas authorities allegedly [accessed license plate reader data](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuymzAQhp9GdPJIQuZSqEhDd9KmZBZpDTuREaPdHJu3z-BXOO1evv_y52v-Asq0r7_hiUHejzLv-OKMIlhnKW-Kr1KfLPgGjhvQzvBaaHbG3bXptPVzAsrn7JsUFpNG22CwvR-HcRhG32zBR9Ni37dx9Jish0fXQ_LDPVo7jHa0DYULZjrrrTW2tbcxLvfh3prhkZaEblDeYCIp9SYbfow88lm-sd5ieTY5bCIHq_aXcpNyEyyxjxtFWMu1V246CotyE2OsKFBPzQKCGjK-Sa8E-17-ZQLWfCD81RWPUoX1R0kfJVNETTnjCjmfGmJEZkzXiPZCrK-DnVEf-cJWhIRVJxBQbrJd3zrvWuWmpoZ0vK4v7nrlzfoEyp8I8rPiv4P7HwAA__9hOpuy) to search for a woman who self-administered an abortion. Giannoulias says the data use violated Illinois law, which bars sharing license plate reader information for out-of-state abortion or immigration enforcement. Texas law enforcement searched for the woman across more than 83,000 license plate reader cameras nationwide after finding fetal remains in a Burleson neighborhood. Illinois is one of nearly half of U.S. states with laws protecting women [seeking abortion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO6yAQhJ_G7oi4-UJBcZp0Oe0prQWWeCVsLODEydv_cl7h73ZnpNE38--xPIAS7c-_sKFt75iXHc-asDUsS8tv8mcuW234hupXoL3C6WiRXA6Mj0zoJQClz6L7YB0PRvRoxaTNbObZ6H61MjowARXXCnFyyvEYJB8dxuAAounJXmF8FFoILpS4Ge-GeVB8jsEFlHOnOQZqudzail-QmD75heXm89Ynu7Z21E796eS9k3c4rgKXdT2lkU94XS6XRnln4D3Wymjb6FngKyXyuFdkR4KGrCAELJXV_-WFlBLsHplQEfzkuR5CVH7AQeghjkGj9jo4OffFhuOklKiOU6f5cwNKX772u1VfVv4EAAD__wqYj3E) when traveling from states where it’s restricted.
## Studios Battle for Texas Chainsaw Rights
A [bidding war](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdI5sYwMuXFxDl2uvRAu7hJUMjmwrJH9_SqT7gqtH8_Rmfq7TFTjycfuGnUJ9rmk66CyRaqU81fTk5Ux5L5WeUJYN-ChwzjwZZZxUndR2QuD4mmyDYVbodUNB99YPfhi8bbawrtBbN-PiWr8q18Pc2kUbdKi8xc41HN4w1WmrtdKtvvhldoNr1bDijGQGYRUh15QvdaOPyBpf6UH5sqS9iWGr9V5E-yXMKMyIBBj5oHcozPhmCzOqTpjx05V_K-QOpcCSSVZ4xZRl2SgzwiFnRuTjJk_IUpu2s8Z5rYUZmxzwfnKMXLpeWHXbgePHov7vu0cwvwEAAP__SPGC2Q) is heating up over rights to the cult-classic _Texas Chainsaw Massacre_ franchise, with up to eight studios and streamers vying for the prize. Verve, the agency selling the franchise, started hearing pitches in March, though no clear frontrunner has emerged. Among the interested creatives is Texas-raised [_Yellowstone_ creator](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd7YuGAdcUGzjLttuaWG4jpGwseDGJH-_SqT3Ba8cjXR0Zv7d57sNMRyPv3ZHQ681zQfWEpEI80zpFVxNeS-EL1vcZsNRbF3CLEAMLdxaLmdvQ3zPsvFmAT_yBg1XctSj1qNsNuMHy_uF97Aqr6X23EkFAhT3y8jBr00wHxjcuOQceM-70S2DHnrQq188Cs0koA-UckcbfkXW-E4X5s6lvYlmIzoL6_8wMTEx1Vo7t-V0fFomJveM9MzIxEQXE5PNFFz8xg-p_dnU7rYU6zK2GZeUqN3TFbAV0CtQSnbndjbZ-LOGGEO5KSbhsdsQvw70u-cuI_4HAAD___Ksg-A) Taylor Sheridan, who would serve as a producer on any future project. A separate TV pitch aligned with A24 may involve Austin native Glen Powell, though he’s not expected to appear on screen. The original 1974 film grossed $31 million and launched a franchise spanning nine films, comics, games, and live events.

clean_body: Weeks of heavy rain have brought an unwelcome visitor to North Texas in the form of . | | | | | | Saturday, June 14, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1886, avid bird-watcher was born in Corsicana. Known as the “Texas bird lady,” she is credited with adding over 20 new species to the list of birds that can be found in the state, and she reported sightings of several migratory birds thought to be extinct. Bird watchers, keep your eyes on the ground— are slithering through North Texas gardens. See more in today’s Top Stories. We're sponsored today by , the low-cost, high-tech hearing aids for under $100. Abilene 🌤️ 95/74° | Amarillo 🌩️ 97/68° | Austin 🌩️ 95/77° | Brownsville 🌤️ 97/82° | Corpus Christi 🌤️ 94/82° | DFW 🌩️ 92/74° | El Paso ☀️ 107/76° | Houston 🌩️ 92/79° | Laredo 🌤️ 102/80° | Lubbock 🌩️ 94/70° | Midland ☀️ 98/73° | San Antonio 🌩️ 96/78° | Tyler 🌩️ 90/74° | Waco 🌤️ 92/75° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Toxic Worms Spread Across North Texas Weeks of heavy rain have brought an unwelcome visitor to North Texas in the form of . The worms are spreading across the region, posing a threat to animals and plants and potentially causing skin irritation in humans. Their hammerhead-shaped heads and make them easy to identify, though one resident described them as looking "demonic." Hammerhead worms reproduce asexually, meaning if you cut them into pieces, they multiply. Instead of slicing them, experts say you should put them in a bag and freeze them for up to 48 hours. Texas Police Allegedly Tracked Woman in Illinois Illinois Sec. of State Alexi Giannoulias is calling for an investigation into a suburban Chicago police department after Texas authorities allegedly to search for a woman who self-administered an abortion. Giannoulias says the data use violated Illinois law, which bars sharing license plate reader information for out-of-state abortion or immigration enforcement. Texas law enforcement searched for the woman across more than 83,000 license plate reader cameras nationwide after finding fetal remains in a Burleson neighborhood. Illinois is one of nearly half of U.S. states with laws protecting women when traveling from states where it’s restricted. Studios Battle for Texas Chainsaw Rights A is heating up over rights to the cult-classic Texas Chainsaw Massacre franchise, with up to eight studios and streamers vying for the prize. Verve, the agency selling the franchise, started hearing pitches in March, though no clear frontrunner has emerged. Among the interested creatives is Texas-raised Taylor Sheridan, who would serve as a producer on any future project. A separate TV pitch aligned with A24 may involve Austin native Glen Powell, though he’s not expected to appear on screen. The original 1974 film grossed $31 million and launched a franchise spanning nine films, comics, games, and live events. | Flying together with our sponsor These Are The Rolls-Royce Of Hearing Aids (And Under $100) Shoppers are raving about these low-cost hearing aids that are virtually invisible. are changing the lives of people every day. Big companies charge THOUSANDS for hearing aids—but guess what? You don’t have to pay that much! , wireless charging, and all-day battery life for No doctor visits, no crazy prices—just amazing hearing at an unbeatable deal. Over 150,000 happy customers are already loving their new way of hearing. Don’t let overpriced hearing aids hold you back— | ➤ Statewide: Aaron Reitz, a former Trump appointee who stepped down this week from a senior Justice Department role, has announced a 2026 run for Texas attorney general to replace Ken Paxton, who is running for U.S. Senate. () ➤ Dallas: The city council approved a $1 billion loan for the expansion of its convention center, including plans to create a new arena for the Dallas Wings. () ➤ San Antonio: Officials confirmed Friday that 11 people died in flash flooding Thursday, with several more still missing after storms swept cars off city roads. () ➤ Houston: The state’s largest political donor, Texans for Lawsuit Reform, published an open letter reprimanding the Texas legislature after none of its high-priority bills were passed this session. The group is also threatening to spend against members who opposed their bills. () ➤ Denton County: Police have recovered $636,000 in cash and $1 million in stolen merchandise, arresting two Oak Point residents connected to an organized retail theft ring. () ➤ San Antonio-based USAA is adding 500 jobs in Chesapeake, Virginia, expanding its presence there with a new office set to open by 2026. () Enjoy reading The Texas Flyover?mailto:?cc=editor@thetexasflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0A%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Texas%20Flyover%2C%20and%20I%20think%20you%20would%20like%20it%20a%20lot.%0A%0AIt%20covers%20a%20wide%20range%20of%20Texas%20news%2C%20and%20it%20doesn't%20have%20the%20bias%20that%20most%20media%20coverage%20is%20full%20of.%0A%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0A%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fthetexasflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3DDL%0A%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will! to share with your friends and family. | ➤ The Dallas Mavericks refurbished a basketball court at the Fort Worth Juvenile Detention Center this week, resurfacing the floor, adding new hoops and paint, backed by a $50K Mavs Foundation grant. () ➤**Former Texas A &M football** player Shemar Stewart is still holding out from signing a contract with the Bengals, who drafted him in the first round of the 2025 NFL draft. () ➤ Astros third baseman Isaac Paredes exited Thursday's game early with a left hamstring issue. His timetable for a return is currently uncertain. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Maine Legislature Splits on Gun Control Measures, Advancing Ghost Gun Ban While Rejecting Bump Stock and Other Restrictions
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Maine Legislature Splits on Gun Control Measures, Advancing Ghost Gun Ban While Rejecting Bump Stock and Other Restrictions (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=eb656a0703&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Edward Tomic on Jun 13, 2025 07:25 pm
In a series of votes reflecting Maine’s divided stance on gun control, the Maine Senate this week rejected a bill redefining “machine gun” to ban bump stocks, previously vetoed by Gov. Janet Mills for its broad language, while both chambers advanced a measure requiring serial numbers on firearms and prohibiting undetectable “ghost guns.” Those bills [...]
