name: Elise Stefanik
subject: More evidence that NY is becoming a purple state
body:
Help me keep up the momentum to flip New York in 2026

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
This is a huge development in my home state.****
**[A new poll was recently released showing that a Republican - me - would be just ONE POINT behind Democrat Gov. Kathy Hochul in a hypothetical matchup for Governor of New York!](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
With 15% of voters still undecided, this race is wide open. Let me be blunt, we are closer now to a Republican winning a statewide election in New York than we have been for over 20 years.
We can put a Republican governor in Albany but we need to lay the groundwork right now.
[FLIP NY RED](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, if we can flip the Empire State next year and transform New York into a swing state it would _**completely change our electoral map**_ and _**strengthen our ability to deliver an America First agenda**_ for all Americans.
The transformation of states like Florida and Ohio into MAGA strongholds paved the way for our victory last year. New York is primed to become our nation’s next battleground and winning statewide elections here would solidify our ability to Make America Great Again at the state and federal level for years to come.
[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Decades of Democrat party control have led to the absolute degradation of New York.
New York is the hub of the world economy. It’s where Wall St meets Main St. For centuries it has been where families from across the nation and across the world have come to build the American dream for themselves and future generations.
Yet under the failed leadership of Eliot Spitzer, Andrew Cuomo, and now Kathy Hochul New York has become a cautionary tale.
Their economic policies have _**crushed entrepreneurship and small businesses**_ , their soft-on-crime policies and a refusal to take action on the illegal immigrant crisis have seen** __**_**a rise of violent crime on our streets**_ , and their _**horrific handling of COVID**_ led to thousands of deaths that were covered up by the Cuomo-Hochul administration.
The results are devastating. _**Businesses are shuttering** , **families are fleeing**_ to safer states, _**young people are leaving en masse**_ due to lack of opportunities as well as the rising cost of living, and there has been _**no accountability**_ for the Nursing Home Scandal.********
**[The situation is dire and Kathy Hochul, currently the worst governor in America, has no plan to repair the damage her party has done.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**It has gotten so BAD for the current regime that her own Lieutenant Governor, that she hand picked herself, is now primarying her:**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
It is evident that Hochul has lost support not just from Republicans and Independents, but now Democrats as well.
But changing one Democrat for another with the same failed policies would be like putting a new paint job on a broken down car, it would not solve any of the problems.
**It doesn’t have to be this way and New Yorkers know it. It’s time for a real change.**
[FIRE HOCHUL IN 2026](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Fellow patriot, New York deserves better leadership and the United States deserves to have one of its largest states be governed with competence that will help usher in the next age of American greatness rather than undermine it.
I am committed to continue fighting tirelessly to ensure that we elect leadership that champions freedom, security, and prosperity for every American family, especially my fellow New Yorkers who have been long neglected by the Democrat Party.
From the North Country to the Big Apple we are going to fight for every vote, we just need the resources to keep up the momentum.
**[That’s why I launched the Flip NY Red Fund to FIRE Kathy Hochul and NY Democrats in 2026.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCGe/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****_[Please fill out this brief survey today and make a contribution to my efforts to fight for and deliver Republican leadership to New York](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
**_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCGe/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**If we can save the Empire State, we can save America. I appreciate the support of every patriot who stands with me now in the fight for New York and our nation.
_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aCIl/?__vbtrk=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjk2MDA4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

You have until midnight to take action >>

We’re counting on you,
_The Voter Protection Project_

***** BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE *****
**THE GOOD NEWS:** Gavin Newsom is FIGHTING BACK against Trump’s _ridiculous_ act of _political theater_ in California! ⬇️
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91116?t=9&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx)
**THE BAD NEWS:** _Trump is threatening to ARREST GAVIN NEWSOM!_

[**25,000 DEMOCRATS NEEDED ⚠️ We need EVERY Democrat reading this to take _immediate_ action and sign our letter to STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM. We can’t afford inaction, friend — not when the stakes are this high: Add your name by midnight »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91116?t=10&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx)
[**SIGN MY NAME: STAND WITH GAVIN NEWSOM »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91116?t=11&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx)
---
TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Governor Newsom,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy and the will of the people against Donald Trump’s _extremist political theater_ in California.**

You are bravely risking everything — even arrest — to stand up for the American people, and we’re extremely grateful.

**As Trump resorts to POLITICAL THEATER to threaten and intimidate Americans,_your resilience is needed now more than ever._**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting Trump do whatever he pleases — so I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91116?t=12&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91116?t=13&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx)

**_X A proud Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20203%2E878179%2Ed1Kqyx) to request fewer emails. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: wtf...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey, it’s Jon Ossoff. Before you close this email, I need you to hear this:
The President is wielding the full weight of the federal government against his critics and political opponents.
Meanwhile, he deployed the United States Marines to conduct domestic law enforcement operations in an American city before he hosts a North Korea-style military parade in the capital — on his own birthday.
At the same time, his allies in Congress are trying to kick working families—and even veterans—off Medicaid.
And, of course, Trump’s sycophants are still debasing themselves, praising him like he’s a monarch. Elon Musk is begging Trump for mercy. _WTF?_
But here’s the thing: **I’m the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won, and MAGA is pouring millions into Georgia to take me down.**
So if you are upset with what's happening to our country right now and you're ready to fight back, please chip in what you can to support our team here in Georgia.
I promise you: together, we can win in Georgia. We can save the Republic.
**Here’s a link:** [**https://act.electjon.com/go/donate-now**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250613-1-full&t=1&akid=477%2E5691347%2EFfhNu4)
Thanks so much for your support.
Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=477%2E5691347%2EFfhNu4) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

| | What we’re witnessing in Los Angeles isn’t peaceful protest—it’s outright peril. Streets overrun. Businesses threatened. Police under attack.

This isn’t about free speech. It’s not about peace. It’s about lawlessness—fueled by the Biden-Harris Administration’s open-border policies and far-left radicals who despise everything this country stands for.

_**Order must be restored.**_

And that starts with enforcing immigration laws and by standing firmly with law enforcement.

We must send a clear message: **this will not be tolerated in America.**

clean_body: Order must be restored.| | | | | What we’re witnessing in Los Angeles isn’t peaceful protest—it’s outright peril. Streets overrun. Businesses threatened. Police under attack. This isn’t about free speech. It’s not about peace. It’s about lawlessness—fueled by the Biden-Harris Administration’s open-border policies and far-left radicals who despise everything this country stands for. Order must be restored. And that starts with enforcing immigration laws and by standing firmly with law enforcement. We must send a clear message: this will not be tolerated in America. | | | | Let me be clear: What’s happening in California must end immediately, and we can never allow this kind of chaos to take root in North Carolina or any other state. Together, let’s protect our communities and defend the values that make America safe, strong, and the greatest nation on earth. Thank you, Brad Knott | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Immigration is the defining issue of our time
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/achievingchange-12849234?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend, **Immigration is the most critical issue facing America.** In recent weeks, ICE has been busy. There have been lots of raids and approximately 800 daily arrests of illegal immigrants nationwide. **The administration wants one million deportations this year.**

In Los Angeles, this crackdown triggered protests that turned violent. President Trump has now sent National Guard troops and even a small number of Marines to enforce the law. Leftwing agitators in other cities seem to be gearing up for more protests.
---
|
---
_No way to win an argument_
| **I’m not sure that siding with violent protesters waving foreign flags is going to win the left mainstream support.** Indeed, some of the images from Los Angeles will only alienate middle America. Polls now show 65% support for mass deportations.

As Stephen Miller, Trump’s chief of staff, wryly observed, such protests could boost the President’s approval rating past 60%.

For years, immigration rules have simply not been enforced. As an immigrant to America that came in via a laborious and costly process, it annoys me that other people can come in by simply ignoring the rules - and the authorities turned a blind eye.

It is vital that Trump wins the fight to be able to remove those that come into America illegally.

**If you don’t have borders, you won’t have a country.** Don’t just take my word for it. Look at what is happening on the other side of the Atlantic. Today, only around a third of school children in London are English. Sweden is projected to be 30 percent Muslim by 2050. Austria and Germany 20 percent and Britain almost 18 percent.

**Today not a single nation in the Western hemisphere has a total fertility rate above replacement level – not even Haiti.** Birth rates everywhere from Mexico to Chile have nosedived.

**What this means is that if America fails to control her borders and remove those that come here illegally, you may not get the immigration you think you’re going to get.** You could end up with a very different sort of America.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=392d6bdb11&e=5703353baa)
---
_Ayaan Hirsi Ali_
| Writing for Ayaan Hirsi Ali recently, [which can be found here,](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=01f656d435&e=5703353baa) I noted that many American Muslims are highly educated and well-integrated. But I also looked at Europe’s less happy experience; Forty three percent of British Muslims want Sharia law. **More British Muslims fought for ISIS than currently serve in the British army. **

What if the melting pot won’t melt? What if cultural convergence becomes cultural divergence? America needs an immigration policy that works for America’s long term interests and is enforced accordingly.

**I fear that unless Trump wins this fight, no one is going to bother enforcing immigration law again. If that happens, the consequences would be catastrophic. **

Have an awesome weekend.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e84489a593&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=cdbd7b08ec) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=cdbd7b08ec).

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45f921b0-146b-4164-9373-d688e3065cea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For many business leaders, the cross currents of a global trade war, military conflict in the Middle East, shifting geopolitical pressures, and disruption from new technologies have created a paralyzing level of uncertainty. Does it make sense to invest when artificial intelligence may replace your entire industry? What if tariffs create chaos in your supply chain? **For many, the obvious course of action is, well, no action at all.**
As a generalist with a contrarian bent, I've decided instead to look at the big picture, connect the dots across different trends, and come up with a probabilistic assessment of how the future may unfold for the pizza industry. It's led me to a different course: I'm proactively investing amidst today's uncertainty as I see a bright future ahead.
* * *
## [Practicing What I Preach](https://substack.com/redirect/d974c9b9-594f-451f-9a45-b8c3d8534791?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 17
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d974c9b9-594f-451f-9a45-b8c3d8534791?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[For years, I've suggested that the best way to navigate uncertainty is to integrate thinking by crossing silos and connecting dots. I've often described this method as the "generalist approach" becau...](https://substack.com/redirect/d974c9b9-594f-451f-9a45-b8c3d8534791?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/d974c9b9-594f-451f-9a45-b8c3d8534791?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
As I've written before, demand for frozen pizza (and specifically private label frozen pizza) tends to grow during times of economic uncertainty as consumers opt to forgo dining out and focus on lower-priced, cook-at-home options. Further, the increasing use of obesity-targeting treatments such as Ozempic are leading to a shift in consumer preferences towards individual portion sizes. And lastly, the rapidly growing pressure to remove chemical preservatives and artificial ingredients from our food means consumers are interested in foods made with natural ingredients. These trends pointed to an opportunity for Goodwell Foods to grow by investing despite today's economic, geopolitical, and technological uncertainty.
Growing a plant's potential output in a constrained space is not an easy task and generally involves an evaluation of bottlenecks that are holding production down. And when I evaluated the limiting factors that were impeding productivity, one element of our production process stood out like a sore thumb--heat. Why's that? Because when a pizza crust comes out of our oven, it's hot. Really hot. That's not a problem at a restaurant or pizza shop, but it is for a frozen pizza manufacturer. And the burden that heat put on our freezer required us to slow our production speed to match the freezer's ability to freeze. And if our pizzas are not frozen entirely, we can't package, box or ship them out to customers.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dVd83yV0L7MGofkG9VPBI0GWXWfZAsdohTg-W-nk41k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165886715)
While New Hampshire winters are sufficiently cold to make our freezer unnecessary on many days, the summers are a different story. Our plant's capacity drops in the summer as we must slow our line speed to ensure the freezer can keep up with the flow of pizzas.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e82f823e-e28c-4de8-8a13-25df662f3b2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Delivery of the tank that will hold liquid nitrogen to cool our pizzas at the Goodwell factory in Pittsfield, NH.
This means that our ability to produce frozen pizzas is directly tied to our ability to freeze them. The solution: break the bottleneck by reducing heat to unlock greater potential output. That's exactly what our new equipment will do. We are installing a nitrogen tunnel made by [Linde](https://substack.com/redirect/2c347db5-4589-45ea-8798-036a64cbdff5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the world's leading industrial gas company, that will efficiently cool our crusts as they exit the oven. By rapidly removing heat from our products and allowing them to freeze more quickly, the liquid nitrogen we spray on the pizzas will make our pizzas taste better, have longer shelf life, and maintain a "fresh baked" texture when cooked.
_**This means that our ability to produce frozen pizzas is directly tied to our ability to freeze them. The solution: break the bottleneck by reducing heat to unlock greater potential output.**_
While it's impossible to know the future, my decision to invest was based on a probabilistic analysis of several scenarios using multiple lenses. My economic analysis suggested that frozen pizza should do well in both hot (inflation) and cold (recession) environments. And while the "Ozempic Factor" may ultimately prove fleeting, there were other trends (marriage rates, birth rates, etc.) supporting smaller or individual portion sizes. And while it's possible consumers may be willing to knowingly consume chemical preservatives in their food, I'm willing to bet they aren't.
* * *
## [Ready, Fire, Aim!](https://substack.com/redirect/25b5d176-68d9-4f25-a24e-4393a229564b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *

| May 18
[](https://substack.com/redirect/25b5d176-68d9-4f25-a24e-4393a229564b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[I recently started a frozen pizza manufacturer in New Hampshire. When I launched the company by purchasing the distressed assets of a company that had recently failed, the new business had to go fro...](https://substack.com/redirect/25b5d176-68d9-4f25-a24e-4393a229564b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/25b5d176-68d9-4f25-a24e-4393a229564b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Navigating uncertainty isn't about finding an answer _per se_ , it's about making prudent bets. And while it's certain that some bets will end up being losers, that doesn't mean leaders should allow uncertainty to paralyze them. As I've recently written, sometimes it's best to act and adjust, rather than analyze and be paralyzed. So, when trying to navigate the rampant cross currents of today's uncertain world, try connecting dots, analyzing trends, and then making the best decision you can.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/58a119a0-04e6-4cbe-bb89-947c8fd0d627?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/026c12b2-bb92-4bc3-8a43-7ee734acb2a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/3e92b46f-294c-40ed-8d80-99014c6f1ac0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

name: Shontel Brown
subject: re: The housing crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Across Ohio and the nation, I often hear the same thing...

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109563213/551520715/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_25014housing_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTY1Njg4Mi0xZjQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCAyGPw6wk6dtcMVA7kq6u3Yq9OxAe7IoPXKdhCLisY=) Peter,

Across Ohio and the nation, I often hear the same thing – that housing costs are too high and things are only getting worse. That is why I am fighting in Congress to address our nation’s worsening housing crisis and ensure that our families are not priced out of stability.

Between rising housing costs and Trump’s tariffs, it’s getting harder and harder to live – from finding a place to live, paying the bills, and keeping our families safe. This crisis is hitting families in every corner of the country, and it’s widening the wealth and racial gaps we’ve been trying to close for generations. We need real action and we need it now.

While Trump is spending upwards of $45 million to fund his birthday parade in Washington this weekend, it is estimated that over 12 million Americans spend over 50% of their income on rent, often sacrificing food, healthcare, and transportation as a result. Since 2020, rents have increased by over 35%, and there is currently a shortage of over 7 million affordable homes for low-income renters. Enough is enough.

While Republicans are busy slashing jobs and life-saving federal programs, from SNAP to Medicare and more, I am committed to working to develop a comprehensive federal strategy to address our housing crisis and move our nation forward.

[**Help support me as I work to hold Republicans accountable, reclaim the House, and protect the American people by pitching in $5 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109563217/551520719/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_25014housing_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTY1Njg4Mi0xZjQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCAyGPw6wk6dtcMVA7kq6u3Yq9OxAe7IoPXKdhCLisY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109563219/551520727/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_25014housing_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTY1Njg4Mi0xZjQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sCAyGPw6wk6dtcMVA7kq6u3Yq9OxAe7IoPXKdhCLisY=)******

In solidarity,

Shontel Brown
Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

subject: CORRUPT JUDGE SAVES DEI—Help me Expose Him!
body:
In my latest bombshell report, I uncovered how Biden's handpicked judge, Myong J. Joun, blocked President Trump's order to dismantle the Department of Education and end its radical DEI agenda.
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w)** to be removed.
* * *
---
| [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w) [****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w) Dear Patriot,

You've stood with me through thick and thin, and I'm beyond grateful for your support.

It's because of patriots like you that I've been able to expose the corruption rotting our nation from the inside.

**But right now,[**I 'm up against a wall--bills are piling up**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w)**[**,**and the swamp is fighting harder than ever to shut me down****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w)**.**

In my latest bombshell report, **I uncovered how Biden 's handpicked judge, Myong J. Joun, blocked President Trump's order to dismantle the Department of Education** and end its radical DEI agenda.

[** This isn't just a ruling--it's a deep state power grab. **](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w)

Joun's wife and transgender son rake in cash from a DEI consulting firm that thrives on woke contracts.

Coincidence? Hardly.

This is a family hustle dressed up as justice, **and it 's sabotaging Trump's America First mission**.

Trump's order was a lifeline--shutting down a bloated agency pushing indoctrination on our kids.

Joun's ruling didn't just save it; it brought back 1,300 fired bureaucrats to keep the machine humming.

Meanwhile, my investigation into this JUDICIAL COUP is hitting roadblocks--travel costs, research, and basic survival expenses are crushing me. I'm not backing down, [**but I can 't do this alone**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w).

[**Your donation today keeps me in the fight.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w)

I'm traveling the country to confront this scandal head-on, [**but without you, I 'm grounded**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w). [**Every dollar you give is a middle finger to the corrupt elite trying to silence us and corrupt the judiciary**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w). My bills are real, and so is this battle--[**help me win it**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w).

[**Please Donate Now.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/e84Ze2NR3nP2NBzaUFwuZQ/CblWigENLz7s5NM8G763d89w)

Thank you for having my back. **Let 's bury this DEI racket together.**

With Vigilance, Laura Loomer

Fellow activist,

During these unprecedented times, our nation is navigating a new reality that we have never before encountered. From voting rights being stripped away and attempts to politicize our courts to attacks on immigrant communities, climate responsibility, social safety net programs, and much more. **NOW is the TIME to invest in our work to engage voters year-round – it has never been more important. **

Here’s the thing: **Across the ecosystem, funding is scarce.** It is harder to raise funds during odd-year elections, but they are just as important, especially for Pennsylvania in 2025. Unfortunately, judicial elections are overlooked by the electorate in the Commonwealth and low turnout in judicial election years can be credited to low information/civic education around the elections, the judicial candidates and the roles judges play in defending democracy in general. In order to change that, **we must INVEST in year-round civic education and engagement. **

**More than ever before, we are depending on the power of individual grassroots donations to fuel our organization. That is why we are reaching out today. **

We need your help not only to maintain our current level of operations but also to ramp up as we prepare for the crucial Supreme Court retention elections and other judicial, local and municipal elections in Pennsylvania.

[**Thanks to a generous angel donor, all donations up to $50,000 will be DOUBLED, but we only have a few weeks left to take advantage of this opportunity. Will you help support our voter education and mobilization work by rushing $25 or whatever you can now and have 2X the impact?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR67livi31XsHsJ7vk8K7EbN9LgA5jnZIKAc4h6ycj47iN4VoGEQIEcUFVLgTQ7QK7FsKLFhI-2Bk2v4onu1YCWVSD2rrO7eJlU-2FDrd3P9ZOP1hr34s_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYiP8BrulCgsgO0ghVeNLs-2Fiu96FsImG1BBZEvS87yz0LJuT1ApPN3SCV2vjojPFxoD9r-2BurT-2B1-2B3S5ZlmQj6dmD2-2FDv1tVhM3z0-2BQYy32dal8vh77crya0cqxUY0s4WBpvbH2Kp35XPK68L-2BHslZhVSPGusqg4uRwzlB1DCkPEaKf4kY2OmL-2B7BK2r8i3zEqx)

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, During these unprecedented times, our nation is navigating a new reality that we have never before encountered. From voting rights being stripped away and attempts to politicize our courts to attacks on immigrant communities, climate responsibility, social safety net programs, and much more. NOW is the TIME to invest in our work to engage voters year-round – it has never been more important. Here’s the thing: Across the ecosystem, funding is scarce. It is harder to raise funds during odd-year elections, but they are just as important, especially for Pennsylvania in 2025. Unfortunately, judicial elections are overlooked by the electorate in the Commonwealth and low turnout in judicial election years can be credited to low information/civic education around the elections, the judicial candidates and the roles judges play in defending democracy in general. In order to change that, we must INVEST in year-round civic education and engagement. More than ever before, we are depending on the power of individual grassroots donations to fuel our organization. That is why we are reaching out today. We need your help not only to maintain our current level of operations but also to ramp up as we prepare for the crucial Supreme Court retention elections and other judicial, local and municipal elections in Pennsylvania. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Our work doesn’t stop after a presidential race – we are still out in our communities working to build community power, increase voter turnout, especially in odd-year elections, and expand the electorate. Together, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: My take on what the polls tell us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Team, in the span of one day, two outlets released polls of the Virginia Governor's race.
| | |
---
Team, in the span of one day, two outlets released polls of the Virginia Governor's race.
The first had me running way ahead of my opponent. _The second had us neck-and-neck._
Now, what these polls tell us is that there are a lot of undecided voters out there, and the campaign that's able to raise the money necessary to reach these folks will win. We just launched our first TV and digital ads, and your support will help us keep those ads running.
_So, I'm asking you directly:_
**[Will you split a contribution of any amount between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline? name: Trump Alerts (Team Elise)
subject: Sign President Trump’s birthday card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
For a special birthday gift...
| Friend,
---
No one in recent memory has done more for our country than President Trump.
---
**He’s selflessly put America before himself, enduring vicious attacks, witch hunts, and even sham prosecutions intended to JAIL him for LIFE – all so he could take on the Deep State and fight on YOUR behalf.**
---
With his birthday coming up, I want to get him a very special gift...
---
**A birthday card signed by millions of grassroots conservatives like YOU who love and appreciate everything he’s doing for our country.**
---
_There’s no gift that would mean more to him than your support, Friend!_

body:
They take silver, you get stuck with the bill
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a4d9f2c310a540669c3e2d2bc0557a2f&_e=A4dmUKqZb4hj1R3Wm7EAxye-pwDIbK4C0bx57NGJiHjo4_4mUIvrmMhsCM9ZurVc-_PiVRGtYPtMJl_Ur1tk4_4mY_ZDqDDJI7x-Bm9NDHENPr9GdU5nY1bkc20BU5Kujojb62FCyFNdimzuYYO_8KtTgMnhTka3SmP4Y1Qenygiq7GtFRZsPgUs45kVD0ZtDOmCg1WyKyVJGWJhctVXASHw9zvkKy95BTMie6Zi9OptAli5xu41m3fWgl-X7x_lrp0qXN4fnP9ewFMN66ZtfFb1uBe8d02VdIKw5PjCbxgaqgP4yhbePNIHzwPlmRJXqspkeYg6leTiB2k4uXhLnqFTg0icrxUkWxXL7U-yuCwaDmsH5hqBp8uXfFnCjBjY22JrW9NBf-36GVflWE29DiNWUPs-xNy-hQogsm7hOzbPvlH75ocuxfxvf8zagGrv8Z1gLKPkjn_xHNygxeVFCUTJ4rgSyW9-geoAMla03abVprrH642l_MJcscfnWz3NB8JiiBtzZN9NEAXegt3JSsJ3w_GpIBCa-mgaFQKS1JWRVQFfD0oWcgXtoI95ICkS)
---
Peter,

$250 million meant for hungry kids--gone.

And guess who took campaign donations from the crooks?

**Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison.**

The man tasked with enforcing justice is cashing checks from people tied to one of the largest frauds in state history.

| [ **SEND CORRUPTION PACKING** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a4d9f2c310a540669c3e2d2bc0557a2f&_e=A4dmUKqZb4hj1R3Wm7EAxye-pwDIbK4C0bx57NGJiHjo4_4mUIvrmMhsCM9ZurVc-_PiVRGtYPtMJl_Ur1tk4_4mY_ZDqDDJI7x-Bm9NDHENPr9GdU5nY1bkc20BU5Kujojb62FCyFNdimzuYYO_8KtTgMnhTka3SmP4Y1Qenygiq7GtFRZsPgUs45kVD0ZtZl9WO6xAZtL66mx_pxvl3svVptBgmCjIFOaEz8BETXdFqR0ZMSKAASm2akf3FJ_mzJeincWqQVbgpe_Y4objq-ofhoYDFSMyOXw8jZUGJn_oYOkAXkJ48FIMBKcMnmCbaRaDBfF1BUi_BixKhV0KjdcPQn00H7uHpriba3kdYv87yLFQ173xEs5XY4RS7DeAACnfrpp2b26wBuVDa5MMlemveyWs7C6SwPFMTfoHC-JupojwNdCXg2EJ5q4oL9JFpA5YqV1jeBqc5hwHDwrqTmUWI80wGqsTBhrI_ycUy0gnRKzNQeS0l-ayiADay43M9S7pdap13kPQxaoRQgERv-9NuIPrqc53KGWyyruMz5GjcMhCmbLbw7o2qXd24Kcw)
---

_They steal from children.

They lie to the people.

And they expect to walk away clean while you foot the bill._

**Not on my watch.**

This is what I'm running to stop.

The entire system is rotted. It's not just Democrats--it's career politicians from both sides who've sold out to globalists, lobbyists, and fraudsters.

[ **Stand With a Black Republican Who Won’t Take Their Money** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=a4d9f2c310a540669c3e2d2bc0557a2f&_e=A4dmUKqZb4hj1R3Wm7EAxye-pwDIbK4C0bx57NGJiHjo4_4mUIvrmMhsCM9ZurVc-_PiVRGtYPtMJl_Ur1tk4_4mY_ZDqDDJI7x-Bm9NDHENPr9GdU5nY1bkc20BU5Kujojb62FCyFNdimzuYYO_8KtTgMnhTka3SmP4Y1Qenygiq7GtFRZsPgUs45kVD0ZtqSiN4jZIZcArMSXtuqe365_uZg_KKfVX9AWM5Tp030prRaS8K3-3zxhL3bak7Ui-pN0HsSBHaMSoxcJUhfH39SotO9Qc29pp0RfU9terHDAX2Oyoa3wggSqUuZ_hWKL3PO84Srvi1W9CsUf5MYykXtsFWz0mYr-zT_IRWvioHQ4vJ_mLqU2WNnjm19dWKwe8AjhVCk5ZQNDK0tOU107g4doB2DQ8fHyirf2kc-cAVczRygxUmwP9fIqf82_zddttf3oJaQTn5QE4VejCehBHk7DxK7MMKia-LVGL30Et7xy4M38WqV6RCewTC7sfCfqykohJRemg00eJwf15zPXm885XtTrkOLUS1ivDpf-wunvOVYRimWadV17pa-09_WO0)
---

When I say I'm unbought, I mean it.

When I say I'll call out the swamp, I'll name names.

This isn't just about politics--it's about moral decay. If we don't stop them now, they'll keep feeding off your work, your tax dollars, your citizenship.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

Hi Peter,

Last week, the Trump administration announced it was rescinding Biden-era federal guidance that required ALL emergency rooms across America to provide an abortion if the procedure would save a patient’s life; a policy meant to protect women in abortion ban states from the worst outcomes.

**_We are sounding the alarm._ The states with impending abortion bans (like Virginia) have elections coming up – and we have an opportunity to ensure pro-choice majorities will prevail.**

There is **_less than 1 week_ between now and Virginia’s primary elections,** and **Kimberly Pope Adams** is on track to flip a seat in Virginia's House of Delegates from red to blue (anti-choice to pro-choice)!
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109572053/551544669/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250614kimberly_N_CD_NO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NjM2ZWFlLTIzNDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZGpojsRLqYMNBIF1jt2dYAK4RIqMXWIh3knVm5ab8qk=)
---
**_Why are we so focused on Virginia?_ Virginia is the only remaining safe haven for abortion access in the South,** and **Kimberly is gearing up to unseat the strictly anti-choice incumbent Republican in her district.** As the Trump administration has openly expressed its desire to roll back women’s rights to safety and bodily autonomy, we will be looking to state governments to defend us – we need more pro-choice, pro-women women in the rooms where laws are being passed.

Kimberly ran for this seat last cycle – and only fell 53 votes short of winning. Now, she is gearing up for a rematch against the same ineffective and out-of-touch opponent she ran against last cycle.

[**You can make sure Kimberly Pope Adams has the resources she’ll need to finally flip this seat and oust an anti-choice politician from Virginia’s government by rushing a split $20.25 or more contribution today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109572060/551544678/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250614kimberly_N_CD_NO_9_G_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NjM2ZWFlLTIzNDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZGpojsRLqYMNBIF1jt2dYAK4RIqMXWIh3knVm5ab8qk=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Her Bold Move and Kimberly Pope Adams:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109572063/551544683/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250614kimberly_N_CD_NO_9_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NjM2ZWFlLTIzNDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZGpojsRLqYMNBIF1jt2dYAK4RIqMXWIh3knVm5ab8qk=)

---
**Kimberly’s opponent, Del. Kim Taylor is vocally anti-choice.** Her family is affiliated with Crisis Pregnancy Centers, which are fake clinics aimed at misleading pregnant women about their healthcare options. She has also sponsored a bill that would apply _**criminal penalties**_ for abortion services.

**There are 51 Democrats in the House of Delegates – and 49 Republicans.** When so much is on the line, we can’t afford to take a single race for granted. We must hold onto the *extremely slim* pro-choice majority in Virginia’s state government. **Kimberly’s opponent has already voted NO on the amendment that would protect abortion access in the state.** We need your help to flip this seat before the next vote.

[**After an incredibly close race as a first-time candidate in 2023, this is our chance to finally get Kimberly Pope Adams over the finish line. You can make a real difference for the millions of women who depend on Virginia for full reproductive healthcare access by making a split contribution of $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109572079/551544726/-1988907419?refcode=EM_F_250614kimberly_N_CD_NO_9_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NjM2ZWFlLTIzNDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ZGpojsRLqYMNBIF1jt2dYAK4RIqMXWIh3knVm5ab8qk=)

Thank you,

Colleen Davis
Endorsements Manager
Her Bold Move

| | | Peter - We can't afford to lose your support!

**I 've come to truly appreciate your support. I know everything you've given to get us to where we are today. **

But you know just as well as I do how quickly things can change.

I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later that, as of today, your **House GOP Membership**** ** has YET to be renewed.

While I value having a member like you on our team, I also know that losing critical members at a time like this could bring everything we've accomplished so far to a standstill.

_I 'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to renew today. _

clean_body: We can’t lose a supporter like you. &2nbsp; | | | | Peter - We can't afford to lose your support! I 've come to truly appreciate your support. I know everything you've given to get us to where we are today. But you know just as well as I do how quickly things can change. I wanted to inform you sooner rather than later that, as of today, your House GOP Membership has YET to be renewed. While I value having a member like you on our team, I also know that losing critical members at a time like this could bring everything we've accomplished so far to a standstill. I 'm not at all worried about your continued commitment. The last thing I would ever do is question your loyalty. But I'd hate for you to miss out on your chance to renew today. "You can renew in just a few clicks by going to this renewal link!>>" | | | "RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP" | "I hope we’ll have your name back at the top of our list soon!" I appreciate your support. Just know I'm only asking because you are someone I truly value. In the end, this membership is one of the most important things you can do for our movement. I look forward to hearing back from you. God bless, Speaker Mike Johnson | | | "RENEW MY MEMBERSHIP" | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. clean_body: It's Donald Trump's 79th birthday today, and you know what would make an amazing gift? Raising 79 OH grassroots donations to flip the Senate BLUE and take away his GOP trifecta in the midterms. = Here’s what we’re up against: The GOP holds a narrow majority in the House. They hold a stronger majority in the Senate. And to say Trump is abusing his power as president is an understatement. Now, recent reports say Trump is gearing up to use his $600 million war chest to defeat Democrats in the midterms: = This could spell disaster for Democrats if we don’t start strategizing, organizing and fundraising for the midterms now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = This will make Trump’s day! 🎉 — Team Gillibrand * =

Fellow Republican, I’m Lana Keesling, Chairwoman of the Indiana Republican Party. Every year, I am reminded of why our work matters so deeply, not just in an election year, but every day we fight to defend the values that make Indiana strong.

The Indiana GOP is the **last line of defense against the Radical Left,** who are determined to bring big-government overreach, open borders, and sky-high taxes to our great state. We stand for something different:

_✅ Fiscal responsibility_
_✅ Border security_
_✅ Conservative Hoosier values_
_✅ Law and order_
_✅ Real leadership—like**President Donald Trump** and **Governor Mike Braun**_

But we cannot do this alone. Our success depends on grassroots __supporters like YOU.__
If you believe in the mission of the Indiana Republican Party, I am asking you to [_**chip in today.**_](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/8mANHlZ2jo5e2pglF9mkXAU_0A_wLTH5ez7AMy6DQCvEdMUNvkHHg5YeXoA-jAlTIqmTkBVriH-ivJX8LFtx9-NxJskPr4py5TTNNzTKha-d8Qumuz2Aqb3fogIafpR6hHN88_VLSkzZGD9IGgf8IHDrykONXCcQQozcWc5jvDDQIIzGDqbs808GYwBooIT0f-uzYChxyTFjRxCR2XWmKxXTQPkaJr__AfFLyD2LU5oyAY-Gkxi1Cy3B3q4buXyHdhTGLm8mgJuXogkTr9KcelO2j0VI1bnGj8u5WV0hYZfrDcpP5SPCUMBeznLPTkMlMJ1DNaFtkwRYyrBTvpQcmMVGbcZokbscdkxBn_q_fQkqbVOzt2LTUTOAqq_owfrGukalSzUejpmcOozryi6weK7LpUEPqMxqPtDZMxWvRmqlE2nsP5j_vUh_RUOhpv_gp4jiu-X5jmjDIfScIlMh45plpu5gAnvqekabEiJHRsjmC7hMgFrJ89vp9ICb9FWRpDpRqOhD5x4rQEj9ZMr7SQyVA8iGcItB98OrdVnaOj1SxpGIxWGZZlSfTlBGZv-BMzct-VR7CxBIz2I2EPSPAMxc1WIP1Y8wXTKbItjacw/sWIl5uRc7vEEH280S-bXF8hV3fZknv7f/9) Even [_**$10**_](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/Bwzvi31GRX_oA8wBiFbNd46hGuEYCGSYsNmmcdZYW1olPjNVU97-7WpbWdMveQWY5pFVsIwn1_TV4fcvsaKidNVk0C5u31PnQjZbgFIcb58DZnpxqeTxTtFY_Qi-AMEOvzLMurtW-wB8VLE0MOKiW_WVmr_JaWBNrlM19z78FeNjTTv3A2mCI2tx-CapIgS8y-FP2RFsY37QCby8httjcq_bMHcEcs47EOUIOUI2CbbqmLtGtp3QI_46xhOqXMmk4yjHcxevpSo2v1aRd38sHuCn9MvJXgaXcoEUNefM91svn8S9hvQ8HClwx0O2sgZMsJ_0wTmw0E1_IBS1UCmo2gHXEyn5NX8is77p3k4jE5ds_ukgLY7rRqM93HCR3hm2ue7l7rhvPuVM2VvPKz2_wUQMZNJxuyp9C4gNtk0wsIRQrDgdPGRnkM_BjzyyK1iM1S29WlEq_yO9mZVppuLpwb0N9tn4C1hEXeWbBazMA2JD4jy9nhrCZ-cSJGRlFWY4R79S58QPDkrz4HKlHKDlNvP2Cv6W4CLOAvhj4HwGaBjXI24gNjDmFi37CJmsc3eoCmpaGMBfQ9VqeAz5MFlAXsS98QxXLGlVmLCJQ3o7Rq3dAO_FOJ9xCgUDWq-KpOfDS_HL13N2GQ/tnot6zC6aBEehjzrfljbR6a_VGFPGuRA/9) makes a difference as we prepare to turn out Republican voters and WIN up and down the ballot in election years.

name: Mass Mobilization Alert via Care in Action
subject: Join us Saturday. 1,600 events. 250,000 people.
body:
We are sick and tired of the people abusing their power!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109575356/551553757/664783965?utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-no-kings-day-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGEyZDdlMy0yNzQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJ2x6fRYv9ehL5fhzY9CSm5NXQWHom0KcxAGRFYFxd4=&emci=c9665b12-f346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7da2d7e3-2749-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)
This week, Americans were courageously exercising their rights to protect their neighbors from cruel immigration enforcement — and were met with militarized force.
These were working people, parents, union leaders like David Huerta — community members standing up for hard working families being torn apart by raids, for communities being destabilized, for coworkers disappearing from job sites.
This is not just happening on our streets — it’s unfolding behind closed doors in Congress, where lawmakers are plotting to pour billions into detention and deportation programs by stripping Medicaid from millions, in the cruel reconciliation bill.
**Peter, we are sick and tired of the people abusing their power! And we refuse to stay silent.**
TODAY, a quarter of a million people are participating in the No Kings mobilization — to say no to cruelty in our communities, raids on our families, and attacks on our healthcare.
[**There are over 1,600 No Kings events in every corner of the country. Find an event near you and join hundreds of thousands this Saturday, June 14.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109575359/551553760/-1463457584?SQF_SOURCE=careinaction&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-no-kings-day-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGEyZDdlMy0yNzQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJ2x6fRYv9ehL5fhzY9CSm5NXQWHom0KcxAGRFYFxd4=&emci=c9665b12-f346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7da2d7e3-2749-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)

**We know how important it is to show up when our neighbors are hurting — and right now, the pain is spreading rapidly across our communities.**
Standing shoulder to shoulder, we can galvanize public opinion to disrupt the frightening potential use of the military against peaceful protestors, the attempts to strip Medicaid from millions, and the increased immigration enforcement creating fear and instability in our communities.
We must show decision-makers loud and clear that care workers, domestic workers, and working families refuse to be targets—that we demand respect, dignity, healthcare access, and genuine safety.
**That's why we're joining almost a quarter of a million people nationwide this Saturday for the No Kings mass mobilization.** [**Will you pledge to attend and speak up — for our rights, our safety, and the dignity of every domestic worker and immigrant family?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109575367/551553768/-1463457584?SQF_SOURCE=careinaction&utm_campaign=cia_pp&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cs&ms=june-2025-no-kings-day-kicker&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGEyZDdlMy0yNzQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XJ2x6fRYv9ehL5fhzY9CSm5NXQWHom0KcxAGRFYFxd4=&emci=c9665b12-f346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7da2d7e3-2749-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=864787)

clean_body: We are sick and tired of the people abusing their power! This week, Americans were courageously exercising their rights to protect their neighbors from cruel immigration enforcement — and were met with militarized force. These were working people, parents, union leaders like David Huerta — community members standing up for hard working families being torn apart by raids, for communities being destabilized, for coworkers disappearing from job sites. This is not just happening on our streets — it’s unfolding behind closed doors in Congress, where lawmakers are plotting to pour billions into detention and deportation programs by stripping Medicaid from millions, in the cruel reconciliation bill. Peter, we are sick and tired of the people abusing their power! And we refuse to stay silent. TODAY, a quarter of a million people are participating in the No Kings mobilization — to say no to cruelty in our communities, raids on our families, and attacks on our healthcare. We know how important it is to show up when our neighbors are hurting — and right now, the pain is spreading rapidly across our communities. Standing shoulder to shoulder, we can galvanize public opinion to disrupt the frightening potential use of the military against peaceful protestors, the attempts to strip Medicaid from millions, and the increased immigration enforcement creating fear and instability in our communities. We must show decision-makers loud and clear that care workers, domestic workers, and working families refuse to be targets—that we demand respect, dignity, healthcare access, and genuine safety. That's why we're joining almost a quarter of a million people nationwide this Saturday for the No Kings mass mobilization. Thanks for all you do, The Care in Action Team

name: Team Bell
subject: Trump’s budget would gut St. Louis.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Let's be clear about what's happening right now: Let’s talk about what’s happening right now, Peter: Donald Trump and his allies just dropped a budget proposal that reads like a wish list for billionaires — **and a gut punch to working families.**

They want to slash funding for public schools, cut essential programs like Medicaid and SNAP, attack Social Security and Medicare, and hand out even more tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy and big corporations.

**This isn’t just politics. It’s personal. In St. Louis, families are already stretching every dollar.**

Seniors shouldn’t have to choose between medicine and groceries. Our kids in North County deserve fully funded classrooms, not more budget cuts. And we need real investments in safer streets and affordable housing — _not another round of giveaways for the top 1%._

Wesley has spent his career — _and his time in Congress_ — standing up for justice, fighting for working families, and making sure our communities aren’t left behind. With Trump’s reckless agenda threatening our future, this fight is more critical than ever. But Wesley can’t go it alone.

That’s why today, we’re asking you to make a small donation of 3 dollars to help Democrats RECLAIM the House so we can finally stop Trump’s chaos for good. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2025]

subject: Internal Campaign memo for dpwillis67@gmail.com
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
For your internal use only, DO NOT share. |

**// SENATE BATTLEGROUND CAMPAIGN MEMO [FOR INTERNAL USE ONLY]**

**TO** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
**FROM** : Jason Thielman, Campaign Chairman
**DATE** : June 13, 2025
**SUBJECT** : Defending Montana’s Battleground Senate Seat
* * *

**Senate Battleground Campaign Memo**

The Election to defend Montana’s battleground Republican Senate seat is over a year away. To keep this seat in Republican hands we need to start raising the money and building the campaign infrastructure needed to win right now.

Democrats in Montana spent $90 million in 2024’s extremely close election. Democrat spending on TV and online advertising alone drove ad rates to record highs. They’re already training staff, testing their messaging, and raising money for 2026.

What does that mean for Senator Daines’ re-election campaign? The number one priority right now is for Senator Daines to hit every fundraising objective going forward to match whatever the Democrats raise and lay the foundation for one of the most expensive races in the country.

[Your donation ahead of Sunday's final mid-month deadline of our second fundraising quarter of the election will allow our campaign to:](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=def6ea8517c641b5a9d1d0a5d0cdb54d&_e=t8xKVE2fhqoFNAmfx5PKCpc4hjkOty1TtntQOpgZF0O53dNHJYhJdUxHXxJ7p7q5Vz6uRuE3FCMCtFmf6SmlfBQ-anXlxov__ZjaSG48gMOK5uqlV7hVrOg8x7ae4vwrTrJ5BNofwflGr2LzkBJP8PMcJ5ToagzLKljKt4X15SEVy1L7VmvJS6J8TSfw_JUHTdjO1ivTeZtSPeDLvn2xfyEmxXd6O5oT-UOgdtWvPOd-Vkx6TxEZ5EiM4DmM4RuBiUw2t_HPxw7N2Q40iOcCWCZZTO6I_qT4JrxPSLq0pw22GkBmksadUvhQlfUW4GczZU79bsBxN-NGNqIjwEtThlbP3S5JynfO33bb-1MKO6CZTt5rjMB_Bo2fV5QmmhZX_W1lwCLWAPC5JU4y_NqyYT4-pYap11zzBpRBgc8xygU%3D)
1. Hire the best campaign staff in the Country to turn out Republican and Independent voters who support President Trump and his plan to Save America.
2. Plan and coordinate a comprehensive digital and TV advertising campaign that will get Sen. Daines’ winning message to every voter in Montana.

Every political expert in the country agrees -- Montana will be a battleground race in 2026 and critical to defending our Republican Majority. That’s why Democrats will shatter fundraising records to buy this seat. We have a lot of work to do if we’re going to match the Democrats dollar-for-dollar in this race.

subject: 🚨 TODAY: Trump’s military parade marches as Marines crack down in L.A.
body:
It’s happening right now.
⚠️ Marines are patrolling the streets of Los Angeles.
⚠️The National Guard is rounding up peaceful protesters.
⚠️ A sitting U.S. Senator — Alex Padilla — was handcuffed and detained.
⚠️ Governor Newsom is being threatened with arrest for opposing Trump.
And today — TODAY — Donald Trump is celebrating it all with a military parade for his birthday.

name: Cynthia Lummis & John Barrasso
subject: President Trump’s birthday...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lummis for Wyoming
body:
Let's show President Trump just how much we appreciate his leadership and dedication to keeping Wyoming - and America - strong and prosperous | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0d3a7ac33bff48eea0729cb4c3864ab4&_e=n_HLJTKrbJv_RzWMguUniLvWflxXdMC4DqCwG61Mt8e1GXoDHgMt2i2Vxphqzy3HeFSiwfMuV514iOdcAF6qk6Mf94HPprWFVvd6yg12KAW1KzrFcZj-g6Q1tfCQJDT5cc2JnwG0tMfQcaf2Nh5wLqHHTo_85IxKXLde6ApapL12uNQxXRhghtVajfb_7i5iPGmUDcZDD8--3mc-XqX2Bix0s4w0eHEG2l4DkL9l8Rt7rOmF1Zc7NG3Nm4P1GE68KpiaNo4PhLlHpbMqSaFZ0v1fUwdF742aJMecRoIc2m0xGsxvMlb3lgYcwS3c2Fs1YtGwxB2onBUqGZOWanzAAKHO39tR__jSJVH871ny1EYwBIp-KOSxzizlmQQtc48zOgTjL8uM1alRr4FQZB_COwq_EQN3OQiroOnj-U827T6GtrW5b3BXvwbkWk-Wla0pC7DYSTuUjXX4RNtvPNatl8aajPE9QXYQflEcueY8WApAchSvw9c5MRTh3vYMgpeuEncdpdF1djwglOzWuMUWKQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American, Senators Cynthia Lummis and John Barrasso here.

We know that no one puts the interests of Wyoming and America first like President Trump. That’s why we are working overtime with the president to get his agenda through the Senate.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I worried this country wasn’t big enough to love me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I know how easy it is to feel discouraged. I’ve felt it too.
#
Hi Friend, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.
When I was growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I worried that the heart of this country wasn’t big enough to love someone like me.
But over the years, I’ve witnessed change that once felt unimaginable — and because of voters in my home state of Delaware and supporters across the country, I became the first openly transgender member elected to Congress last November.
I’m carrying that with me this Pride Month.
**Because Pride teaches us that hope matters most when it’s hard.**
Right now, it’s a frightening time for so many in our country. LGBTQ+ people, especially trans youth, are being targeted with cruelty — online, in our communities, and by politicians in Congress. I know how easy it is to feel discouraged. I’ve felt it too.
But we must remember that Pride was born at Stonewall in resistance, in protest, and in the belief that even in the face of fear, change is still possible.
**That’s why it’s more important than ever to fight for what’s right.** To stay rooted in our values and our vision. And just as importantly, to keep believing that through the power of our proximity, we can bring more people along.
**But we won’t get there alone. It’s going to take all of us building a movement strong enough to meet this moment and carry us forward.[So if you’re ready to do your part, please split a $5 donation between my campaign and The Long Run PAC now. **](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-mcbride.dTFiSG&refcode=em250614-1-300&t=1&akid=5569%2E196590%2EJ2Kkcp)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I just can’t think of someone who deserves a parade less than Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
As a veteran, it really disgusts me that the president is making a mockery of the United States Army to throw himself a birthday party. And as an American, I’m deeply concerned by the damage Donald Trump is doing to our democracy.
#

Team, back when Gabby was in Congress she met a Navy SEAL, Senior Chief Jimmy Hatch, while she was in Afghanistan.
He spent decades as a SEAL, and several years on SEAL Team Six. He was wounded, shot by the Taliban.
When he was in the hospital, Gabby used to visit him. Tried to cheer him up.
And a few years later, after Gabby was shot, Jimmy Hatch was there, visiting her during her recovery.
Jimmy Hatch deserves a parade. Donald Trump does not.
As a veteran, it really disgusts me that the president is making a mockery of the United States Army to throw himself a birthday party. And as an American, I’m deeply concerned by the damage Donald Trump is doing to our democracy.
Trump is taking us down a dangerous path. But we do not have to follow him.
I am working to hold up Donald Trump’s agenda every day. If you’re with me, I’m humbly asking you:
**[Make a donation to my campaign and help us keep up the fight.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25/.u07CFH&refcode=em250614-1-600&t=1&akid=6090%2E6688874%2EAm-PRz)

clean_body: | | | Peter, We need to send the rioters straight to JAIL and DEPORT any illegal immigrants. _ The Mexican president has called for her citizens to MOBILIZE against our country. She’s encouraging protests against federal agents who are carrying out deportation orders, like we’re now seeing in Los Angeles. Don’t think this chaos is limited to crazy states like California, Peter. Don’t blink, because it’s coming straight to YOU. Far-Left activists are holding protests in Texas, and the Left is pouring MILLIONS into Texas to defeat me and flip our state blue. So I’m asking for your help. Congress has a chance to support President Trump. We need to jail and deport the rioters, tax the money immigrants make here, and put AMERICANS FIRST. Thank you, Chip Roy | | Paid for by Chip Roy for Congress | | 6705 W. Highway 290, Ste. 50295 Austin, Texas 78735

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23129%2E4449941%2EgRDpvb) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23129%2E4449941%2EgRDpvb) **[Trump is GOING AFTER _MSNBC_ ↘↘↘](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62009?t=3&akid=23129%2E4449941%2EgRDpvb)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62009?t=4&akid=23129%2E4449941%2EgRDpvb) It has never been more important for us to show support for cable news – we NEED to know if Americans still watch this critical news channel!! | **[Tell us, do you still watch _MSNBC_??](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62009?t=5&akid=23129%2E4449941%2EgRDpvb)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62009?t=6&akid=23129%2E4449941%2EgRDpvb)

Your poll participation is now confirmed. Please submit your response within the next 5 minutes.
**WE KNEW** Trump would attack the media – he’s gone after _CNN, MSNBC,_ and even _PBS_ ...

**WE KNEW** Trump would even go after individual journalists – he’s already threatened to have Rachel Maddow and Nicolle Wallace FIRED...

**AND WE KNEW** it was only a matter of time before he would try to scrap critical news media altogether...

But here’s the harsh truth: Trump wants to **PULL THE PLUG** on outlets like _MSNBC_ because they have bravely covered all the disastrous moments from his second term.

Trump is scared of the truth. It’s no wonder he’s called _MSNBC_ the “enemy of the people.”

We have to stand up for _MSNBC_ and show them support in the face of Trump’s attacks. EVERY Democrat reading this must confirm their viewership – it’ll be a HUGE BLOW to Donald Trump!!

[**Respond before 11:59 PM→](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/62009?t=9&akid=23129%2E4449941%2EgRDpvb)**

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: You've been selected → Team Ilhan June Issues Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's been a few months since we last reached out to ask, and we're hoping for a LOT of responses today.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1668%2E791427%2EeUKesz)

You may have noticed that every so often, Ilhan likes our team to check in with our supporters directly to ask a simple question: **_What are the issues you care about most?**_
Well, it's been a few months since we last reached out to ask, and we're hoping for a LOT of responses to that very question today.
[**Can we count on you to take our official Team Ilhan June Issues Survey? It should only take a minute or two of your time, but any input you have is incredibly valuable to our campaign.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-issues-survey/?source=em250614-1-180&akid=1668%2E791427%2EeUKesz)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-issues-survey/?source=em250614-1-180&akid=1668%2E791427%2EeUKesz)**
We tend to keep the options on these surveys the same every time we ask, because believe it or not, the responses to them change all the time.
It's your answers — alongside the answers of progressives nationwide — that gives us a better read on where our movement's priorities lie at any given moment.
The more responses we receive, the better Ilhan is able to continue fighting for our shared values in Congress.
That's because whether your top priorities are healthcare for all, defending immigrant communities, ending endless wars or something else entirely — it's the issues and our supporters that make our progressive movement so special.
So please, let us know what you think by taking today's survey. We're tracking responses at this link:
**[https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/June-2025-Issues-Survey**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-issues-survey/?source=em250614-1-180&akid=1668%2E791427%2EeUKesz)
We'll be reviewing the results with Ilhan in just a few days, so thank you in advance for your response.
\- Team Ilhan

name: Leah Donahey, LCV
subject: ACTION NEEDED — Tell the Trump Administration: No New Offshore Oil and Gas Leasing
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI2MDI4OTAS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI0MDg3Mzc2MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
TELL THE TRUMP ADMINISTRATION TO PROTECT OUR COASTS

An open comment period right now is kickstarting the process to offer new
offshore drilling leasing to Big Polluters. We need to respond. Sign your name and say no to new offshore oil and gas leasing >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~ TAKE ACTION NOW https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ebDKc8_ Peter, The Trump administration has kicked off the process to consider offering new
offshore oil and gas leasing. All of our coasts are at risk.The plan could auction off waters in the Gulf of Mexico, Pacific, Atlantic and
Arctic Oceans, jeopardizing our coastal communities, public health, and the environment to
benefit Big Oil and Gas. We need to act quickly. For years, LCV and our movement have fought attempts to
expand offshore drilling — and won. But we need to take action now to prevent new offshore leases that would lock
our nation into decades more fossil fuel dependency and environmental
destruction. Public input is due by Monday, June 16, so there’s only a short window to make your voice heard. It only takes a moment: Tell the Trump administration that our coastal waters are not for drilling. https://links.messages.lcv. Expanding offshore drilling will only threaten our waters and coastal
communities and increase our dependence on dirty fossil fuels. We have seen
firsthand its destructive effects, from the devastating health impacts caused by toxic pollution and climate-fueled extreme
weather,to threats to industries that coastal economies rely on — such as tourism,
fishing, and recreation — which support millions of jobs. By giving the oil
industry more control over our waters, the Trump administration would increase
economic and health risks for coastal communities and all of us. Now is the time to make our voices heard, Peter. We must call on the Trump administration to protect our coasts and include no new lease sales in their offshore oil and gas leasing program. Please, take action today, BEFORE the comment period ends on June 16. https://links.messages.lcv. We can stop this, but only if we make our voices heard today. Thank you for
being with us, Peter. Leah Donahey
Senior Federal Advocacy Campaigns Director
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12602890&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDg3Mzc2MQS2&spReportId=MjI0MDg3Mzc2MQS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12602890&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDg3Mzc2MQS2&spReportId=MjI0MDg3Mzc2MQS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.
