| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1e6f116d-5c6b-4650-a3c1-268af8b6b63b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It was only a matter of time for the far-left and anti-Trump radicals to hit the streets in large numbers to mobilize against the President's crackdown on illegal immigration.
The anti-ICE riots in Los Angeles last week was a moment progressives and Democrats have been working up to since President Trump returned to the Oval Office this year. The chaotic spark that led to literal flames in the heart of downtown Los Angeles has now spread to other cities across the country.
[Support PolitiBrawl](https://substack.com/redirect/1e6f116d-5c6b-4650-a3c1-268af8b6b63b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
You can **[watch my videos of the riots](https://substack.com/redirect/68efbf5e-9660-4071-9352-244a0950aceb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Los Angeles here.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/68efbf5e-9660-4071-9352-244a0950aceb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While the rioters' actions in America's second largest city were a sight to behold, one of the indicators that it may get worse before it gets better is how many on the Left, not just the Far-Left, are calling for the violence to continue and to target ICE agents.
While many in the country are tired and fed-up with seeing lawlessness in major cities, the Democrats' reaction to the violence shows just as many do not share the same fatigue.
"They know how quickly we mobilize. That's why [the feds] are changing tactics because community defense works and our resistance has slowed them down before...If they are escalating our tactics then so are we. When they show up, we gotta show up even stronger," Los Angeles Councilmember Eunisses Hernandez said to a cheering crowd.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/3580b0ad-a509-4dbf-bebd-0fd2591691f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Sold Out Last Round-- Only a Few Pre-IPO Spots Left for Accredited Investors](https://substack.com/redirect/3580b0ad-a509-4dbf-bebd-0fd2591691f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3580b0ad-a509-4dbf-bebd-0fd2591691f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Mode Mobile filled its last two raises 100% - and fast.
With over $75M+ in revenue, 32,481% growth and $52M raised from 50,000+ investors, it's one of the most traction-backed pre-IPO offerings on the table.
Now it's open again, but only to accredited investors.
This may be the last window before public markets get a hold. No speculation. No buzzwords. Just real users, real revenue, and a Nasdaq ticker already secured.
Accredited investors can review full details while this round is still live.
**[Learn how to invest](https://substack.com/redirect/3580b0ad-a509-4dbf-bebd-0fd2591691f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Click To Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/3580b0ad-a509-4dbf-bebd-0fd2591691f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**
"The Los Angeles Protests Are an Act of Self-Defense," **[was a headline from The New Republic](https://substack.com/redirect/5ea00063-5b3d-4f21-b558-009a95374c78?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , which framed the leftist's riots as, "Residents of L.A. aren't merely protesting ICE; they're attempting to protect their communities from ICE's raids."
Despite it being clear from day one that the violence in Los Angeles was started by locals violently interfering with an ICE operation, that hasn't stopped Mayor Karen Bass and Governor Gavin Newsom from blaming Trump for calling in the military to restore order.
Beyond the blame game, Newsom is playing to his base by claiming Trump federalizing some of the California National Guard "proves" he is one step closer to establishing a dictatorship.
"If some of us can be snatched off the streets without a warrant, based only on suspicion or skin color, then none of us are safe. Authoritarian regimes begin by targeting people who are least able to defend themselves. But they do not stop there. Trump and his loyalists thrive on division because it allows them to take more power and exert even more control," **[Newsom said](https://substack.com/redirect/3e47d6f3-bb96-4f87-b9a3-144ddf676bd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in one of his many social media posts since the start of the riots.
Beyond targeting federal facilities, **[agitators are now gathering at hotels](https://substack.com/redirect/43ba6b09-d7c4-4cf0-a895-67949f601cb4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** suspected of housing the extra federal personnel who were brought in to reinforce their respective agencies.
[Support PolitiBrawl](https://substack.com/redirect/1e6f116d-5c6b-4650-a3c1-268af8b6b63b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We have now seen the violence and chaos spread to cities like Chicago, New York City, Seattle, and Portland. As I have said, while some rioters were punished to varying degrees for their actions in 2020, the vast networks that mobilized them have remained in place. While they have not seen large returns with rioting in reaction to Israel's war against Hamas, they have switched to deploying the nation's large illegal immigrant population and their sympathizers to cause mayhem.
This is why the anti-ICE riots have the potential to be just as destructive, if not more, than the BLM riots in 2020. It is simply a numbers game. There are millions of illegal aliens who have a lot to lose should ICE arrest them. There are millions more family members and friends who clearly are willing to attack federal law enforcement. Not to mention, this will be an ongoing operation for Trump's entire term, so there will be new, daily cases to be "outraged" over. George Floyd happened one time and the riots in response to that lasted a few weeks before being brought under control, only for another "controversial" police action sent people back into the street. Usually, there was a lull of two to three weeks.
The illegal immigration crackdown could result in multiple cities rotating being on fire for weeks on end. The far-left's goal is to bring America's relative stability to a halt, they want to make the average American's life as miserable as possible so they break and join the revolt against Trump.
While I thought the street insurrection would have started a little earlier, now that it is summer for our nation, be prepared for the long haul.
I am certainly preparing.

name: George Latimer
subject: So Trump wants a birthday party?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
In America, we recognize no kings

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=Hn1FrHyUkSPIUWPi2ymJmvCDqd1Mf04UPFNcrAX4MPGLxVjHOQHidvlnwKu9Qpg37kM2hZvJOrNYvp2pIUc3wn9ojSapitULUURURoaJioM8O4o5oeuCEhQP53bsbvR4GCXE5CfrIN6Fm%2FGvU15njcZj%2B%2FRBwaoZ6OLENYHoZZvlSz9r%2FrErZ1HctLadfdRZ2V5ylaRwrHyj0YmPadLq2T7wOQ%2Fl42zfVmV63ZenD2DPyC0%2BCgTW%2FtEHYVra%2BmwiRzPg5mesJB4A7xbOLbo0mWpmOZ%2BgpSM%2BsV2nLPtCQur6Cy4eWNgQhHWHd%2Ba%2BmpQPlAwyPHARO%2FJ1%2BEoFkRqh%2FFZpB4JU%2F1raP3sw%2BXaR84pRt7zAn1N%2FUDRE6MpmsgxoUys19Y2PYNyXgx%2FF5ZFyOsDEoUbX%2BiLCWF14THO5reFMjNhIySmdAiDRnmIOo%2Fty)
---
| |
---
Peter, let me be very clear about one thing: Trump’s $45 million military birthday parade is nothing less than a blatant display of tyranny, and encapsulates everything wrong with this administration and their ideals. **He wants to be king - plain and simple.** To pay for his birthday spectacle, he’s pushed his power as executive well past its limits - gutting everything from federal jobs to healthcare to benefits for veterans of the very military he insists this parade will celebrate. The bright side? Today, organizers, activists, and folks across the country are making it very clear that in America, we recognize _no kings - not Donald Trump or anybody else_. Rallies are being held across the country and around the world to tell Trump that we won’t stand for his blatant corruption. **Like you, I won’t stand by and watch the corruption continue – and I want you to know I’m fighting.** **[I need your support in standing up to Trump and his cronies in Congress, and fight for the folks I was elected to serve. If you’re with me, please chip in $10 or whatever you can to show the GOP we aren’t backing down »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109579970/551561513/1711749452?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_061425_MM_120DO_D2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDI3ZDBkODctMmI0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iUqZQEcM_ubduFgIqY_q55CnNQa_pj0D026fwX3bHcM=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, let me be very clear about one thing: Trump’s $45 million military birthday parade is nothing less than a blatant display of tyranny, and encapsulates everything wrong with this administration and their ideals. He wants to be king - plain and simple. To pay for his birthday spectacle, he’s pushed his power as executive well past its limits - gutting everything from federal jobs to healthcare to benefits for veterans of the very military he insists this parade will celebrate. The bright side? Today, organizers, activists, and folks across the country are making it very clear that in America, we recognize no kings - not Donald Trump or anybody else. Rallies are being held across the country and around the world to tell Trump that we won’t stand for his blatant corruption. | | HELP ON ELECTION DAY
---
| | | |
---
| | Fellow Patriots, Election Day is just around the corner. We're in the home stretch of this campaign, and we're feeling good, but we can't take anything for granted. If you'd be willing to help get us over the finish line, we're looking for help this week and on Election Day. Our primary focus will be calling voters to turn them out on Tuesday. We could also use help with precinct staffing. With just under a week to go, your support of Karen is critical. If you could chip in even just a little bit of time to help, it would mean the world to us. Thank you to everyone who has stepped up to help thus far, and I can't wait to celebrate our victory on Tuesday!
---
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Defending Liberty, Karen Hamilton Candidate, Virginia House of Delegates District 62

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109580722/551563599/-1812448514?refcode=em-6.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA5NTNlMy0yYzQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MnKUamkQmxKZhodCQ-xs5Ug4reZzmQ0zsdK18lRg5g=) Peter, what a stupid birthday stunt. Donald Trump is spending _$45 million_ in taxpayer money for a birthday party with tanks and flyovers, so he can feel special. Read that again: he and Republicans are stealing from us to waste millions on the glorification of one insecure man’s massive ego. **This is outrageous, tinpot dictator behavior. And we don’t bend to the knee to kings in America.** Don’t let anyone tell you this is about patriotism. Real patriotism isn’t cutting benefits from our veterans – those men and women who defended our freedoms – or taking food benefits out of the mouths of their grandchildren. If Trump or national Republicans were committed to doing the jobs we swore an oath to – helping out our neighbors every day – they’d understand that. So if you’re like me, vent. Maybe go to a rally and peacefully protest. clean_body: | = = Peter, what a stupid birthday stunt. Donald Trump is spending $45 million in taxpayer money for a birthday party with tanks and flyovers, so he can feel special. Read that again: he and Republicans are stealing from us to waste millions on the glorification of one insecure man’s massive ego. This is outrageous, tinpot dictator behavior. And we don’t bend to the knee to kings in America. Don’t let anyone tell you this is about patriotism. Real patriotism isn’t cutting benefits from our veterans – those men and women who defended our freedoms – or taking food benefits out of the mouths of their grandchildren. If Trump or national Republicans were committed to doing the jobs we swore an oath to – helping out our neighbors every day – they’d understand that. So if you’re like me, vent. Maybe go to a rally and peacefully protest. And come tomorrow, let’s all say: Enough of this nonsense, let’s make lives better for the American people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Together, -Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. name: Team Moore
subject: The pressure is on
body:
Maryland laws prevent us from fundraising for an entire quarter, so we need your help to catch back up.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=178%2E1086043%2Etlk0De)
Hey Peter!
It’s officially the middle of June, and we wanted to give you an update of where our fundraising is at:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250614-1?refcode=em-20250614-1&refcode2=178_1086043_tlk0De&akid=178%2E1086043%2Etlk0De)
We’re making progress toward our monthly goal, but with only 16 days left in June we need to close the gap.
Compared to our potential opponents, we can only fundraise for 75% of the year because of Maryland law. That means we lose an entire quarter of fundraising and have even higher goals when we’re able to ask for donations.
**That means the pressure is on, Peter.**
We are still playing catch up right now to make up for the lost time between January and April. While we’ve made a lot of progress, we’re not quite there yet.
We’re doing the work to defend Maryland from everything thrown our way, but we can’t do it without you. We need your help to fuel the work that we’re doing.
**[Peter, your support is critical. Will you make a contribution of any amount this weekend?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250614-1?refcode=em-20250614-1&refcode2=178_1086043_tlk0De&akid=178%2E1086043%2Etlk0De)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250614-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250614-1&refcode2=178_1086043_tlk0De&akid=178%2E1086043%2Etlk0De)**
Thank you for all that you do.
— Team Moore
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250614-1&t=2&refcode2=178_1086043_tlk0De&akid=178%2E1086043%2Etlk0De)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=178%2E1086043%2Etlk0De)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=178%2E1086043%2Etlk0De)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Two polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
Peter, in the span of one day, two outlets released polls of the Virginia Governor's race.
The first had me running way ahead of my opponent. _The second had us neck-and-neck._
Now, what these polls tell us is that there are a lot of undecided voters out there, and the campaign that's able to raise the money necessary to reach these folks will win. We just launched our first TV and digital ads, and your support will help us keep those ads running.
_So, I'm asking you directly, Peter:_
**[Will you split a contribution of any amount between my campaign and State Democrats Committee ahead of our mid-month fundraising deadline? The money we raise can pay for the ads and organizers that will lead us to victory on November 4th.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89773?refcode=em20250614-9012&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9012%2E614464%2EUYO4Mx)**

name: COURIER
subject: While Trump parades, Americans protest. Stand with them.
body:
Today, while Trump rolls tanks and troops through Washington, Americans in over 1,500 cities are rising up in the largest anti-Trump protest since his return to power.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109581419/551565676/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjdmOTg4MzMtMmU0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KYndpkyyLSRapA_HghyOzHYAZxamcIOjWMwooROCQ0I=&emci=953431c1-a447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=67f98833-2e49-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14016711)
**Peter,**
Today, while Trump rolls tanks and troops through Washington, Americans in over 1,500 cities are rising up in the largest anti-Trump protest since his return to power.
The “No Kings” protests are a powerful act of resistance—a nationwide affirmation of free speech and dissent. COURIER is proud to stand with protestors, covering this historic day across our platforms and local newsrooms with factual, fearless reporting.
**But let’s be clear: this is not just a moment of pride. It’s a moment of danger.**
Trump has already threatened protestors with “very big force” and promised they’ll be “hit harder than ever before.” And intimidation is just the beginning.
He’s ordered the DOJ to investigate ActBlue—trying to choke off Democratic grassroots funding. He’s targeting Indivisible—the group helping organize today’s protests—with threats so serious, they’re preparing legal defense.
This is authoritarianism in motion.
COURIER is fighting back—with facts, independent journalism, and content that reaches millions to cut through MAGA disinformation.
That’s why your support is so critical right now.
**We’re 211 donations short of our rapid-response goal. Every dollar helps protect the right to dissent, counter Trump’s crackdown, and ensure the truth survives this dark moment.**

clean_body: Today, while Trump rolls tanks and troops through Washington, Americans in over 1,500 cities are rising up in the largest anti-Trump protest since his return to power. Peter, Today, while Trump rolls tanks and troops through Washington, Americans in over 1,500 cities are rising up in the largest anti-Trump protest since his return to power. The “No Kings” protests are a powerful act of resistance—a nationwide affirmation of free speech and dissent. COURIER is proud to stand with protestors, covering this historic day across our platforms and local newsrooms with factual, fearless reporting. But let’s be clear: this is not just a moment of pride. It’s a moment of danger. Trump has already threatened protestors with “very big force” and promised they’ll be “hit harder than ever before.” And intimidation is just the beginning. He’s ordered the DOJ to investigate ActBlue—trying to choke off Democratic grassroots funding. He’s targeting Indivisible—the group helping organize today’s protests—with threats so serious, they’re preparing legal defense. This is authoritarianism in motion. COURIER is fighting back—with facts, independent journalism, and content that reaches millions to cut through MAGA disinformation. That’s why your support is so critical right now. We’re 211 donations short of our rapid-response goal. Every dollar helps protect the right to dissent, counter Trump’s crackdown, and ensure the truth survives this dark moment. = **= In solidarity, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: NO KINGS

She explains why Fair Fight has returned to court in a case against True the Vote. |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109582222/551567698/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250614_ff_SYATTVLiftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZjNTAyMi0zMDQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR5xeT6yRutjq8sPQUI5KmjpnowcvXHgB0IxtY_BKzg=&emci=266c5022-3049-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=316c5022-3049-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

| | Did you see this note from our founder, Stacey Abrams? She explains why we returned to federal court in our case against True the Vote — and she lays out our commitment to defending democracy. Keep reading for more. [**And if you can, please pitch in a donation, which helps power our organizing in the fight for the freedom to vote.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109582223/551567699/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250614_ff_SYATTVLiftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZjNTAyMi0zMDQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR5xeT6yRutjq8sPQUI5KmjpnowcvXHgB0IxtY_BKzg=) Thank you, The Fair Fight Team \--------------------Forwarded Message--------------------
From: Stacey Abrams
Subject: I’d like to walk you through Fair Fight’s case against True the Vote Let’s go back in time for a moment. After the 2018 elections, I founded Fair Fight — an organization dedicated to combating voter suppression and protecting voting rights. And Georgia’s 2021 runoff elections for the U.S. Senate showed [**exactly why this work is so critical.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109582224/551567700/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250614_ff_SYATTVLiftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZjNTAyMi0zMDQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR5xeT6yRutjq8sPQUI5KmjpnowcvXHgB0IxtY_BKzg=) We saw an insidious attempt to intimidate voters — particularly Black, Brown, or first-time voters. **A Texas-based right-wing organization called True the Vote orchestrated the largest known mass voter eligibility challenge in Georgia’s history.** They provided volunteers with lists of voters from the United States Postal Service’s national change-of-address database — folks they flagged as ineligible to vote. Now, if you’ve ever moved, lived in college campus housing, or changed apartments, you know how the system works. Well, these anti-voter advocates used this database as evidence of ineligibility — even though the database can be outdated, and despite the fact that people who file to change their mailing address can still be properly registered to vote. Plus, the base of their challenges used unreliable postal data, as the United States Postal Service had already determined there was no guarantee on the quality of the data. True the Vote used this sleazy, shady practice to help facilitate more than 250,000 formal challenges. Voters received notifications questioning their right to vote simply because they used a convenience system designed to forward their mail. Imagine trying to cast a ballot and being singled out — pulled out of line — because your right to vote has been challenged. Or seeing your name posted publicly online with the accusation that you are ineligible to vote. And just in case the humiliation didn’t do the trick, True the Vote also discussed recruiting former Navy SEALs to monitor polling places. They even offered a $1 million bounty for reports of voter fraud. The sheer scale of these baseless challenges disrupted local election offices, burdened under-funded officials, created rampant confusion, and intimidated voters who had done nothing wrong. **Fair Fight has returned to federal court to take on True the Vote, oppose coordinated mass voter challenges, and end the ability of bad, cowardly actors to use this tactic to intimidate and overwhelm voters. ** **When necessary, Fair Fight takes its work to the courts. But they also work across communities and on campuses to slow or stop voter suppression efforts like mass challenges.** **And they invest in electing voting rights champions — such as Senators Raphael Warnock and Jon Ossoff in those 2021 elections — at the federal level as well as the state and local level, where key officials shape how elections are run.** [**The right to vote remains under constant attack, and the team at Fair Fight must be fully equipped to tackle new threats while pushing forward for free and fair elections. Will you make a donation of any amount to help fuel this work today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109582225/551567702/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250614_ff_SYATTVLiftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZjNTAyMi0zMDQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR5xeT6yRutjq8sPQUI5KmjpnowcvXHgB0IxtY_BKzg=) Every eligible American should have the right to vote and have that vote counted. With that simple mission, Fair Fight has worked to stop the steady, methodical, cynical right-wing assaults on the bedrock of our shared values. And over the years, this work has only become more urgent. In March 2021, Georgia Governor Brian Kemp, a man with a reputation for being one of the nation’s most effective architects of voter suppression, opened the floodgates to even more mass voter challenges by signing SB 202 into law. That legislation allows unlimited voter challenges, which means that any person’s voter registration can be challenged as ineligible. Look: voter suppression isn’t new to America — or, sadly, to Georgia. And while both political parties have, at various times in history, treated those they considered undesirable voters as somehow criminal for exercising this fundamental constitutional right, in this century, **voter suppression is the strategy of choice for Republicans.** **True the Vote and GOP governors like Brian Kemp, Greg Abbott, and Ron DeSantis are the ideological descendants of those who have long opposed equal access to the ballot for all citizens, regardless of race or gender.** Across the country and now in the halls of Congress, Republicans are passing laws that make it harder for people to vote precisely because an engaged citizenry threatens their power. [**In the fight against tyranny and autocracy, we must defend the freedom to choose our leaders and vote our values. Fairness demands it. Make a donation now to fund and sustain that fight for our bedrock, pro-democracy ideals.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109582226/551567703/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250614_ff_SYATTVLiftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZjNTAyMi0zMDQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR5xeT6yRutjq8sPQUI5KmjpnowcvXHgB0IxtY_BKzg=) Thank you, Stacey Abrams | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109582228/551567704/1069921273?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250614_ff_SYATTVLiftnote_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTZjNTAyMi0zMDQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bR5xeT6yRutjq8sPQUI5KmjpnowcvXHgB0IxtY_BKzg=)

Will you rush a donation of $20 or more right now to help get us back on track? With MAGA Republicans running Richmond and Washington, we can’t afford to miss this goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund_em_q22025?amount=20]

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

She’s not here for rural Colorado. She’s here for MAGA headlines. Her voting record speaks volumes: ✅ Voted to slash Medicaid ✅ Voted to overturn the 2020 election ✅ Voted against infrastructure and rural investment ✅ Supports Trump’s plan to defund trusted public media It’s extreme, out of touch, and dangerous. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: RE: Tank parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Trump administration has used the levers of government to arrest his political enemies―from labor union presidents to sitting members of Congress doing their constitutional duties. | |
---
Peter, There are no kings in America—but that’s not stopping Donald Trump, his billionaire buddies, and his MAGA cronies from trying to install one. **Today, thousands of Americans will stand up and use their voice to defend our democracy. Will you be one of them?** [**Find and join a No Kings rally near you today, and tell Trump that we won’t stand by as he attacks our democracy.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3iP-Rc9bD9vmV4WRIiX8t1g7bBTlfoqxZUeTpGffDngDDGIDWlzA-lG1obTrHln9aIfAWjnhs4gMOKQqoxfqVt8wmuuVQnFHlMFvab1vjtEaozSDQiUL5kHyFPNnF73MfRd4FvchkEpRwq98Tuf92QRjotP2N2kH_965At2oF9ywOFAsL2Am1QpwMiwA6u0zGM/4hc/gardeVGxSqCgo5IYxteKsA/h0/h001.draRK39bCsHxZ91BN9HJLaDaRmtQRXo2gWuvynng-tk) See you out there! Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy
* * *
Peter, Did you see Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem have DHS agents tackle and handcuff California Sen. Alex Padilla for asking her questions at a press briefing about Trump’s military occupation of Los Angeles? **This is how a dictatorship operates―not a democracy.** The Trump administration has used the levers of government to arrest his political enemies―from labor union presidents to sitting members of Congress doing their constitutional duties. [**It’s time for Americans to rise up and make it crystal clear: This country has no king. There are nationwide rallies on Saturday in every state in the union―find one near you!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3jQHuDMskqL92Vf6rwsvr1VqLPYv52jyCf1unJLnF56cL46ABKZP_4mrfgjTRl1nYZHbqTi4NOmg0J9bhTE0H-oWMVQzOKaPLR7j1QwQPo6_02V5cm0YxB3DxEndwH0kBRJVbKEzhdsOpEAQEfegkg91hGF6KtDCHctcpAO2KCmMlasxdw96v97hrhvls-cs-M/4hc/gardeVGxSqCgo5IYxteKsA/h1/h001.PMv6D-q2LTdjh2uFh78KvsgEUAGG9v83cKWjGujqIK0) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3gDqosGBmsDs62_k_MHHqEpKu0xkTDchBqkInUzHm5kP75S3zZl3EgL-gOnErrOjwFnjG1_0Fhb5bdhRAaN-UDHhArlvs75cDc3kybmzsKsu2OflrhTpPm7Cuga0p-0ly-7be9ZI7pDCjGcS1wt-qdlmek_vyHSe9FPjkMVeBTQx9WIfBtEOToMG8yi-L2FysM/4hc/gardeVGxSqCgo5IYxteKsA/h2/h001.AVMB6QvpaY5WcQ0XDsjzjkgkd1skLfCZgIV2vxjwdKI) Donald Trump wants America’s eyes to be on the military parade he’s throwing for his 79th birthday in Washington DC. Instead, Americans are coming together to remind the birthday boy that this country was founded on the principle of self-governance, and **we will keep it that way.** [**Find and join a No Kings rally near you!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3jKaC8PJdSIW19DCHnsPGtDL9DMw7s6jPhV2Sg8h-8S21FSLAGbbu8BMfYe_ZwbqoSB3Gb7cCsx3Md89gb_tHNcDO9Yq1dnXrCHFpTZD3CFCPPyYy0Eu0sOTo-h8mouHQAYipRc5FlkdQ4ODJkIALPH0-_gpUun0nfNzV3fwVPqAjdSyg6cYAbcdKZO3Ixe9tQ/4hc/gardeVGxSqCgo5IYxteKsA/h3/h001.NJAGHOARYsrOV2hnFhRT7nF-DfrttOML2ne5rA-373w) Thank you, Morgan Stahr
United for Democracy

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Four dangerous provisions that the GOP has snuck into this spending plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’m going to use every tool I have to get the Senate to kill this bill.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2567%2E4032634%2ElUzTNq)
---
Democrats have been sounding the alarm on the worst of the worst parts of Trump’s big, ugly budget bill lately: How it would kick millions of people off of Medicaid, shutter hospitals, eliminate SNAP benefits for families, and result in the largest transfer of wealth from the poor to the rich in American history. It’s an abomination. But wait, it gets worse. I want to talk about four dangerous provisions that the GOP has snuck into this spending plan. 1: It would defund Planned Parenthood, which will gut health care nationally and create a backdoor national abortion ban — even in states where abortion is protected. 2: It would slash taxes and restrictions on purchasing gun silencers, making it easier for criminals to access them and ensuring our society is less safe. 3: It would bar states from regulating AI, which could enable real estate companies and landlords to hike up rents across the country. 4: It would stop courts from holding Trump officials in contempt for ignoring court orders, gutting their ability to ensure Trump follows the law. **I am not going to let them get away with this. I’ll keep sounding the alarm on these sneaky additions to the spending bill — and continue making it clear that the health care and food assistance cuts are all going to help billionaires make even more billions.** [**We still have a chance to stop this plan from passing. And I’m going to use every tool I have to get the Senate to kill this bill. If — and only if — you’re able, please pitch in $28 or anything you can to fuel our fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3021?amount=28&t=8&akid=2567%2E4032634%2ElUzTNq)

---

Fellow Conservative,

Congress is like a battlefield—thrilling, mission-driven, and full of conflict. At least no one’s shooting at us here. Well, not with guns, anyway.

The out-of-touch fake news “reporters” at Politico decided they would target the most dangerous men in DC: Navy SEALs.

We all ran for office because we were still hungry to protect and fight for our country. The war may be over for us, but we can’t abandon the part of our lives that made us who we are. We were part of an elite unit on the front lines, and Congress is somewhere else we can be out front doing something special for our country.

_**Yet the liberal news corporations, who _desperately_ want to keep the status quo, _attacked us_ for wanting to take on the Swamp establishment and business-as-usual going on in our government.**_

All of us –**Navy SEALs Tim Sheehy, Eli Crane, and Ryan Zinke** – are teaming up to stop career politicians and lazy bureaucrats, but we’re up against more than just the DC establishment. We’re up against the liberal media, RINOs, and revenge-seeking Democrats.

→ If the media wants to attack us for taking on the government corruption, fraud, and waste – which has been exposed by Trump’s DOGE department...

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Trump’s birthday gift? A nationwide backlash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Trump and his MAGA allies in Congress are pushing a cruel vision for America.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109586049/551578171/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJlZWY3Ni0zNDQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WB9THWcuoC-oKl-1-LZ9fsdTmaS9KsD9tLiyUlp26w0=&emci=6dd91918-8148-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=cf2eef76-3449-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)

subject: This isn’t a bill. It’s a betrayal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109586407/551579172/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250614_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY5YmYyOS0zNTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qEP2LnBwhmoRCu4hhKz0eDh83lZrQMNBzTebe-YuXU=&emci=093aa4b5-7c48-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44f9bf29-3549-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=252045)
---
Folks — Donald Trump is trying to sell the country a _“Big, Beautiful Bill”_ — but let me tell you what it really is: → _A plan to leave 16 million people uninsured._ → _A death knell for rural hospitals._ → _A direct attack on working families and our public lands._ **It’s not a bill — it’s a betrayal. And it’s a big, beautiful NO from me.** I’ve spent my career fighting to expand health care access, protect our public lands, and deliver for New Mexican families — and I’m not about to stop now. **But here’s the truth:** We’re up against a massive right-wing machine that’s ready to spend millions to keep the Senate majority and push through their dangerous agenda. Our final mid-month deadline of the quarter is tomorrow, and there’s still a considerable gap in our fundraising, so I have to ask: [_**Will you chip in any amount to help my team and I reach our goal? Every dollar brings us closer to flipping the Senate majority blue and getting our government back to work for everyday people.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109586408/551579176/-1386246667?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250614_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY5YmYyOS0zNTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qEP2LnBwhmoRCu4hhKz0eDh83lZrQMNBzTebe-YuXU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109586409/551579177/-1386246667?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20250614_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGY5YmYyOS0zNTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0qEP2LnBwhmoRCu4hhKz0eDh83lZrQMNBzTebe-YuXU=)

clean_body: Folks — Donald Trump is trying to sell the country a “Big, Beautiful Bill” — but let me tell you what it really is: → A plan to leave 16 million people uninsured. → A death knell for rural hospitals. → A direct attack on working families and our public lands. It’s not a bill — it’s a betrayal. And it’s a big, beautiful NO from me. I’ve spent my career fighting to expand health care access, protect our public lands, and deliver for New Mexican families — and I’m not about to stop now. But here’s the truth: We’re up against a massive right-wing machine that’s ready to spend millions to keep the Senate majority and push through their dangerous agenda. What this is like for immigrants like my wife, Marilyn, who followed all the rules

# [No One Is Safe When Justice Depends on Your Skin Tone](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=165937894&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTM3ODk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk5MTYwNTgsImV4cCI6MTc1MjUwODA1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dTThxFR2UDvcwvlMIEAblp8_tCoWDsvFDD8HyxdQI7A)
### What this is like for immigrants like my wife, Marilyn, who followed all the rules
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Jun 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

My wife, Marilyn, immigrated to the US from Mexico legally, is an accountant, has a Master's Degree from Mizzou, and is everything we supposedly ask of an immigrant.
Today, she shares the pain, frustration, and anger of what's going on from her point of view.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e6893b5-f8a3-4085-a345-432ed5c0b5fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Marilyn and our two little boys on Harvey's second birthday this week.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.l-wevUNoWlp2nxDspS_IPohhf7XTe3J4oZ5FzvB7tMQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165937894)
* * *
_What ICE is doing across the country should make every American furious --because this is not freedom._
I've been watching the protests spread, and I can't stay quiet. Because what we're witnessing right now isn't just about immigration. It's about who gets to be treated as a person in this country, and who gets thrown into the shadows.
If you missed one of my earlier pieces for Lucas's Substack, I shared my own immigration story. [You can read it here](https://substack.com/redirect/8f265c7f-e07d-4434-90bf-1d8b59291d69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I came the so-called "right way," but even that path was steep. I told the truth about how hard it was, how arbitrary and punishing the system can be, and why I'll never judge those who couldn't wait in line, especially the young people who were brought here as children. The DACA recipients. The dreamers. I don't blame them. I blame the people behind the institutions that built this maze and then dared to call it a dream.
Let's name what's happening right now. Across the country, ICE is targeting not just undocumented immigrants, but anyone who looks what they think an immigrant looks like. They're stopping workers on their way to the fields. They're showing up at bus stations, schools, and parking lots. They are targeting people like me and my family. They don't need proof. They don't even pretend anymore. Brown skin, an accent, the "wrong" last name, that's all it takes.
This isn't about border security. It's racial profiling backed by state power.
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. reminded us that "injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere." Robert Kennedy (senior, obviously) "[we know that if one man's rights are denied, the rights of all are endangered](https://substack.com/redirect/5bc8bbd6-e401-4df2-bc0c-2478923c86e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)". So how can we stay silent as [mothers are dragged from their children outside school drop-offs](https://substack.com/redirect/52315701-0cfc-451d-924f-49ca2faca40c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? [As teenagers are thrown to the ground for speaking Spanish ](https://substack.com/redirect/12314326-27f6-41bf-b016-cd6d98bf9471?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in public? As [homes are raided without warrants](https://substack.com/redirect/ddabb4b9-8d7d-4b5c-8868-0f8bb3678ded?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [entire neighborhoods live in fear](https://substack.com/redirect/c7cf3e1c-8d23-4a61-8cec-9512bd260583?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)? And even worse, how can we stay silent as [people are dying in detention](https://substack.com/redirect/bc848344-9e13-442b-88c4-5c638695ea31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), stripped of due process, with no video, no accountability, just the version ICE decides to tell?
As we learned from Senator Alex Padilla, if this is how they treat a US Senator in front of cameras, how do you think everyone else is being treated when no one is watching?
This isn't law and order. This is fear as policy. Cruelty as the point.
It hurts to watch a country that once claimed to offer freedom and dignity lose its soul. The undocumented aren't the only ones being hunted. A [pregnant US citizen was hospitalized after being manhandled by ICE](https://substack.com/redirect/53c8dc4a-d38d-4e6c-8d69-951425803576?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Other US citizens were[ arrested by ICE for speaking Spanish](https://substack.com/redirect/ea9a6312-10e1-4d35-9361-e093d2ee0e62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [American-born children are going home to empty houses](https://substack.com/redirect/771c6507-99f9-4573-962a-cdbbd13d73ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [High schoolers are afraid to go to class](https://substack.com/redirect/bba15034-234d-4f3a-baa1-809b7d556f4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Small business owners are being harassed in towns they helped build](https://substack.com/redirect/a1418dda-cd51-4f1d-b60d-1003bf475bb2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Any brown-skinned American can be stopped, questioned, and searched without cause.
And let's not pretend this is accidental. It's happening under an administration that has made open hostility toward Latin Americans part of its brand. It's happening in a system designed to criminalize poverty, exploit fear, and reward silence. And all the while, the corporations that rely on immigrant labor look the other way, profiting off the same people being rounded up, detained, and disappeared.
I've seen people yell at immigrant children while they cling to their parents in fear. I've seen[ toddlers alone in court, trying to defend themselves](https://substack.com/redirect/5c2cc9ce-6808-439f-8b93-f1015a2c2b0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), because their parents were deported and no lawyer was assigned to their case. It is inhumane.
But who's to blame?
The politicians who refuse to act. The lawmakers who campaign on immigration every election year but never pass a real solution. They use these families, these _people_ , as talking points. Meanwhile, nothing changes. It's a failure of leadership. It's a failure of courage. Congress could fix this tomorrow. They just choose not to.
Why? Because fear is profitable. Chaos wins elections. Immigration, like poverty, like race, has been weaponized. It's used to divide neighbors. To distract voters. To keep power in the hands of the few who benefit from keeping us at each other's throats.
Let's be clear: this cruelty isn't a side effect. It's the plan.
This is not just about immigration. This is about dignity. About what kind of nation we want to be. We can either keep playing this ugly game, where human beings are pawns and children are treated like criminals, or we can demand something better. We need laws that reflect reality, reform that prioritizes humanity, leadership that doesn't look away.
And if Congress continues to refuse action, then it's our responsibility to act. To hold them accountable. To vote for change and to stay engaged until this issue is no longer ignored.
Because in the end, the people being targeted are not the enemy. The vast majority aren't criminals. They are families, workers, children, doing their best, just like all of us.
The enemy is the one who pits us against one other, and who profits every time we fall for it.
-Marilyn Kunce

This is fear as policy. Cruelty as the point. It hurts to watch a country that once claimed to offer freedom and dignity lose its soul. The undocumented aren't the only ones being hunted. A . Other US citizens were. . . . Any brown-skinned American can be stopped, questioned, and searched without cause. And let's not pretend this is accidental. It's happening under an administration that has made open hostility toward Latin Americans part of its brand. It's happening in a system designed to criminalize poverty, exploit fear, and reward silence. And all the while, the corporations that rely on immigrant labor look the other way, profiting off the same people being rounded up, detained, and disappeared. I've seen people yell at immigrant children while they cling to their parents in fear. I've seen, because their parents were deported and no lawyer was assigned to their case. It is inhumane. But who's to blame? The politicians who refuse to act. The lawmakers who campaign on immigration every election year but never pass a real solution. They use these families, these people , as talking points. Meanwhile, nothing changes. It's a failure of leadership. It's a failure of courage. Congress could fix this tomorrow. They just choose not to. Why? Because fear is profitable. Chaos wins elections. Immigration, like poverty, like race, has been weaponized. It's used to divide neighbors. To distract voters. To keep power in the hands of the few who benefit from keeping us at each other's throats. Let's be clear: this cruelty isn't a side effect. It's the plan. This is not just about immigration. This is about dignity. About what kind of nation we want to be. We can either keep playing this ugly game, where human beings are pawns and children are treated like criminals, or we can demand something better. We need laws that reflect reality, reform that prioritizes humanity, leadership that doesn't look away. And if Congress continues to refuse action, then it's our responsibility to act. To hold them accountable. To vote for change and to stay engaged until this issue is no longer ignored. Because in the end, the people being targeted are not the enemy. The vast majority aren't criminals. They are families, workers, children, doing their best, just like all of us. The enemy is the one who pits us against one other, and who profits every time we fall for it. -Marilyn Kunce Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Lucas Kunce P.O. Box 1240, Independence, MO 64050 ? ?

subject: This is what resistance looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWGPPFHlQiOW-y-Sy-rGxPT0TW1kF55EClSSAaTRQWQN-v2DnzvLrzaTvSHVM0BpXwZd-cbJk_kn_NjAYmPx4HoKXmdtsT6mxjcmsJJZEpU3LoL7lVLwjNM-7u9SWbfbk4LUxI1js7QiYchpAHSX4oYPUUG4EqkRy6QI0TDWFzHbw/4hc/L_5io0orRuSJnQn6u5i_jw/h0/h001.jtDLZhlE25TbLAijAoxPMko5SmITiN_P6a68JvalJ1o)
---
Friend, Today, I will be joining people in my district to protest Trump’s fascist attacks on our communities. He’s trying to silence dissent, but we will not be silenced. **[It’s not too late to find a No Kings rally near you today. Click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JTo79ADpDV0uZ6XlPaSdk3CiJ9BlkBAhlFIc1_QHdmti0IKFddnjaUGbxzAVtU01FyhZeRchzj4_BOQl-LUiRienw38DrIRBEMxnwV7JO-h_SwwcykK1DQ8ygPIPk7bwesgZWeF7NHkrlU0LY9Jg6sTdJA0ym_y_QS8Ilq3qDu5cJWjrS6QZEaO3bQlmfLbmB4bq0cASm-rGOpWXzUt6qccEdpyBRn_j30NIxPWZJ7aOei4bRlD2srNxyXAZJxnzjEvfGg_BpWVFzcOITT2NcqXHXRJb9EfvnM9qGbq_TOrwY8GtQq2LCkqD44gs6aCN5/4hc/L_5io0orRuSJnQn6u5i_jw/h1/h001.XKLKhijbNZqSx8xrwrwUt7Ut0uMWZVyOabmMb2kFyQQ)** I’m doing what I was sent to Congress to do: stand up to billionaire bullies and enact policies that uplift working people and vulnerable communities. Here are some ways I’m resisting Trump in Congress: **When Trump froze and delayed funding for Head Start programs, he jeopardized crucial support for 800,000 children under the age of 5—including meals, healthcare, and childcare.** I led the Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending him a letter demanding he restore funding. We then saw immediate improvements to help over 50 Head Start centers access their funding. But the threat continues, and I promise to continue defending these vital programs from Trump’s attacks. **When the administration suddenly closed Job Corps centers around the country, leaving thousands of students devastated and unhoused, some Michigan Congressmembers and I sent a letter to the Trump administration demanding that they immediately reverse this reckless decision.** In Michigan alone, more than 700 students were relying on Job Corps for housing, meals, stability, and opportunities to get out of poverty. Following our pressure, a U.S. judge temporarily blocked the elimination of Job Corps, noting that presidential administrations aren’t allowed to end programs that are set up and funded by Congress. But the Trump administration has been ignoring court orders, so we need to keep the pressure on. **Last week, Trump’s shameful expansion of his first term’s Muslim and African ban went into effect―now targeting people from 19 countries.** Rooted in white nationalism, this policy will separate families and put people’s lives in danger. We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. All humans have equal rights and worth, and we will keep pushing back against the ongoing dehumanization of our communities.**I’m co-leading legislation to block presidents from issuing these travel bans.** And this month, in a Financial Services Committee hearing, **I made sure everyone knew how Trump is using his office to further enrich himself.** Just since taking office in January, Trump’s personal fortune increased by $2.9 billion—through shameless abuses of power and corrupt cryptocurrency schemes. **These are just a few examples of how we’re resisting this administration’s attacks on our communities. I know you’re with me in this fight.** **[Please donate today to show the power of our movement as we stand up to a wannabe dictator and demand the multiracial democracy our Constitution promises.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JTo79ADpDV0uZ6XlPaSdk3DatW_iggQ8zauEBndhFlZh3qnNqULpFIzmffFzCdR5B6madaB6MGnxKlfHU3p8Ak2zyCXehBMmJrZxlacZKFXU0ZpMyGIy5w-kcUNrg7wJToty2eb1-4pNUgQDJX9KHiPEqouEnx0aIdyvY176cE9ey0uLTb3SWivgY-T5QmR9zuzSYrtfzAH8t_j5O7IWeq5MQ9FxMzQoSnoMB7foAIbFXzpU6UZr9kBxDRHjME-pXvzsKP4NQv37bbIHCwlZuvQBncpN4G9yUZgonWpauiZRnr3IPowtiZKP-esscmAPa/4hc/L_5io0orRuSJnQn6u5i_jw/h2/h001.DCxGIFw2L7vLiqHS87Dab6Kwng8x4kXem5R6OdDcvnc)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxewXXSWu898dZ-6Pr1Y9JTo79ADpDV0uZ6XlPaSdk3AWwWT6P_tFjIaQw4q6BADzLKeWuavuYFS2UJtdQId0w0ZxK8lhkn4aV1xzgSvYFVgYokigU6817uSNsvnczMxstCSjdfZ-G0YXwFAq2M-Wy57rYyvMvYLIgbqzZVyyw8Wkrcr7OlLylnHJ0u5WBmBnh5PkSE-Niaj5P3Iv3pi-CepD0SmG6s6-GZawOsKY22QqaJDrANIFk4kpzsg6JVDkvovf1GHgWzF84-myIQBuKal1nkyrVw7keq7m2Ef26H_iKowhn3_unRbgvNbNFjsiE3-lGU16lqUzSymuA1laSyENJrfcrC4peWuZlUKtlT9eY_bMUOEWRbtp36wG_jZ0/4hc/L_5io0orRuSJnQn6u5i_jw/h3/h001.MoE8nUn-bD9BOFxBOJBuwE0NDqymaqbkskZfPxbehz0)

clean_body: We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. | | | Friend, Today, I will be joining people in my district to protest Trump’s fascist attacks on our communities. He’s trying to silence dissent, but we will not be silenced. I’m doing what I was sent to Congress to do: stand up to billionaire bullies and enact policies that uplift working people and vulnerable communities. Here are some ways I’m resisting Trump in Congress: When Trump froze and delayed funding for Head Start programs, he jeopardized crucial support for 800,000 children under the age of 5—including meals, healthcare, and childcare. I led the Mamas’ Caucus and 23 of my colleagues in sending him a letter demanding he restore funding. We then saw immediate improvements to help over 50 Head Start centers access their funding. But the threat continues, and I promise to continue defending these vital programs from Trump’s attacks. When the administration suddenly closed Job Corps centers around the country, leaving thousands of students devastated and unhoused, some Michigan Congressmembers and I sent a letter to the Trump administration demanding that they immediately reverse this reckless decision. In Michigan alone, more than 700 students were relying on Job Corps for housing, meals, stability, and opportunities to get out of poverty. Following our pressure, a U.S. judge temporarily blocked the elimination of Job Corps, noting that presidential administrations aren’t allowed to end programs that are set up and funded by Congress. But the Trump administration has been ignoring court orders, so we need to keep the pressure on. Last week, Trump’s shameful expansion of his first term’s Muslim and African ban went into effect―now targeting people from 19 countries. Rooted in white nationalism, this policy will separate families and put people’s lives in danger. We must reject ideologies and policies that seek to divide us. All humans have equal rights and worth, and we will keep pushing back against the ongoing dehumanization of our communities.I’m co-leading legislation to block presidents from issuing these travel bans. And this month, in a Financial Services Committee hearing, I made sure everyone knew how Trump is using his office to further enrich himself. Just since taking office in January, Trump’s personal fortune increased by $2.9 billion—through shameless abuses of power and corrupt cryptocurrency schemes. These are just a few examples of how we’re resisting this administration’s attacks on our communities. I know you’re with me in this fight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: Taking power back from the ultra-wealthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**FIRST:** Donald Trump opened the floodgates — welcoming unelected billionaires to shape our government behind closed doors. He handed them the keys to our democracy, no questions asked.
**THEN:** Together, they worked to push self-serving, authoritarian agendas — gutting federal agencies, signing illegal executive orders, and attacking voting rights.
**NOW:** We’re fighting back.
**Beto is joining Senator Bernie Sanders on the Fighting Oligarchy Tour, holding town halls in Fort Worth and Amarillo,** to sound the alarm on the billionaire takeover of our government. Together, they’re calling out corruption and rallying communities that have been left behind or have Republican Representatives who are too scared to face their constituents.
[**Can you chip in today to help Beto get back on the road again? He doesn’t take a salary from Powered by People but we need your help to cover the costs of Beto hitting the road and hosting town halls.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250614.Oylbxs&refcode=ema20250614-240151&t=1&akid=240151%2E444211%2Ef27pGB)

_Above: It was my honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP to Turning Point USA’s AMERICAFEST, the BIGGEST conservative event in the movement..._ Turning Point USA is doing more than any other organization to stand strong against the Left and inspire young people to believe in FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM again. Our 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states are on the front lines at thousands of high schools and college campuses, as they help transform “Gen Z” into “GEN FREE”! In 2024, Turning Point USA reached an INCREDIBLE 4 BILLION views of our powerful, pro-America content. Our RECORD-SMASHING campus tour brought THOUSANDS of students to each event. _And we helped inspire MILLIONS of young people to register to VOTE!_ **Now, in 2025, Turning Point USA will do EVEN MORE to make GEN Z the MOST PATRIOTIC and MOST CONSERVATIVE youth generation ever ... so we can WIN the American Culture War.** _**[If I can count on your support in this important effort, please make your gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA — and I’ll send you this special art print of President Donald Trump as my thanks.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bddb0f54137340e0925e66342accd9d6&_e=MEdgC2nGWosTu4Pl80mVkhlYJhtW8pm1SIHGlF-tEoiJaZ4J8Y-yZ_STj4pvTNGBgI260bPpCW-8hmdbQ5LzKDtCIluQ6DRhXCUUnOnGdLwRPD1MzGOlGPBUAktpluOli4DhqZYkHbH4A2ChkiecvEuo82h8sPRUpvXk7CIDVld3yWcF5jfuN6zpJ9LBArMVQAKYEyAmJrefgk9Yt_4XsHX8KD3CqF2EEgn0YYyCiNQSzukP6TclaPMEnGF1YBLDyAyOPUgAiUchLqCe3bsp7YXZLxeyQOcCiecHFKr60-IJ5zlZ87_7iMAfEsGUao72)**_

The Left is in retreat. _But they are still a well-funded and well-organized opposition, and they won’t give up their 50-year control of America’s young people without a fight._ That’s why Turning Point USA is going ALL OUT to keep up our incredible momentum from 2024 — and do all we can to achieve permanent generational change and MAJOR VICTORIES over the “Woke” Left in 2025. _**[Please make your gift of ANY amount today to stand with me and Turning Point USA at this important moment in time, and I’ll send YOU this special drawing of President Donald Trump as my thanks.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bddb0f54137340e0925e66342accd9d6&_e=MEdgC2nGWosTu4Pl80mVkhlYJhtW8pm1SIHGlF-tEoiJaZ4J8Y-yZ_STj4pvTNGBgI260bPpCW-8hmdbQ5LzKDtCIluQ6DRhXCUUnOnGdLwRPD1MzGOlGPBUAktpluOli4DhqZYkHbH4A2ChkiecvFNQ6ITRr_zfgFmaqA2YNHajcXhdh-76uQhJVZZwxK-7ygfhRxYkQcTyzp1vOQuCCwlTKSearp_b1lD_Yy7zO37QiCiYJ1Mk1p-MCQUXSkWeCf7TKR_VYJ1LW_ipaVmIdVn-cHByMJVQx4OYUKtkVrskhMW9PmoUITd6pII5jbq6)**_ Thank you for your patriotism and your support. clean_body: The Left HATES That We Did This Your gift of any amount helps inspire the next generation to LOVE AMERICA again. | | | Peter, I want to send you a limited-edition art print of America’s 47th President: Donald Trump. Whether you keep this for yourself or gift it to someone else, you’ll appreciate the BOLD and UNAPOLOGETIC memento of the PRO-AMERICA spirit that’s inspiring MILLIONS of young people to believe in AMERICAN GREATNESS again! Above: It was my honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP to Turning Point USA’s AMERICAFEST, the BIGGEST conservative event in the movement... Turning Point USA is doing more than any other organization to stand strong against the Left and inspire young people to believe in FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM again. Our 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states are on the front lines at thousands of high schools and college campuses, as they help transform “Gen Z” into “GEN FREE”! In 2024, Turning Point USA reached an INCREDIBLE 4 BILLION views of our powerful, pro-America content. Our RECORD-SMASHING campus tour brought THOUSANDS of students to each event. And we helped inspire MILLIONS of young people to register to VOTE! Now, in 2025, Turning Point USA will do EVEN MORE to make GEN Z the MOST PATRIOTIC and MOST CONSERVATIVE youth generation ever ... so we can WIN the American Culture War. Make no mistake, Peter. The Left is in retreat. But they are still a well-funded and well-organized opposition, and they won’t give up their 50-year control of America’s young people without a fight. That’s why Turning Point USA is going ALL OUT to keep up our incredible momentum from 2024 — and do all we can to achieve permanent generational change and MAJOR VICTORIES over the “Woke” Left in 2025. Thank you for your patriotism and your support. Together, we can inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again this year! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: The Blue Dogs
subject: The GOP’s budget is big, but not beautiful
body:
Here’s the ugly truth.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109588127/551584457/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3MTIxMmE4LTM4NDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmL3RljVKrWa8rlKDEm65bSsyX7zEh4fSY4lKLtY39I=) | Peter, The GOP’s latest budget bill may be big — adding over $4 trillion to the national debt — but it’s far from _beautiful._ Here’s the ugly truth: ✅ Millions could lose their health care
✅ Food assistance programs would be gutted
✅ Our economy will be in serious risk [_**Republicans are trying to ram this through _before the July 4th holiday._ We need to act now. Will you sign our petition to oppose this reckless budget?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109588129/551584459/-278283584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3MTIxMmE4LTM4NDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmL3RljVKrWa8rlKDEm65bSsyX7zEh4fSY4lKLtY39I=&emci=8b596fa5-9148-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e71212a8-3849-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15125741) [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109588131/551584461/-278283584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3MTIxMmE4LTM4NDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmL3RljVKrWa8rlKDEm65bSsyX7zEh4fSY4lKLtY39I=&emci=8b596fa5-9148-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e71212a8-3849-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15125741) Let’s look at what this means for everyday Americans:
* By 2034, the debt-to-GDP ratio could hit **125%**
* Interest payments may exceed **$2 trillion a year,** burying us deeper in debt
* Our national credit rating could drop —**again**
* Inflation and interest rates will rise, **hurting families and small businesses**

**Is it so important to our colleagues across the aisle to give a handout to their ultra-wealthy buddies that they would take healthcare and food assistance away from struggling Americans and strap the rest of us with even more crushing debt?** Since our founding in the 1990s, the Blue Dogs have led the charge on fiscal responsibility. Every one of our members voted _against_ this budget. Now, we need your voice too. [_**Will you please join us by signing our petition to oppose the GOP’s budget today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109588133/551584463/-278283584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3MTIxMmE4LTM4NDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmL3RljVKrWa8rlKDEm65bSsyX7zEh4fSY4lKLtY39I=&emci=8b596fa5-9148-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e71212a8-3849-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15125741) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109588135/551584465/-278283584?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3MTIxMmE4LTM4NDktZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QmL3RljVKrWa8rlKDEm65bSsyX7zEh4fSY4lKLtY39I=&emci=8b596fa5-9148-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e71212a8-3849-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15125741) Thank you for standing with us,
– The Blue Dogs

**// SENATE BATTLEGROUND CAMPAIGN MEMO [FOR INTERNAL USE ONLY]**

**TO** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
**FROM** : Jason Thielman, Campaign Chairman
**DATE** : June 13, 2025
**SUBJECT** : Defending Montana’s Battleground Senate Seat
* * *

**Senate Battleground Campaign Memo**

The Election to defend Montana’s battleground Republican Senate seat is over a year away. To keep this seat in Republican hands we need to start raising the money and building the campaign infrastructure needed to win right now.

Democrats in Montana spent $90 million in 2024’s extremely close election. Democrat spending on TV and online advertising alone drove ad rates to record highs. They’re already training staff, testing their messaging, and raising money for 2026.

What does that mean for Senator Daines’ re-election campaign? The number one priority right now is for Senator Daines to hit every fundraising objective going forward to match whatever the Democrats raise and lay the foundation for one of the most expensive races in the country.

[Your donation ahead of Sunday's final mid-month deadline of our second fundraising quarter of the election will allow our campaign to:](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9489f2e08fdc419a9d931c1cee473fb8&_e=dKF43zKvxAHB2RrxmI8DHYb_OO_XDN2Rsx_I-22zlW3kBaW_mB9SdiJFsKfcH0SccvvjqEk_fdkkKrLCL4xRlViVUPu8EcMFtt-Pif2CRszVnPhegbnLW5IngbBQNu6tW9DE_Y3uV8s9Li96hWju3UQ4jOfQlcfur9gjkFEf80-5s79yQDnxXpgRIVHgiaitbzxy4WhR4h9_mJqh5tm6ZdrdB1AtZMLQJK45cvUF1Oi7SjnYmbA28OlnnJ9nzdIFdLSC12f4Z0qSuegfPJNCgc4A1CZMf4iTsA61NduhCTfESvqsB87xjuLV_L7xVtdgdnc5CoAZ6zBu5RCFNKJgvmppLoOxjYGRea5iNL2Df3X5Hzc34I0zjg0cve2S9Fk18TgCBmrKfVs-4uKKaQX9lzBoQP-wmiJtYSDV8oh02sY%3D)
1. Hire the best campaign staff in the Country to turn out Republican and Independent voters who support President Trump and his plan to Save America.
2. Plan and coordinate a comprehensive digital and TV advertising campaign that will get Sen. Daines’ winning message to every voter in Montana.

Every political expert in the country agrees -- Montana will be a battleground race in 2026 and critical to defending our Republican Majority. That’s why Democrats will shatter fundraising records to buy this seat. We have a lot of work to do if we’re going to match the Democrats dollar-for-dollar in this race.

[Grassroots contributions from elite Republican supporters like you, are a key component to building the groundwork for what will be one of the most expensive Senate races in the Country.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9489f2e08fdc419a9d931c1cee473fb8&_e=dKF43zKvxAHB2RrxmI8DHYb_OO_XDN2Rsx_I-22zlW3kBaW_mB9SdiJFsKfcH0SccvvjqEk_fdkkKrLCL4xRlViVUPu8EcMFtt-Pif2CRszVnPhegbnLW5IngbBQNu6tW9DE_Y3uV8s9Li96hWju3UQ4jOfQlcfur9gjkFEf80-5s79yQDnxXpgRIVHgiaitbzxy4WhR4h9_mJqh5tm6ZdrdB1AtZMLQJK45cvUF1Oi7SjnYmbA28OlnnJ9nzdIFdLSC12f4Z0qSuegfPJNCgav9jrh-oxBMpsu9iDVJg6xXGgvPcMYV07l_1Sh2rJiv9XL9eYElxd8mT2M15DXDl4mXEJoj65TrLhznIG2T-3OxAgKyPhMFabEozVaZx2nOkGgpV-VcrkQuyP8MeIuxPC_xbWyC_M8JHvtnSRODTpc%3D)

Defend Montana and defend our Republican Majority!

\- **Jason Thielman,** Campaign Chairman
Steve Daines for Senate

clean_body: For your internal use only, DO NOT share. | // SENATE BATTLEGROUND CAMPAIGN MEMO [FOR INTERNAL USE ONLY] TO : dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM : Jason Thielman, Campaign Chairman DATE : June 13, 2025 SUBJECT : Defending Montana’s Battleground Senate Seat Senate Battleground Campaign Memo The Election to defend Montana’s battleground Republican Senate seat is over a year away. To keep this seat in Republican hands we need to start raising the money and building the campaign infrastructure needed to win right now. Democrats in Montana spent $90 million in 2024’s extremely close election. Democrat spending on TV and online advertising alone drove ad rates to record highs. They’re already training staff, testing their messaging, and raising money for 2026. What does that mean for Senator Daines’ re-election campaign? The number one priority right now is for Senator Daines to hit every fundraising objective going forward to match whatever the Democrats raise and lay the foundation for one of the most expensive races in the country. 1. Hire the best campaign staff in the Country to turn out Republican and Independent voters who support President Trump and his plan to Save America. 2. Plan and coordinate a comprehensive digital and TV advertising campaign that will get Sen. Daines’ winning message to every voter in Montana. Every political expert in the country agrees -- Montana will be a battleground race in 2026 and critical to defending our Republican Majority. That’s why Democrats will shatter fundraising records to buy this seat. We have a lot of work to do if we’re going to match the Democrats dollar-for-dollar in this race. Defend Montana and defend our Republican Majority! \- Jason Thielman, Campaign Chairman Steve Daines for Senate Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines ** | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

name: Sarah McBride
subject: As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be times like this

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109589372/551587983/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_061425_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ1MjYyZS0zYTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_TGIQCk6Zqm8_8Lvhdm3MNJqS8cdbclAOzeK4SEYgA=) Hi Peter, it's Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me. **As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.** I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day. I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and the Democratic Party of Georgia standing with me. [If I can count on your support this Pride Month, split a donation of $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today. Every donation helps me defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109589373/551587984/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_061425_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ1MjYyZS0zYTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_TGIQCk6Zqm8_8Lvhdm3MNJqS8cdbclAOzeK4SEYgA=) | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109589374/551587985/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_061425_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ1MjYyZS0zYTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_TGIQCk6Zqm8_8Lvhdm3MNJqS8cdbclAOzeK4SEYgA=)**

Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. **Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**
That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.
[So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider making a split donation of $10 between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109589375/551587986/-1778669283?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_061425_MCBRIDESPLIT_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ1MjYyZS0zYTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W_TGIQCk6Zqm8_8Lvhdm3MNJqS8cdbclAOzeK4SEYgA=)

clean_body: I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | = Hi Peter, it's Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me. As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues. I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day. I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and the Democratic Party of Georgia standing with me. = | | = Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me. Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it. That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split evenly between Sarah McBride and the Democratic Party of Georgia: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you and Happy Pride! | | | Kristi Noem was wildly unqualified to lead Homeland Security when she was nominated, and has shown herself to be incredibly incompetent as its leader, and just a truly horrible person. She just sat there, while a sitting senator was assaulted, and did nothing. She said she would use troops to "liberate" Los Angeles from socialists (WTF?). She needs to go NOW. America can't risk having someone this clueless and dangerous responsible for the nation's security.
