subject: They compared us to Nazis. Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Tim Walz compared ICE agents - Americans who risk their lives enforcing the law - to the Gestapo. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3078c6944c6a4b9a8476dd1194608798&_e=GKcAcnvTsB7_PMBZkNgWiMNWziGrq3E1T2SzWoo6QigQYZKv1yzxCZYPen7NXicHymMEhFBVkH9xJm5fzX5WLFNJJWBCIqYc_YCrQ5eJuQmqJ5mwCNplYauPnPAChcFz5sfoZvAbkDVNRnIeQXujI1NFDk7oC9fEh2aT48FLvNY76Q47ciRGZkZCixCc0vXOHs97-ZTEV4o4N1cgCwmvc8UhMiXZESy29NnNKLv5fXkXGwB-hD5WcP5hHcNgY0-hIEOxw7oSZWY1echwA3aTVSfurMX2bnDw-4DgFNsukT_zdNHPMjga-PFK9iRSaBdPICtRh8Ft1PKh7ogLv0xL2FcBW3mDPXr6Ygm98_fvy9VERagtJlbUrNdk7x_7-4GVBCDnBZxA26QiZySVAnku-f5tZo8ZaSsOPc5UCXBG88I%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

You don’t call law enforcement Nazis unless you’ve decided you don’t believe in laws. That’s what Tim Walz did. He compared ICE agents—Americans who risk their lives enforcing the law—to the Gestapo.

_**Let that sink in.
**_
**These aren’t slip-ups. This is the modern Left’s playbook:**
* Undermine the rule of law.

* Demonize law enforcement.

* Accuse ordinary Americans of extremism for wanting basic security.

_**And then they call you a radical.**_

I’m Adam Schwarze. **I’m a former Navy SEAL and Marine who deployed nine times, including in Iraq and Africa, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to stop this madness. I didn’t spend 21 years defending this country just to come home and be called a Nazi by politicians who couldn’t even defend their own cities.**

While Minneapolis was burning in the summer of 2020,**Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, my opponent in the Minnesota Senate race** , was working on a lawsuit against the police. That tells you everything you need to know. **Democrats hide behind lawsuits and frivolous social media posts; Republicans rally behind the American flag and the men and women serving our communities in uniform.**

What they did to our cities was shameful. What they’re doing to our border is dangerous. And what they’re saying about veterans, police officers, and law-abiding citizens is disgusting.

So here’s the truth:
* Enforcing immigration law is not fascism. **It’s federal law.**

* Wanting to deport criminals who prey on Americans is not bigotry. **It’s basic decency.**

* Demanding accountability from a government that lets cities burn is not extreme. **It’s patriotism.**

If you're as outraged as I am, I need your help now. **[Pitch in $5, $10, or $25 to help me take this fight to the U.S. Senate.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3078c6944c6a4b9a8476dd1194608798&_e=GKcAcnvTsB7_PMBZkNgWiMNWziGrq3E1T2SzWoo6QigQYZKv1yzxCZYPen7NXicHymMEhFBVkH9xJm5fzX5WLFNJJWBCIqYc_YCrQ5eJuQmqJ5mwCNplYauPnPAChcFz5sfoZvAbkDVNRnIeQXujI1NFDk7oC9fEh2aT48FLvNY76Q47ciRGZkZCixCc0vXOHs97-ZTEV4o4N1cgCwmvc8UhMiXZESy29NnNKLv5fXkXGwB-hD5WcP5hHcNgY0-hIEOxw7oSZWY1echwA3aTVT3tRTcOvbZYX1AlllyfDmJmeGclEnc9hhLukD3nNjbb1r7pDI9BV7EopYjdxc4RO8rbwjHFRBhk1Il_LW8XfBJZb5CnclrmYoPUrTWk56fZV2GkQi9EMhwsrtm6w7z9UJsbeO5GEuq2Eis1vlTpO6s%3D) **

I'm starting out this race with no money and little name recognition - what I do have is a deep love of this country, and an exemplarily military record. _**I would be humbled if you could spare a few dollars today to ensure my campaign for the U.S. Senate gets off the ground.**_

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3078c6944c6a4b9a8476dd1194608798&_e=GKcAcnvTsB7_PMBZkNgWiMNWziGrq3E1T2SzWoo6QigQYZKv1yzxCZYPen7NXicHymMEhFBVkH9xJm5fzX5WLFNJJWBCIqYc_YCrQ5eJuQmqJ5mwCNplYauPnPAChcFz5sfoZvAbkDVNRnIeQXujI1NFDk7oC9fEh2aT48FLvNY76Q47ciRGZkZCixCc0vXOHs97-ZTEV4o4N1cgCwmvc8UhMiXZESy29NnNKLv5fXkXGwB-hD5WcP5hHcNgY0-hIEOxw7oSZWY1echwA3aTVXxNx6RNRuSUG16ta1AhUFpd0snae53MZ7dwYp30sSmtJ_52K6vdVu2GKKvIXSukMxFPKF396euRkLewfZNOztvguqhHC-9xBnL1KnVb6A6f0Wj31K4lesJ4lymbiMEqk7iwSt0Ytta76Jcm5bOwE8Q%3D) **_
_** [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3078c6944c6a4b9a8476dd1194608798&_e=GKcAcnvTsB7_PMBZkNgWiMNWziGrq3E1T2SzWoo6QigQYZKv1yzxCZYPen7NXicHymMEhFBVkH9xJm5fzX5WLFNJJWBCIqYc_YCrQ5eJuQmqJ5mwCNplYauPnPAChcFz5sfoZvAbkDVNRnIeQXujI1NFDk7oC9fEh2aT48FLvNY76Q47ciRGZkZCixCc0vXOHs97-ZTEV4o4N1cgCwmvc8UhMiXZESy29NnNKLv5fXkXGwB-hD5WcP5hHcNgY0-hIEOxw7oSZWY1echwA3aTVeB0fIPfUqBG_7qF82eDyaFvHAabLHIfCAx2HmpVjK7lo9BIz93pnY6tTJEo7YJ6b7LuXuDnJVkvJizSxv27Hd95_iBz0id26QpaFXRE3xeIUKYW1NIhgNkZqxozUNFqUmn5cV1EHhV-RtTKxx_GHBs%3D)
**This is the battle. Right here. Right now.**

Tim Walz and his radical, militant left-wing lieutenant governor think they can shame us into silence. They think they can call us names until we stop pushing back. They are wrong.

I didn’t come from wealth. I wasn’t groomed for politics. **I earned everything** —from my SEAL trident to my Harvard and Johns Hopkins degrees—through service and sacrifice. And I’m bringing that same grit to this pivotal U.S. Senate race.

But I need reinforcements. And that starts with you, Fellow Conservative.

If you’re tired of watching cities fall apart, borders erased, and law enforcement demonized. And if you’re tired of being told that loving your country makes you a villain, **[then join me.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3078c6944c6a4b9a8476dd1194608798&_e=GKcAcnvTsB7_PMBZkNgWiMNWziGrq3E1T2SzWoo6QigQYZKv1yzxCZYPen7NXicHymMEhFBVkH9xJm5fzX5WLFNJJWBCIqYc_YCrQ5eJuQmqJ5mwCNplYauPnPAChcFz5sfoZvAbkDVNRnIeQXujI1NFDk7oC9fEh2aT48FLvNY76Q47ciRGZkZCixCc0vXOHs97-ZTEV4o4N1cgCwmvc8UhMiXZESy29NnNKLv5fXkXGwB-hD5WcP5hHcNgY0-hIEOxw7oSZWY1echwA3aTVfXvhKMM11hxR2UvLg87wJNUabi0ntinC4wEIU84O6EcwLduYPJCbDgeFVoLp7bpYqDElcBMUn33sBYByQmbm38q4-xqbB5__0EwgtkQz8GFVcyGG6sQPQijrpEBOOhX0pfKqotrbfGgMg1dBRLB5rc%3D)**

Because we’re not the extremists. We’re the ones standing between America and collapse.

[**DONATE TODAY. FIGHT BACK. FLIP THIS SEAT.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=3078c6944c6a4b9a8476dd1194608798&_e=GKcAcnvTsB7_PMBZkNgWiMNWziGrq3E1T2SzWoo6QigQYZKv1yzxCZYPen7NXicHymMEhFBVkH9xJm5fzX5WLFNJJWBCIqYc_YCrQ5eJuQmqJ5mwCNplYauPnPAChcFz5sfoZvAbkDVNRnIeQXujI1NFDk7oC9fEh2aT48FLvNY76Q47ciRGZkZCixCc0vXOHs97-ZTEV4o4N1cgCwmvc8UhMiXZESy29NnNKLv5fXkXGwB-hD5WcP5hHcNgY0-hIEOxw7oSZWY1echwA3aTVZ6lYljbsRtsxXdStQpGl3RJ9lOCqx1yVaof_8u_cALer74dEaUXLrqhiYh_cJYcPlYdaLoM4fvcqnB7FCCZlEVOxeOdkQ50nEZZRkSMdqTmenTReQDp9WLMgDrspOX0IO7uDUuol8_nkmFQ4NMoI8E%3D)

With resolve,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: Tim Walz compared ICE agents - Americans who risk their lives enforcing the law - to the Gestapo. | Fellow Conservative, You don’t call law enforcement Nazis unless you’ve decided you don’t believe in laws. That’s what Tim Walz did. He compared ICE agents—Americans who risk their lives enforcing the law—to the Gestapo. Let that sink in. These aren’t slip-ups. This is the modern Left’s playbook: Undermine the rule of law. Demonize law enforcement. Accuse ordinary Americans of extremism for wanting basic security. And then they call you a radical. I’m Adam Schwarze. I’m a former Navy SEAL and Marine who deployed nine times, including in Iraq and Africa, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to stop this madness. I didn’t spend 21 years defending this country just to come home and be called a Nazi by politicians who couldn’t even defend their own cities. While Minneapolis was burning in the summer of 2020,Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, my opponent in the Minnesota Senate race , was working on a lawsuit against the police. That tells you everything you need to know. Democrats hide behind lawsuits and frivolous social media posts; Republicans rally behind the American flag and the men and women serving our communities in uniform. What they did to our cities was shameful. What they’re doing to our border is dangerous. And what they’re saying about veterans, police officers, and law-abiding citizens is disgusting. So here’s the truth: Enforcing immigration law is not fascism. It’s federal law. Wanting to deport criminals who prey on Americans is not bigotry. It’s basic decency. Demanding accountability from a government that lets cities burn is not extreme. It’s patriotism. If you're as outraged as I am, I need your help now. I'm starting out this race with no money and little name recognition - what I do have is a deep love of this country, and an exemplarily military record. I would be humbled if you could spare a few dollars today to ensure my campaign for the U.S. Senate gets off the ground. This is the battle. Right here. Right now. Tim Walz and his radical, militant left-wing lieutenant governor think they can shame us into silence. They think they can call us names until we stop pushing back. They are wrong. I didn’t come from wealth. I wasn’t groomed for politics. I earned everything —from my SEAL trident to my Harvard and Johns Hopkins degrees—through service and sacrifice. And I’m bringing that same grit to this pivotal U.S. Senate race. But I need reinforcements. And that starts with you, Fellow Conservative. If you’re tired of watching cities fall apart, borders erased, and law enforcement demonized. And if you’re tired of being told that loving your country makes you a villain, Because we’re not the extremists. We’re the ones standing between America and collapse. With resolve, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Delia Ramirez (via Working Families Party)
subject: Trump’s will is not the guiding doctrine of the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Let’s show them we won’t be bullied into silence. | | | Peter, I’m Delia Ramirez — U.S. Representative from Illinois. On Thursday, federal agents assaulted and handcuffed my colleague, Senator Alex Padilla, for attending a press briefing in Los Angeles with Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem and attempting to ask her a question. It’s not just the violence by ICE and federal agents, or the eagerness to bully and manhandle anyone who tries to hold them accountable, that sickens me. **It’s the fact that they tried to intimidate the person FILMING it. Because they don’t want us to bear witness to how often they violate due process.** At a House Oversight Committee hearing just moments after Senator Padilla was handcuffed, I made sure to air the shocking footage in the hearing room itself so that the entire committee and the American public could see: [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0I8bEvbYUa1mkD1U_BMqvxMg3MnKuNAzDhWK4B7oVQ1MsL5-kVWmougpDDQGyo10UH5J6iqzW8mS_NX2x8yn3Qxy_WJubpRVs2iSyjuz7GRZ-5FlFQtIp6UHXPl53OkV2dtRHA_qTo9xlCR67sHlX1imKzq66XhHQ_a587DSFsf-_fuhxrmW2HgezYH77s9859C1perx38jKgh_mcctrkJ3S3mLDYYsCKl1cbNjTlAHNNoYiu4L2a_-Bt434EgQ7NRvbxX3LZQBsDU-R0t4UzvrFsRiwAl8T7Ms1hGh3y7h9ykgHU7JNZWONioFmBN4_Hg/4hc/iHS0f3gRQhqq6RnW8y0qSw/h0/h001.gwO50QQdV2OKZOwpv2p-uod5xksJpft11U48wwQjPQ8) The evidence is right in front of us: the Trump administration is weaponizing the government AND the military against citizens and politicians alike, to exert control and suppress dissent. **At a moment like this, it’s on all of us to speak up even more.** [**Let’s show them we won’t be bullied into silence. Please, add your name today and join me and the Working Families Party in demanding an end to workplace ICE raids and violent escalations.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0I8bEvbYUa1mkD1U_BMqvxMg3MnKuNAzDhWK4B7oVQ1MsL5-kVWmougpDDQGyo10UH5J6iqzW8mS_NX2x8yn3Qxy_WJubpRVs2iSyjuz7GRZgWWmT5SHmRCMRIlTYPD0Urmx09mo962Usx9QZNI5q20X_qxYGFDfMRwhOmjxFqIQNVHhyJEToGPy711IZJfzorw78uDeS-sGaVGl0WeFYDu62DllSfN_qFALyS1bTyD_DVd1utReRiOcmb43VUz-boE_7k7q8Y7GrY6zHAfhv_1txRAKjbwhboiZMVAalJgPkIBPztSTKCW8J-cZZjSkOg/4hc/iHS0f3gRQhqq6RnW8y0qSw/h1/h001.uyqIjz0lYqccf6jnE2aa-8Lq5ANJsqnbCD-Ub4xi6k0) **[Add your name »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0I8bEvbYUa1mkD1U_BMqvxMg3MnKuNAzDhWK4B7oVQ1MsL5-kVWmougpDDQGyo10UH5J6iqzW8mS_NX2x8yn3Qxy_WJubpRVs2iSyjuz7GRZVm8xy6FXSdSeAwGvP2-5AdGFOnqryAmpPW27p2TRGh72lmQDe14qvoIcx4PgXUXQZ-kW8zErl_l5YJl5rFtuyYnnGvnE1N7r1BdGA7Vpd2zDlIFnrSNi8Gty8ZVxn1Z7q7xcKTjhYKM0nVAwKSJU9X1ZXMlqsdsFbVaETYpo05zr3BHTnOks6ab9rMNRAFzSALEwvjo7OSReG89Zff7Ydg/4hc/iHS0f3gRQhqq6RnW8y0qSw/h2/h001.63TqbrbTUfQFO2ADpF4tkzK2nQfVmVEwnbOjpO5N_AQ)** This administration’s violence and attempts to provoke chaos are no accident — they're deliberate policy choices. They’ve now gone after a mayor, a U.S. Senator, a national labor leader, and sent the _military_ after hundreds of peaceful protesters just this week alone. But I refuse to let that stop me. Because the last time I checked, **we don't live in a dictatorship or a monarchy. Trump's will is NOT the guiding doctrine of our nation, and our country is not a playground for his twisted authoritarian fantasies.** That’s why we cannot buckle or yield when Trump or anyone else tries to silence us. We need to get even louder. [**Add your name today and join me and the Working Families Party in demanding an end to workplace ICE raids and their violent escalations in our communities.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRIewuyjyAfuswR9y9SJ-tpLxBPPhg2GQPAiB_KjR30x0I8bEvbYUa1mkD1U_BMqvxMg3MnKuNAzDhWK4B7oVQ1MsL5-kVWmougpDDQGyo10UH5J6iqzW8mS_NX2x8yn3Qxy_WJubpRVs2iSyjuz7GRZldhjhobi-TG00kx0eJr6mXVPERMGqZNOVlnsxCOmHKrJphe0JAkxcBFpC6WsZk6AuwJXZAs3RDnENDkaCuNUy55uCVMeaHkZzPoCuR8Kc9qQuP1fjSLicXUGCScT2fVZ4MhKK5gocTFKHd32SeESdF1QlqOMoIAGq83bIDPFr7hdpJY29-6ezzlW61ChHZKXl2LgsMS9k6wUHYokUPkKgg/4hc/iHS0f3gRQhqq6RnW8y0qSw/h3/h001.mIvtjHMZTWttayjJ71q6UVxqoNxalpskshsu8X2wemE) In solidarity, Rep. clean_body: Let’s show them we won’t be bullied into silence. | | | Peter, I’m Delia Ramirez — U.S. Representative from Illinois. On Thursday, federal agents assaulted and handcuffed my colleague, Senator Alex Padilla, for attending a press briefing in Los Angeles with Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem and attempting to ask her a question. It’s not just the violence by ICE and federal agents, or the eagerness to bully and manhandle anyone who tries to hold them accountable, that sickens me. It’s the fact that they tried to intimidate the person FILMING it. Because they don’t want us to bear witness to how often they violate due process. At a House Oversight Committee hearing just moments after Senator Padilla was handcuffed, I made sure to air the shocking footage in the hearing room itself so that the entire committee and the American public could see: The evidence is right in front of us: the Trump administration is weaponizing the government AND the military against citizens and politicians alike, to exert control and suppress dissent. At a moment like this, it’s on all of us to speak up even more. This administration’s violence and attempts to provoke chaos are no accident — they're deliberate policy choices. They’ve now gone after a mayor, a U.S. Senator, a national labor leader, and sent the military after hundreds of peaceful protesters just this week alone. But I refuse to let that stop me. Because the last time I checked, we don't live in a dictatorship or a monarchy. Trump's will is NOT the guiding doctrine of our nation, and our country is not a playground for his twisted authoritarian fantasies. That’s why we cannot buckle or yield when Trump or anyone else tries to silence us. We need to get even louder. In solidarity, Rep. Delia Ramirez Illinois’ 3rd Congressional District Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers
body:
...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.| | |
---
| | Dear Patriot, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... Peter,

When Donald Trump decided to organize a military parade for his birthday today, I was reminded of a passage from one of my favorite poems by Langston Hughes, _Let America Be America Again_ : _Let America be the dream the dreamers dreamed—
Let it be that great strong land of love
Where never kings connive nor tyrants scheme
That any man be crushed by one above. _ While Trump throws himself a birthday parade worth over $25 million in taxpayer money, he’s prioritized cutting essential government services in healthcare, education, and more with the sole purpose of lining his pockets and the pockets of the billionaires in his inner circle. His intent is to crush those below him in favor of his own self-interest.

Many of you may be participating in one of the many No Kings day protests around the country today, and I want you to know that I stand with you. I work every day in Congress to fight back, but this is a moment that requires all of us to stand together.

That’s why I’m calling on all of us to raise our voices and _let America be the dream that dreamers dreamed_. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, When Donald Trump decided to organize a military parade for his birthday today, I was reminded of a passage from one of my favorite poems by Langston Hughes, Let America Be America Again : Let America be the dream the dreamers dreamed— Let it be that great strong land of love Where never kings connive nor tyrants scheme That any man be crushed by one above. While Trump throws himself a birthday parade worth over $25 million in taxpayer money, he’s prioritized cutting essential government services in healthcare, education, and more with the sole purpose of lining his pockets and the pockets of the billionaires in his inner circle. His intent is to crush those below him in favor of his own self-interest. Many of you may be participating in one of the many No Kings day protests around the country today, and I want you to know that I stand with you. I work every day in Congress to fight back, but this is a moment that requires all of us to stand together. That’s why I’m calling on all of us to raise our voices and let America be the dream that dreamers dreamed. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Patriot,
---
When the Radical Democrats arrested me and forced me into bankruptcy, even my most cherished personal possessions were almost stripped from me.
---
A watch I was gifted as America’s Mayor from our overseas allies after the tragedy of 9/11 was nearly gone – nearly taken as a form of “collections” last year:
---
**“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”** [SOURCE: _CNBC_]
---
_...But thanks to the support of friends and patriots like you, I’ve been able to defend myself, remain a free man, and retain my home and personal property._
---
**Now, when I put on that watch, I’m reminded of _YOU_ and your generosity – _truly_!**
---
The Deep State and the leftist media labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING.” They pushed me to the point of bankruptcy. And they stripped me of my law license.
---
_I was without resources and left with no means to defend myself._
---
**But that’s when patriots like YOU came rushing to my defense.**
---
It’s all because of your support that I was able to assemble the legal defense team needed to win and remain a free man thus far.
---
_But I’ll be honest with you, my fight is far from over._
---
**I have _ONE_ _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ yet to face... **
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY, the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757...**
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAURb_G7ED42dhkwaJTxCw6nVbpYjSryPWzE1cYGBuDkq-vQCjb845877XyU-_svSHyhQDcHEYCQNg3AvD1ufqQ_vkfr7l8fX_kX-LdV9sVvh_qAk950Eos65_P4W98i2exRP44fyz0qc_3yTzlI7QwXrl-o7LNsGEWS56Zhkp-OtGaSpbdGosWBQfLpGR1rUEKzgScallZtKKimWughKoUlFMBwOuCWcVrJVEbKrWwlPByzymUN8FpReO8qhDG0Rd69Fnf3OZ5inuxjkAXjU7BFKsbgsHNINCFhPf86lLv1OByG4zB0ec2DZjLk2IKrSLQAaKthayogtpW3GzvsS7N_qKVn5S7DoS1R1lGQGwXb9AlT1h7fMUOZxP8rkooL2ugB45jCtoQ1p4_Li8H0-Mwm2EmrP319vN3FhqcVtf3LgpJeHndd28rlwb-BwAA__8BsZaD)
__
---

clean_body: Words can’t do it justice... I’m eternally grateful. Words can’t do it justice... I’m eternally grateful. | Patriot, When the Radical Democrats arrested me and forced me into bankruptcy, even my most cherished personal possessions were almost stripped from me. A watch I was gifted as America’s Mayor from our overseas allies after the tragedy of 9/11 was nearly gone – nearly taken as a form of “collections” last year: “Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection” [SOURCE: CNBC] ...But thanks to the support of friends and patriots like you, I’ve been able to defend myself, remain a free man, and retain my home and personal property. Now, when I put on that watch, I’m reminded of YOU and your generosity – truly! The Deep State and the leftist media labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING.” They pushed me to the point of bankruptcy. And they stripped me of my law license. I was without resources and left with no means to defend myself. But that’s when patriots like YOU came rushing to my defense. It’s all because of your support that I was able to assemble the legal defense team needed to win and remain a free man thus far. But I’ll be honest with you, my fight is far from over. I have ONE FINAL BATTLE yet to face... If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old! And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus state-level charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon. But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY, the TRUTH remains... ...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter. Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m still FIGHTING BACK. When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under booking # 2313757... So, to show them that good, honest, and generous Americans like YOU will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your continued support to raise $231,375.70 for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

For the past 18 months, ActBlue — the donation processing platform overwhelming used by Democrats, including Alexandria — has produced over 3,500 pieces of evidence in response to subpoenas from GOP-led congressional inquiries.
Then in April, **Donald Trump issued an order targeting ActBlue** in a direct attempt to make it harder for Democrats to run winning campaigns.
Now, ActBlue is fighting back.
Trump is attacking ActBlue while his whole presidency began with bribery and corruption: meme coins and crypto to fleece normal people and move money in the dark. An exclusive dinner and tour of the White House was just offered for top holders of $TRUMP, causing the coin to surge.
This is what oligarchy and fascism feels like. Not someday. **Right now.**
Alexandria is not afraid to challenge right-wing extremists — but she can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her.
[Will you donate $5 right now to power Alexandria's fight against Trump's extremism? Every single contribution will make a difference in our fight for our democracy. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250614.fT0gKX&refcode=em20250614-9094-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9094%2E2526796%2E42564o)

subject: Don’t let the media rewrite our founding
body:
There’s been a lot of talk lately about the separation of powers—especially as federal judges issue a wave of rulings that seem to defy the will of the people.

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/yRZryNaIcYU-ifbzdLyxJWXY31eQslyrTWCUz3hkN4XfkCrV0Wkg46N0KvFNZexxVUFOEpn1GXWBN-SWBRTtX-fYUvnuyUxJ--350o5Q_lI5ur8xi4hXsajthJi_nf5b_CltBkRoYWJ682-bgrHN0yv2jLEy90BXJLSOQNr6Fn8Fnv5zDgZwCugt/M36BqfJ5rfuoiCZKIRPWFxpVCNGpOQ9i/9)_

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/gGwm_I2KxQj8Va3-ksiDsLQPN8PoSyN5DFaEx_52kaIGWZau8Du6tknx7CikMt9gYFx78C2xjXuGvMHGvA_-wyAsWReV_aGAOP84Oxd3FXqZvFm_Ll2DyZarfxxZAuvQri8UoBj_a_Swrh8VIiYJmz8_CGs_al9mtbrtEj5tmueyTyJpfH93CWi6eZC1ia1EZ5dSjVVuEcxFuTReAYdXtSn4hA1aW8dosIbb0byeMFlOeZyMMZuumGrvL9QOJOGZAWkqxRAJHvBVbHPagm88dMVvjREAINeZxXsSz-c538eqBrBjP9dGDJ0jDelxUlRufXcOhrHqBu3IM3xaiz5pT52dBgTz_L2KYhjCHV6FlitR1rEeriPCFVn0gKdsmXHVOQK7_aqbisb_X-2PT6XXIc0g1_NhogFzNb_0UfRKfo2l5Dd1u9bueM3KAhkxIWrnZyMrrlI3NfnWR8TH5icklWt5prZDmqcLqUQ6V1wP4l_RE1B_URHV-iQGcAzHM2NBtu9N1L182rC8_YTC48geg6_E9rroj-vhOxQhzAZjZLip2QKzaZm5grSjjqkvb5rI7z2euyJr0H8JH4fQsKqDMXoe5DAFN6DIlK--oI5B51t-SovdvbCUBuUIE87HmwwhnQn3esU66V-Wqt5aR85TLuz6Gpre6jSekXWPkG-tehqXmKi-75cZzIWHmWZBQxM-Dav37SD7d5YA7xSNzSwfXo95dX2g5-wympyYfR0s5rCFuTetqJeQXRBa3Zzc1jWtJoFw1REGFQ/1JGFy_C9jiUUrmJYXAQustIhJw0zdyyS/9) Dear Friend, There's been a lot of talk lately about the separation of powers--especially as federal judges issue a wave of rulings that seem to defy the will of the people.

It highlights a pattern we see every few election cycles.

When in power, the far-Left calls the Constitution "outdated" and seeks to overthrow it. When out of power, they claim to uphold it.

But how should defenders of the Constitution, like you, respond to this crisis?

Thankfully, we don't have to guess. The answer lies in _The Federalist Papers_ , written by founding fathers Alexander Hamilton, James Madison, and John Jay to explain and defend the Constitution back in the 1780s.

Thomas Jefferson called them "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written."

**[That’s why, on June 17, Hillsdale College will launch a brand-new free online course: “The Federalist.”](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/rGrOM_m1a0UicNWDs_lB3O8Dn96zbqB0Kn5XqzKYAeCW8If2iyQ4HEmMok88TueOWJ2LhsIhziZcMrPPRXvT34ZS93MJ166xdBlu63xLEnJ7kSPRkwHgckZvIgCgSQFwpaBAE89rOVI5NGU8o_S3uGig2NcCtifFO5CL2i7KS4xJu6GkDvvdG8dxr4Zv9pbvUDNz_yrsSVoBkdodkT6NbA6Akr8_7LYZOqO_HqFcbqEdqkOWORMixQQeQXgs-PjtQuyi2N_5qxw9JRXDB0SbeDiVQblMiBD6Bpmo6dN1Cga7MFflv7AzyvzmwJ9L_hHETGLlxjvfryTk8MIgyjcwTocwmcvTA-6rhz8lzWXAFYxXFylNb9OtqNbR1zrlxRI140aZIYESYDXwf4HzUTY5SDNJs7u6mMOy9WGDtbgQ-059Lb0bxs4yLJ0MHQmF7TQxhAYN9iZrdBuVhTwWyozR2G0pprjLAJ5z6xn-KyAJt4loo04MjF0eR34Dw7ntrrR12VxzkbJOxqaD13k1nrg9670fnzznYZ0X1zpdUcETeAuh3Sn73tdIrp5MXOBwUNoym0OUOZ2hP0drEQRX07MM-5qBL2AIYytpmU9nwhzXj7AcIKvYyU5MIm6LZnP996W_PWXun2I02Yf38a59uxUtpERtw5NFRA1c_xivuWSNvdMTFUzGc_6ojqnXAsTpZOgd2ax60FlFN9G0bTu7-BxVgigjQkhBVMcl79LurcHDIV9HjSiFiWg_DprilRL7NqEjJ71n0hx25w/TrB_4Fhb48gj0xYPz0aCo5kVANw_DCk3/9) **

Taught by Hillsdale College faculty, this course will help you understand the Constitution straight from the Founders' own words--exactly what's needed in our divided times.

We're still putting the finishing touches on this great new course, so enrollment won't open to the public until late June. However, you have the chance **to be among the first to sign up.**

Don't let the media and the radical Left rewrite the story of America's founding. Learn the truth for yourself--with **" The Federalist"** as your guide.

**Click here today to be one of the first students:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/the-federalist-papers-teaser**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/NCk84kQw2EWbvbXaSYOjXptx-we6ipVZN1iQ1H1uZJXDTlpRGa4YbNZF3XG4esvGswGzWGH-TPmDut-4uV_aevmk7PJmZK7a4gXe1ZH_Eu9S7Uo9a64sNEW3XG1nESf9hYRoebe9rr5vZjgkfkJEtRdDyYcr8LsGxneWCSSgri_rXD8s080DploRuNgOeozIibsMFPLrWBOFgPO_XpEUCKzSAX6xmKLCr4nLqSZBmglv7gDWIMyfA3rlGHuoouQHwOGLhlVt9TDW546vP8sX011KfgDEZLkqLWuFtPOv7rXo0-717ISz4wUVrbvff6WjDgbWm9kzrN-70b2NGRichvmDgP5eTfTlv8vA10Q5f5hm4szKBTAzyJqndC9iTGb9Y9Mvifs_5SsRWWCCf-uBJtkcxu5x2P19Q6a_ZkTIVSfPcJ8Pr6qew8LKGCRCj7VL0gotmInfiEaCqqULckkY5Dzpa-Nw0-I9L3WlJOkdrYe89UToj61N8GKRC-I-vofHqSxMDwHfrT1Vd9kE1Bu16mi4H7O716ohn_HRl9yF7icPUB_uDE5yG4jMOrKpiPV19LDy0nhOcVyuUF2L3BOOeNkzW-7dAkJ4BJmgGzbPMP9pWiyS7CuENiQzeqGm6pLtK6PfB2Z30fZd-4bDCbGzOBKcCoFxbdKSX-xlxfUH4s7clmUEMDPjYVvWdXMF5PupksuyeO6BhIOU-PJcaXTo1Xi1gRfNwFQBDJZzTK1eMat1XiasqhNXYWVnEbrvOoTom03Ltixsxg/bMcYLzvBeNEJJbbWRkr-u4B-iuGMiNgE/9)

Warm regards,

We're still putting the finishing touches on this great new course, so enrollment won't open to the public until late June. However, you have the chance to be among the first to sign up. Don't let the media and the radical Left rewrite the story of America's founding. Learn the truth for yourself--with " The Federalist" as your guide. Click here today to be one of the first students: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College |

_These are three powerful reminders of what it means to be American._

We're asking every patriot:

[🇺🇸 **Will you fly the American flag?

[_**Complete your patriotic profile to stand for faith, freedom, and the flag.**_](http://links.teamnrsc.co/u/click?_t=aff6d619248e4524b6f468bb9c83f15c&_m=8f5c3a779f20436ba9f562736ba9df2c&_e=3bAc2luA_xWJsEcsJkxmJ3oRNVxi7oKD9lF9fA62pVo6THjKoozEWlik6gyqzo3Hk_Qaahh65yoFqbBZhbvu8gDxdYWjSyBX2AdGCw9DXmrs6jd62aaW5ETnOVuKS8f4M7t2XkTRczPGns2fQ7neqVL3RE_cPHnRUvc1kp7ZBd6rkiOalRkoysvCQ6Li21QagvCz-bFD2yCIkhWVuX1sm8t-K5A5gJdDWTL69_cB-g56bDBsyJWvnMp9LqnOvuGQniSnKAVRTVij2hmLWc2qVTX1klRHBXjjPWWYhT2comr50zipxr_zxvG9CheElX9EDVnBJF5XCldEIQJwSRstPxF2iZjBrjTGufULsg3j7mWEwH8QKo14r0L-TxYyG91DVKYILilT6H_8UY8VL8Sn_1hfMMxzZv0R6mUdDAiRO3oK6dCwqnxmQfAbiCTfGDMgxZHdXSwESZO1au0Py-uw9pP_WgH17_MmpAm52BZ5ICw%3D)

Your support helps us defend everything Flag Day stands for--from the Constitution to the values President Trump has championed.

body:
|
#
Hi there, I wanted to personally reach out and ask if you could make an urgent [_**$3 donation**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109591688/551596615/701031030?refcode=em-6.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFhMDc3MDktNDE0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=31H49EoqilovPt79TbknFJTQSr7zo67C_4VFYDShPlI=) today. Here's why: We’re just two weeks away from the first major fundraising deadline of my campaign for Congress. When this deadline hits, we’ll have to submit our first report to the FEC. **This will be our first major test, and everyone – the press, the pundits, our opponents – will comb through our report to see if we have what it takes to win this race.** [**Unfortunately, we’re falling a bit short of our goal, and****$3 from you will help get us back on track. Will you chip in now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109591695/551596631/701031030?refcode=em-6.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFhMDc3MDktNDE0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=31H49EoqilovPt79TbknFJTQSr7zo67C_4VFYDShPlI=) | | [DONATE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109591700/551596650/701031030?refcode=em-6.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFhMDc3MDktNDE0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=31H49EoqilovPt79TbknFJTQSr7zo67C_4VFYDShPlI=)

Building grassroots strength now is critical to proving that we have the resources to go the distance – especially in a race as expensive as this one.
As a reminder, GOP dark money groups have already started airing ads propping up my opponent on TV – over a year out from Election Day – and you can bet more are on the way.
They’re trying to define this race early, flood the airwaves, and drown out our message before we’ve even had a chance to make our case.
That’s why your support is so important today:
[**Please make a $3 contribution to my campaign today. If we want to take back the House, we must flip key toss-up districts like CA-22.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109591701/551596666/701031030?refcode=em-6.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWFhMDc3MDktNDE0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=31H49EoqilovPt79TbknFJTQSr7zo67C_4VFYDShPlI=)

Peter, It's Donald Trump’s birthday today. To celebrate, he’s spending _$45 million of taxpayers’ money_ on a self-congratulatory military parade. Unsurprisingly, Thom Tillis has been radio silent about this waste of resources — **but working families in North Carolina and across the country aren’t.** Millions of people nationwide will “celebrate” Trump’s birthday by marching in the streets for "No Kings Day," sending a clear message that **America will never have a king. ** What we’re dealing with isn’t business as usual. Our president is spending resources frivolously while pushing a budget that slashes food assistance programs and rips away health care from seniors. He’s brazenly challenging due process, the rule of law, and freedom of speech. Doing more of the same isn’t an option, Peter. name: John James
subject: 🇺🇸 Honoring our flag. Defending our future.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
This Flag Day, stand with me in the fight for America.| | | Dear Friend, This Flag Day, we honor the symbol that has flown over battlefields, front porches, and generations of Americans who believe in this nation for nearly 250 years. I wore that flag on my shoulder as an Apache pilot in the U.S. Army. I fought alongside heroes who gave everything for the freedoms it represents. And now, I see it flying across Michigan – by families who work hard, raise their kids with faith, and keep the American Dream alive. **But that dream – and everything our flag stands for – is under attack.** Bloated bureaucracy. Corrupt leadership. A Marxist movement that tears America down instead of building her up. **_[I won’t stand by and let it happen.](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=732adfd6b05b46caa4c97b9c05f66dc3&_e=_LtSeP7Jp1uEJ3pDzl-miIRR9LFrFeWzDBcN8SAtIxLnW-8NbCZQMkNDjrPmiRXXphEcSEgT4f8tJ57a4Mt6XWUvYhpoAEOqvRy7ezyHZQgRF1rlN0NmIiW7o1mAH1XjzPcymuvluC8_qVE_abvIt00vbdL9Ch-3aCpVuPz0BUwYqf-Y7wB7bxr4t-vkuBi7T1DxaphPuz1nZJLXRju5e2KPrpt4WpI-YxrpqypJ_JTGPgJXDxBisIQvg3qK9qimN5JX4ovqpz3KdZpbIa0hWQ%3D%3D)_** That’s why I’m running for Governor of Michigan. To defend America First values, restore common sense, and ensure that our children inherit the American Dream. **_This Flag Day, I’m asking you to stand with me._** Your support fuels our fight – and with Michigan as one of the nation’s biggest political battlegrounds, every cent matters.
---

Dear Peter,
---
Today, anti-Trump protests are threatening to erupt across the country, proclaiming “No Kings” Day. Well, they’re right—there’s no king but Jesus!

These riots illustrate the spirit of violence and chaos that has settled over America. But as Believers, we can combat it with praise!

Tonight in Spokane, we’re doing just that—fighting the chaos with praise. Stay tuned for more updates, and if you feel led, please help fund our response to the chaos and violence.

clean_body: We need your help. | = | Peter, We’re going to level with you: Josh is facing the toughest race of his career. Unlike any of his past campaigns, he’s now one of the few Democrats in Congress holding a district that also voted for Donald Trump. In fact, CA-9 had one of the largest swings from Biden to Trump in the entire country. = = Here’s the simple but honest truth: Josh would not be here without the help of Donald Trump voters who split their tickets to vote for Josh, too. The MAGA machine sees a golden opportunity — and they’re going all in to flip this seat. They’ve named Josh one of their top targets in 2026, and national Republicans are already flooding the district with dark money and attacks. Josh has never backed down from a tough fight — especially when it comes to calling out MAGA extremism and defending our democracy. But that courage comes at a cost. This will be one of the most competitive and consequential House races in the country. We’re not exaggerating when we say this seat will decide whether Democrats take back the House and put a check on Trump’s chaos and extremism. If we lose here, there is no way we can protect our democracy. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Every dollar you give today helps Josh stand up to the lies, the attacks, and the GOP Super PACs trying to buy this seat. **_CBS NEWS_ : “Trump tax bill will add $2.4 trillion to the deficit and leave 10.9 million more uninsured, CBO says”** Donald Trump and House Republicans are coming for our health care and food assistance — gutting Medicaid, slashing SNAP — and threatening programs that Southern New Mexico families rely on every day, just to hand the richest people in the country **another** tax break. Families in Las Cruces are worried they won’t be able to afford a doctor’s visit. Kids in Alamagordo could go hungry if they can’t obtain a reduced-price lunch at school. From Grants to Carlsbad, New Mexicans are worried about whether or not the basic support systems that hold our communities together will still be there when we need them. This kind of uncertainty isn’t just stressful — it’s harmful. It robs people of stability, of dignity, and of the peace of mind every family deserves. clean_body: Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | CBS NEWS : “Trump tax bill will add $2.4 trillion to the deficit and leave 10.9 million more uninsured, CBO says” Donald Trump and House Republicans are coming for our health care and food assistance — gutting Medicaid, slashing SNAP — and threatening programs that Southern New Mexico families rely on every day, just to hand the richest people in the country another tax break. Families in Las Cruces are worried they won’t be able to afford a doctor’s visit. Kids in Alamagordo could go hungry if they can’t obtain a reduced-price lunch at school. From Grants to Carlsbad, New Mexicans are worried about whether or not the basic support systems that hold our communities together will still be there when we need them. This kind of uncertainty isn’t just stressful — it’s harmful. It robs people of stability, of dignity, and of the peace of mind every family deserves. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Vasquez | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Team McBride
subject: This is new territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
In our country, we don’t allow kings or dictators.
#
We've entered new territory.
President Trump is abusing our military for political theater and ordering illegal mass raids and deportations that disregard due process.
In our country, we don’t allow kings or dictators. That’s why people are rising up across all 50 states today for the No Kings day of action.
Since day one, Sarah has been outspoken against Trump’s authoritarianism and has fought to protect constitutional rights for all.
Trump wants to attack immigrants and trans people, but attacking the most vulnerable among us is only a distraction while billionaires and politicians work to strip our health care, gut unions, and pick the pockets of everyday Americans.
**We will not be distracted. Sarah is committed to protecting our democracy and will continue to use every tool possible to stop Trump’s authoritarian agenda.**
[**In addition to marching in the streets today — if you’re able to — please chip in to Sarah’s campaign today. Showing a big surge of grassroots support in this moment is a great way to make our voices heard too.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250614-1?refcode=em20250614-2101&refcode2=2101_21716_1NG_Rw&akid=2101%2E21716%2E1NG_Rw)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250614-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250614-2101&refcode2=2101_21716_1NG_Rw&akid=2101%2E21716%2E1NG_Rw)**
We’re just two weeks away from our end-of-quarter deadline, and every bit counts, so we can keep Sarah in Congress fighting for all of us.
Thank you for everything you do.
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250614-1&t=1&refcode2=2101_21716_1NG_Rw&akid=2101%2E21716%2E1NG_Rw)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2101%2E21716%2E1NG_Rw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2101%2E21716%2E1NG_Rw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2101%2E21716%2E1NG_Rw)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: Urgent No Kings Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Authoritarianism Isn’t Coming – It’s Here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1011&refcode=email-20250614_v&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Today, more than half a million Americans are taking to the streets at
2,000+ No Kings Day protests in defiance of Donald Trump's escalating
authoritarianism.

This day of massive protest unfolds as Trump deploys the military to the
streets of Los Angeles against U.S. citizens. As he criminalizes protest
and handcuffs and arrests his political opponents. As he celebrates
himself with a $45 million military parade fit for a dictator.

It is not an exaggeration to say that right now, our democracy hangs in
the balance. And together, we are going to fight for it.

Today, Our Revolution activists organized dozens of events across the
country, sending a clear message to Trump that he is not above the law and
not above democracy. But as Trump doubles down, so must we. This HAS to be
just the beginning of our resistance.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250614nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]That's why Our Revolution is ramping up – and fast – but we urgently need
your help. Can you chip in right now to help us rapidly scale up our
60,000+ Citizen Action Team in key states to ensure a sustained, powerful
movement against Trump’s authoritarianism?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250614nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250614nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250614nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250614nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250614nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250614nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

There’s no denying that this is a terrifying time,
Peter Willis. Because as Our Revolution
Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese warned this week in an op-ed,
authoritarianism isn't coming -- it’s here.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25105?source=email-20250614&t=1060&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Headline: Authoritarianism Isn't Coming — It's Here

And as today’s massive nationwide resistance proves, it’s everyday people
like all of us who are rising up to defend communities that have been
abandoned. It’s the PEOPLE who are going to save us.

Because the unfortunate fact is that as Trump brazenly transforms our
nation into his personal police state, the Democratic establishment has
proven unwilling or unable to rise to the moment. As Joseph said:

“We know we cannot count on the same institutions that have ignored or
dismissed the very communities now under threat. We are turning to the
people—to the organizers, the movement-builders, the working class—to rise
up and defend what remains of our democracy.”

Together, we are stepping up to fill the void and lead by example. But to
be able to stand up to Trump’s tyranny, this movement must continue beyond
today, growing stronger, louder, and more resilient.

At Our Revolution, we're mobilizing to channel today’s vibrant, explosive
energy into targeted grassroots organizing through our Citizen Action
Teams. We are deploying organizers to critical states to mobilize
citizens, hire local staff, and build powerful volunteer networks
committed to protecting our democracy. We've already begun scaling these
programs, but we need your partnership to dramatically expand.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24067?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250614nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]In honor of No Kings Day, can you help fuel the frontline fight against
Trump's authoritarian movement with a donation today? Every dollar raised
directly scales up crucial organizing in key states where it is essential
we stand up and defeat Trumpism once and for all.

Thank you for standing boldly with Our Revolution. Together, we will
ensure that today's electric No Kings protests are more than a powerful
moment – they will become a lasting movement capable of turning the tide.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Website |

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22227?t=1008&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2025 Movement Builder
with a recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22228?t=1009&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/22266?t=1010&akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8865%2E5885482%2EjDJIIL

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Take action: Fund Transportation Electrification and Oregon Community Paths in the Transportation Package!
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/uAfH9wrPc0OinO0hs-OnKg2?contactdata=ul5zJwbwUa7GkFffweMZqsH5ZxkY3UUt59AV/NuTA6pwtO4MneG3hXbyv9RZNC0uzmEH/4oCGr3Wnlt3U+MSPjdjoWEx+ow23YRo+bh1eQf0IZf5X3K2coCBm4Gwlzl2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/uAfH9wrPc0OinO0hs-OnKg2?contactdata=ul5zJwbwUa7GkFffweMZqsH5ZxkY3UUt59AV/NuTA6pwtO4MneG3hXbyv9RZNC0uzmEH/4oCGr3Wnlt3U+MSPjdjoWEx+ow23YRo+bh1eQf0IZf5X3K2coCBm4Gwlzl2]
Dear Peter,
As you may have heard, the transportation package ( HB 2025 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/HB2025] ) dropped earlier this week and there have been hearings all week long. So many of you showed up to make your voices heard in support of a transportation package that works for all Oregonians. Although this bill is better than we expected thanks to all of your support, including important programs like Great Streets and Safe Routes to School, and funding for wildlife crossings and transit, it’s still not quite where we need it to be.
The bill currently does not invest into off-street multi-use paths (Oregon Community Paths) or transportation electrification: vital needs for climate, safety, and mobility that must be funded outside of the state highway fund. Peter, will you tell your legislators that these transportation investments are critical? [https://secure.everyaction.com/uAfH9wrPc0OinO0hs-OnKg2]
Email your legislators! [https://secure.everyaction.com/uAfH9wrPc0OinO0hs-OnKg2?contactdata=ul5zJwbwUa7GkFffweMZqsH5ZxkY3UUt59AV/NuTA6pwtO4MneG3hXbyv9RZNC0uzmEH/4oCGr3Wnlt3U+MSPjdjoWEx+ow23YRo+bh1eQf0IZf5X3K2coCBm4Gwlzl2]
Without funding for medium and heavy duty truck rebates, charging stations, fair access to electric vehicles, or rebates for electric bikes, Oregon will fall short of its climate and public health commitments and this transportation package won’t be a step forward on climate action [https://www.moveoregonforward.org/news/for-immediate-release-oregon-transportation-bill-wins-on-safety-falls-short-on-vehicle-electrification-and-off-street-trails] . Investments in these programs are essential for us to meet our community and transportation needs, reduce toxic air pollution, and meet our climate goals.
Additionally, our communities need multi-use paths for those who walk or bike, so they can safely access off-street pathways to get where they need to go, which is exactly what Oregon Community Paths do. The transportation package’s failure to address the community paths funding crisis puts lives, safety, and access at risk, especially in rural communities where off-street paths are often the only safe alternative to state highways.
Here’s the fix: a 4% tax on luxury vehicles over $75,000 that will pay for transportation electrification and fund Oregon Community Paths. This is a smart and fair way to fill the gaps we’ve been advocating for within the transportation package. This modest surcharge on the state’s most expensive cars would mean that the middle-class has no hit to their wallets while we fulfill our state priorities and commitments, which were overlooked by lawmakers in the current bill. This change to the transportation package will enable needed clean vehicle investments to reduce emissions, protect public health, and support Oregon jobs.
However, this solution is not a sure thing and there are some legislators who are trying to reduce funding that is already in the bill for safety programs, rail, and transit investments. Will you tell your legislator to support taxing luxury cars to fund these needed programs and to preserve the safety, rail, and transit investments already in the bill? [https://secure.everyaction.com/uAfH9wrPc0OinO0hs-OnKg2]
Email your legislators! [https://secure.everyaction.com/uAfH9wrPc0OinO0hs-OnKg2?contactdata=ul5zJwbwUa7GkFffweMZqsH5ZxkY3UUt59AV/NuTA6pwtO4MneG3hXbyv9RZNC0uzmEH/4oCGr3Wnlt3U+MSPjdjoWEx+ow23YRo+bh1eQf0IZf5X3K2coCBm4Gwlzl2]
Thank you for your advocacy,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Eliza.png]
Eliza Walton (she/they)
OLCV Coalition Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

clean_body: [] Dear Peter, As you may have heard, the transportation package ( HB 2025 [] ) dropped earlier this week and there have been hearings all week long. So many of you showed up to make your voices heard in support of a transportation package that works for all Oregonians. Although this bill is better than we expected thanks to all of your support, including important programs like Great Streets and Safe Routes to School, and funding for wildlife crossings and transit, it’s still not quite where we need it to be. The bill currently does not invest into off-street multi-use paths (Oregon Community Paths) or transportation electrification: vital needs for climate, safety, and mobility that must be funded outside of the state highway fund. Peter, will you tell your legislators that these transportation investments are critical? [] Email your legislators! [] Without funding for medium and heavy duty truck rebates, charging stations, fair access to electric vehicles, or rebates for electric bikes, Oregon will fall short of its climate and public health commitments and this transportation package won’t be a step forward on climate action [] . Investments in these programs are essential for us to meet our community and transportation needs, reduce toxic air pollution, and meet our climate goals. Additionally, our communities need multi-use paths for those who walk or bike, so they can safely access off-street pathways to get where they need to go, which is exactly what Oregon Community Paths do. The transportation package’s failure to address the community paths funding crisis puts lives, safety, and access at risk, especially in rural communities where off-street paths are often the only safe alternative to state highways. Here’s the fix: a 4% tax on luxury vehicles over $75,000 that will pay for transportation electrification and fund Oregon Community Paths. This is a smart and fair way to fill the gaps we’ve been advocating for within the transportation package. This modest surcharge on the state’s most expensive cars would mean that the middle-class has no hit to their wallets while we fulfill our state priorities and commitments, which were overlooked by lawmakers in the current bill. This change to the transportation package will enable needed clean vehicle investments to reduce emissions, protect public health, and support Oregon jobs. However, this solution is not a sure thing and there are some legislators who are trying to reduce funding that is already in the bill for safety programs, rail, and transit investments. Will you tell your legislator to support taxing luxury cars to fund these needed programs and to preserve the safety, rail, and transit investments already in the bill? [] Email your legislators! [] Thank you for your advocacy, [] Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director [] [] [] [] Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
I’ve spent my life standing up to injustice, and I’m not stopping now.

| _Joe Kerr is a Democrat, second-generation firefighter, and labor leader running for Congress in CA-40, one of the country's most competitive districts. You are receiving this email because of your support of Democrats in California and across the country. We need your help to flip this seat and take back the House, but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tYtmb3qLrUy6xEubxYRBLQ2?unsubscribedata=m7bCzA%2Bam9AzX1KwNT7hOiXk8tnql%2BgMEmuOwNXHdS4R1bS9hTV6Tn9ilCdOhc5QZeXyn3AG8BftTNW4YZaVTSM%2FQGMJHGC9UJ6RD0gNZXT2DJ2I5t7XTIdFH7BjDP2%2BzIWVkO26nOmGxrHmG14k%2Fct2LMEfdM7oDSEuAUidocV2zdiwrD52dKRhsxFXs%2Bv6rOlGC1ULNtYQU7nWwmTApSs2bqf4eaGTHFXfVvtkMQYDARC%2BNu5HPpp9RPm1ZGYyBymD7O8qBhyQecCLhKkflEcR7fl6UNlizCbcPmMEJRCgBbmuVyFZ4RxBxPP5SXbxCdk6YVcQxCkMKKEQ14%2FGatTXBLNcCM1ca4Wo9UyJDF742BDqmzX%2BB4oHkFvLhoBOOa3UeS%2BwAfxmM1GhmUOea4zdUe0ZA%2FYx%2BwlDxCA9n7fYmEsYGh3Y7AZ8oNh7qmYX)._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109594304/551605983/-40941803?refcode=BLU_EM_JKC_2025-06-14_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NkODZhNzItNDk0OS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RVNUv_D3gClo4HzCR2jPLZKGSPT0I3YCYDhLQoJt2IA=)

| Peter,

I refuse to sit back and watch as Donald Trump sends federal forces into Los Angeles to instill fear, target immigrant families, and turn our state into a stage for political theater.

While the MAGA Republicans carry out ICE raids in our neighborhoods, they also vote to defund Medicaid and SNAP— _programs that help children, seniors, and working families survive._ Their agenda isn’t about public safety. It’s about cruelty and distraction for the sake of staying in power.

I’ve met the people who Trump tries to paint as our enemies. I’ve fought alongside them as a firefighter and labor leader, advocating for their fair wages, safer workplaces, and the right to be treated with dignity and respect. Deploying the National Guard against our communities is dangerous, it’s un-American, and it’s not what California stands for.

I’ve spent my life standing up to injustice, and I’m not stopping now.

Join me in pushing back against this hateful agenda.
In solidarity,

Joe Kerr

name: House Freedom Fund Alerts
subject: CRITICAL UPDATE ON LOS ANGELES:
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205389n5meag0zjg9n5d09v0glsg460x71r53pa2ynrynfe6foppx3nfwvqsqefgzqm9wrhhbsg6an0puxh&__stmp=sxuy2p&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxuy2p&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf6ifo3ulwsii6twl07b8g8xrhuhi71n97eh0ylcrdhsgpupceez52e342tkbck7ovccjurosil6brc4w6i56aooznvymrshl4f6jt5c8cwgczi2gxlp3i31mf0deijgidl044pnwp7n27r3by5v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxuy2p&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxuy2p&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxuy2p&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxuy2p&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf6ifo3ulwsii6twl07b8g8xbuxo3kl6150mbfppy4tnaa8nt0rfny8xmxxa6op98sf2k1h7vwfu1vrlpo00fmy3o8ox7pdhhha1dl6ox6yp1xx9iv2lchbmlcmb9ctr91aoix0nrqj0viuqzmxv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxuy2p&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxuy2p&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Friend,

**Donald Trump is currently throwing himself a $45 million military parade for his birthday.**

As a veteran, I find this disrespectful and deeply un-American. He’s using our service members as political props for a wasteful ego trip.

Meanwhile, his administration has been slashing the federal workforce and firing thousands of dedicated public servants – _including nearly 6,000 veterans._

Think about it: folks who put their lives on the line for our country are being fired from their jobs, yet Trump managed to find $45 million for a vanity parade. It’s nauseating.

Trump and the national GOP want me out of Congress because I’m not afraid to speak up, but this is one of the most competitive districts in the country. We can’t afford to fall short.

**[I can’t think of a better way to RUIN Trump’s birthday than by seeing a flood of grassroots donations come in to keep this seat blue. clean_body: | = = Friend, Donald Trump is currently throwing himself a $45 million military parade for his birthday. As a veteran, I find this disrespectful and deeply un-American. He’s using our service members as political props for a wasteful ego trip. Meanwhile, his administration has been slashing the federal workforce and firing thousands of dedicated public servants – including nearly 6,000 veterans. Think about it: folks who put their lives on the line for our country are being fired from their jobs, yet Trump managed to find $45 million for a vanity parade. It’s nauseating. Trump and the national GOP want me out of Congress because I’m not afraid to speak up, but this is one of the most competitive districts in the country. We can’t afford to fall short. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, -Derek | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. subject: No Kings. No dictators. No Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Join our fight to bury MAGA this No Kings Day |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109596165/551612741/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTk1ZTA3Mi00ZTQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xIUj85lAQbHV7PbFKKdeJBhKODCe7HEXz2NERKbKpi8=&emci=aa0282d1-9a48-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f995e072-4e49-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)
Friend, Donald Trump just spent **$134 million in your taxpayer dollars** to send Marines and National Guard troops into Los Angeles. Kristi Noem arrested and detained _two_ members of Congress for opposing the MAGA regime in the last _week_. And House Republicans just rammed Trump’s disastrous budget through the House — **a _second_ time.** Friend, Trump and his minions are ignoring the courts, they’re ignoring Congress, and they’re ignoring us. But on this No Kings Day of opposition, I’m joining millions of Americans in protests across the country to end MAGA’s authoritarian regime and give power back to the people. I won’t sit back and let this guy play king with our Constitution. **From investigating MAGA’s lawlessness on the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees to making sure the American people know the stakes of his dangerous game, I’m doing everything I can to hold Trump accountable. But I can’t do it without your support.** [**Can I count on you to chip in and help me stop Trump’s authoritarian agenda? Friend, Donald Trump just spent $134 million in your taxpayer dollars to send Marines and National Guard troops into Los Angeles. Kristi Noem arrested and detained two members of Congress for opposing the MAGA regime in the last week. And House Republicans just rammed Trump’s disastrous budget through the House — a second time. Friend, Trump and his minions are ignoring the courts, they’re ignoring Congress, and they’re ignoring us. But on this No Kings Day of opposition, I’m joining millions of Americans in protests across the country to end MAGA’s authoritarian regime and give power back to the people. I won’t sit back and let this guy play king with our Constitution. From investigating MAGA’s lawlessness on the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees to making sure the American people know the stakes of his dangerous game, I’m doing everything I can to hold Trump accountable. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Today's assassination in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friend,
Last night, Minnesota Speaker Emerita Melissa Hortman and her husband, Mark Hortman, were killed in a targeted and politically motivated shooting — an assassination.
Senator John Hoffman and his wife were also shot, and are in critical condition. We know the doctors and nurses will do everything they can, and are praying for their speedy recovery.
My family and I know the horror of a targeted shooting all too well. Attacks on lawmakers are attacks on our democracy itself. I am calling on all of our leaders to speak out and condemn the violent extremism threatening everything this country stands for.
Melissa was a partner and friend to GIFFORDS and to me. I was on the ground during the legislative session when Minnesota moved several gun safety measures through in 2023, and those measures passed because of her leadership.
Today, I am heartbroken. But we will never be intimidated.
One of the most important ways we honor the ones we have lost is by ensuring tragedies like this never happen again. That is my mission, and the mission of GIFFORDS.
Please, keep Melissa, John, and their families in your thoughts and prayers.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250614-1-b&t=1&akid=10579%2E3935704%2E3sBMA7)
* * *

Please, take a second to read this...
Gabby Giffords has led the fight against the gun lobby for more than a decade, but she can't do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to take on the gun lobby in Congress and states across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
[**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250614-1-b&t=2&akid=10579%2E3935704%2E3sBMA7)
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/61677?c0=giffords-em-june25.V8EKg8&refcode=em250614-1-b&t=3&akid=10579%2E3935704%2E3sBMA7)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=10579%2E3935704%2E3sBMA7) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Tanks rolling through DC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Like a true authoritarian, Trump is celebrating with a military parade.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250614-1&t=1&akid=2262%2E587540%2Eikgutm)
Peter,
**Today, Donald Trump turns 79.**
And like a true authoritarian, he’s celebrating with a military parade.
While Trump basks in his delusions of grandeur, Americans across the country are rising up in “No Kings” protests because we sure as hell don’t support a wannabe dictator who is actively working to harm our future and dismantle our democracy.
Let’s be blunt: **Trump’s an example of everything that’s wrong about our politics.**
And what he represents — a broken, corrupt, failing political system — is exactly the reason we need to elect a new generation of bold, progressive leadership.
Leaders who don’t need parades. Leaders who don’t criminalize protest.
Leaders who actually fight for the people.
_That’s what Leaders We Deserve is all about._
We’re organizing a massive political movement to elect young progressives who know what’s at stake — because we’ve lived it. And we’re tired of waiting our turn while corrupt politicians like Trump try to burn it all down and threaten our futures.
This work takes resources. It takes people power. And it takes all of us in the fight.
**[Peter, let’s say NO to would-be kings — and YES to a brand new generation of progressive leadership. Make a $5 donation now to power our work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250614_1_nokings?refcode=em20250614-2262&amount=5&refcode2=2262_587540_ikgutm&akid=2262%2E587540%2Eikgutm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250614_1_nokings?amount=5&refcode=em20250614-2262&refcode2=2262_587540_ikgutm&akid=2262%2E587540%2Eikgutm)**
Thank you,
Leaders We Deserve

Nothing we do is possible without your support. That means this membership is more than proof of your support for the House GOP, it’s the driving force behind our mission.")**

We've worked so hard over the last year and I hope I can count on you to stay with us.

Thank you for your unconditional support.

Sincerely,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

Her private calls to Mayor Karen Bass and Governor Gavin Newsom, coupled with a pointed public rebuke of President Trump’s National [...] | As Los Angeles convulses with nightly protests and rising political tensions, former Vice President Kamala Harris is watching closely — both as a concerned Californian and a seasoned political operator weighing her next move. Her private calls to Mayor Karen Bass and Governor Gavin Newsom, coupled with a pointed public rebuke of President Trump’s National [...] The Democratic National Committee has hit the reset button — literally. After months of internal conflict, rule violations, and mounting embarrassments, members voted 294-99 on Wednesday to rerun the vice chair elections that had elevated David Hogg and Malcolm Kenyatta to national leadership in February. And in a move that says more than any speech [...] A top Department of Homeland Security (DHS) official issued a forceful rebuttal Wednesday to Kim Kardashian after the celebrity criticized recent immigration enforcement actions during ongoing anti-ICE protests in Los Angeles. Tricia McLaughlin, Assistant Secretary at DHS, responded directly to Kardashian’s Instagram plea that called the raids “inhumane” and harmful to “innocent, hardworking people.” Kardashian, [...] USA Gymnastics (USAG) is reportedly reevaluating its transgender inclusion policy following the Biden-to-Trump Title IX transition and amid escalating public tension surrounding the fairness of biological males competing in women’s sports. While Governor Gavin Newsom appears emotionally and politically rattled, and L.A. Mayor Karen Bass pleads with residents to remove graffiti like it’s a community clean-up drive, Representative Maxine Waters has [...] More than 80 arrests. Metal barricades overrun. subject: What Does “The Good Life” Look Like?
body:
Struggling | | |

_**A message from our sponsor...

**_ [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dd65f5a1834b43278f726fffc6f68ace&_e=ij83mmvvmhZsVQ9FUFe9ahyVFkxcU8_-84Av71FrhrzM_VFxr6KmePX-A0bNBvMPeKtdskp_8uuk1SwL6y1XhIRXhXpvlps_z4Tg741hKdIpfmK90q87lrfIU79QYBH3nPktHyQ0bjoNbBu2do8nAAGA9i9PAsCTftFcXtXz8NXQilLzqa9uxgtPbjJ23_EtVa0_UM_UU7VYe-eJJ6mOrmXHs_gViZP8Eod_SQ8gUYhulWVO8s7WeWRUYcN44t1qW5Pq2_Vj7Vai_Ol1t6VRaRGM7aLDe0UkQFoox-7xlty2tTQ6kWh58FOjrkiqOTOcfkvoJezRIJHX7IUQusXDXsKx82L-3I3O6uZH4ofuDO0EaI_cStwh0te7mx_oEVM3lwjCA7zmKSOO78xQzV0cFLvB8otD5zViIEOPcxR366A%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Knowledge, Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the human condition to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people. We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and justice when we face difficult questions. In the _Nicomachean Ethics_ —the first book written on how best to live—Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a person’s character, which is formed by making good choices. But good choices don’t come naturally. That’s why every student at Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is so important to living a good life that we’ve produced our online course, **“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ : How to Lead a Good Life.” **
---
| | And now you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale College edition of Aristotle’s _Nicomachean Ethics_ , for personal study. You’ll not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also explore ways to put this knowledge to work.
