clean_body: Struggling | | | A message from our sponsor... | | Dear Friend of Knowledge, Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the human condition to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people. We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and justice when we face difficult questions. In the Nicomachean Ethics —the first book written on how best to live—Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a person’s character, which is formed by making good choices. But good choices don’t come naturally. That’s why every student at Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is so important to living a good life that we’ve produced our online course, “Introduction to Aristotle’s Ethics : How to Lead a Good Life.” | | And now you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale College edition of Aristotle’s Nicomachean Ethics , for personal study. You’ll not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with Hillsdale College President Larry P. name: Becca Balint
subject: Out of town
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109597991/551619141/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250614_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWZiZmRkZC01NjQ5LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-b2i-Kb5KA03P9kV0icGgzusi5usUsre_jdT-Y392Xo=)
---
Hey Peter. I'm back in Vermont, and BOY am I happy to be out of town during Trump's $45 million military parade. 🙄 It’s ridiculous, Peter. While American families are stuck bearing the brunt of Trump’s disastrous policies and billionaire-first budget, he’s spending _tens of millions of dollars_ on self-congratulatory military events that only serve to stoke his ego. This frivolous spending isn’t just an insult to working families who can barely make ends meet — _it toes the line of fascism._ A sitting U.S. President is using taxpayer dollars to fund an ego-driven parade. Meanwhile, his proposed budget will cause millions of Americans to lose their health care, food assistance will be ripped away from low-income families, and rural hospitals across the country, including here in Vermont, could be shuttered. **I'm in Congress to stand up for working families and bring their struggles and concerns to the forefront of our policies. I’ll never let Trump’s ego overshadow that.** **[Staying in this fight depends on the support I receive from this team, so I’m asking you: Can you chip in $5 to help us meet our mid-month goal before tomorrow? clean_body: | = Hey Peter. I'm back in Vermont, and BOY am I happy to be out of town during Trump's $45 million military parade. 🙄 It’s ridiculous, Peter. While American families are stuck bearing the brunt of Trump’s disastrous policies and billionaire-first budget, he’s spending tens of millions of dollars on self-congratulatory military events that only serve to stoke his ego. This frivolous spending isn’t just an insult to working families who can barely make ends meet — it toes the line of fascism. A sitting U.S. President is using taxpayer dollars to fund an ego-driven parade. Meanwhile, his proposed budget will cause millions of Americans to lose their health care, food assistance will be ripped away from low-income families, and rural hospitals across the country, including here in Vermont, could be shuttered. I'm in Congress to stand up for working families and bring their struggles and concerns to the forefront of our policies. I’ll never let Trump’s ego overshadow that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Becca mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com | Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont P.O. Box 291 Burlington, VT 05402

Dear Friend, Because of the riots in Los Angeles (and elsewhere) and the war sabers rattling in the Middle East, we pray that you and your family are safe and that President Trump can restore order while negotiating peace abroad.
---
|
---
**ILFC GOES TO DC** The House Oversight Committee, led by Republican Congressman James Comer (KY), held a hearing yesterday to discuss blue state sanctuary cities. As part of those proceedings, liberal Illinois Governor JB Pritzker testified in defense of his crazy leftist policies.Most Republican state lawmakers in Springfield would normally grumble about this while watching the hearing on TV. But the **Illinois Freedom Caucus** was not going to allow Pritzker to gaslight the committee members and the public, so they traveled to Washington to attend the hearing. Then they held a press conference afterwards with House Freedom Caucus member, Rep. Mary Miller (IL), to expose Pritzker's lies. These include Pritzker claiming he has no idea how much taxpayers have been forced to spend to support illegal aliens in Illinois. The ILFC correctly reminded the public that it's $3.2 billion...and counting.Pritzker also claimed that his administration was fully supporting ICE's efforts in his state. Another lie. He has told local law enforcement officers to not cooperate. Below is [a local media interview](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjh1j7SHvbvQ84yYdCUcvQTzXEcd695KP5JfAaNl7RaVs3EcsdIS29IMewLpdspzihA-3D-3Dh-BJ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer8nto4iWnlKn3ZlWBH1Ql5DlsAdouZl6r7HOsyQLEJEUbpqYd5hzefiF-2F8yrZTPWfGvHPGKr66xyMhUZ5j1l6RkflZvVbA-2FC60HT8WpnsU8Q2Yxp1hurZvrbFJa3r16k91Aur-2BiZVROK7lNxKcavHfDS9xeCVAKY7cLreibJBBIdLMvKsshjCp54ZC5wgtBnvqVPwiZ0nV4j7aM65owRVQys2-2ByX4PtbLwbYEuX2V-2Fhs-3D) with ILFC members, State Rep. Blaine Wilhour and State Sen. Andrew Chesney. Their message: Pritzker, who wants to run for President in 2028, is "not ready for prime time".
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjh1j7SHvbvQ84yYdCUcvQTzXEcd695KP5JfAaNl7RaVs3EcsdIS29IMewLpdspzihA-3D-3Daz6D_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer8nto4iWnlKn3ZlWBH1Ql5DlsAdouZl6r7HOsyQLEJEUbpqYd5hzefiF-2F8yrZTPWfGvHPGKr66xyMhUZ5j1l6RgXSy-2F27gOkhoGbkr2r6xloa-2BqjI2JR-2FdWZnFZ7D9bC5sgKOqqBBl5YYYfsEv-2B7oMYxNwYkLEY9Jju76pTlVuUHEJLEblUKKdk7Bfw-2FdzS5Z-2FynU9cQQ-2F6eaRjkGI-2Fusfp27E4VpPNI4LTMGJJtkpwc-3D)

**ANDY on WAR ROOM** I joined my old friend, former HFC member Dave Brat, on Steve Bannon's War Room earlier today. We discussed the economic impact of potential new wars abroad and the one, big, beautiful bill (OB3). The short answer is we are fiscally vulnerable as a nation and it's imperative that we pass the OB3 if we're going to keep the economy strong, project strength overseas, and keep inflation from ravaging our country.And the only people standing in our way of that are Senate Republicans.Watch the whole thing below.

**LOUISIANA** Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has taken to the air waves to warn that rioters will be met with harsh opposition if they try anything in the Sunshine State. This includes giving people legal immunity if they are caught in the middle of a riot and feel it necessary to flee in their car to safety. The **Louisiana Freedom Caucus** [responded](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjlRJVjQCWS27XaCvv0pnCEHV6DjWAd87SDYJikkjZUdcM7lIdXWUuZ2jFtazl-2Fgm7BvNQ4EF0eqv4jayIdAB-2BTY-3Dxtey_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer8nto4iWnlKn3ZlWBH1Ql5DlsAdouZl6r7HOsyQLEJEUbpqYd5hzefiF-2F8yrZTPWfGvHPGKr66xyMhUZ5j1l6RtVGTqY-2F-2B8M6ax0ggyCWInNjkrnaKeQsehunedyhCFCxd-2BwkvT5oyQm7nD8GcK2LFu2cOjwk6K-2Fpc4T3X4t3oS8Woy-2BbCUTKmjFtIm0AvHwN4juzcKQJymnE1Ew5gmM72r6aHis8-2FYCsW1c7uOTlJ1Y-3D) to that message to remind their own citizens that they helped pass a bill last year that does just that. Protests are expected in multiple LA cities in the coming weeks.

**WYOMING** _The Deseret News_ out of Utah did [a long profile piece](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjibOJaUv2Rh4ScPq8Uw1KKWa4JISlT7fYwFXdAe3-2BkOEkENWcsuYYJ19o1dUqSs5e-2BhdKbTVigeEXIr0sAEnP-2Fi325HKBYgjLdW2Vxus7eS8CHpZt-2FFUnpxp9qUrn2nNcw-3D-3DAWbI_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer8nto4iWnlKn3ZlWBH1Ql5DlsAdouZl6r7HOsyQLEJEUbpqYd5hzefiF-2F8yrZTPWfGvHPGKr66xyMhUZ5j1l6RhrkEh6PiSDZbRHn-2FUvn6A10Zcm292nDzjYfRH3l4oZqTS3RUakZWhtlY4ey-2FKfuItnrft-2FuA2WfjijS01q23caPoMRUzspHGFaSz5Q5z99se22PRe7u9MQymsuqxQUlxKGLB004Swb8mEvbVTaQjEA-3D) about the **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** , but also the growing "Freedom Caucus" movement that is sweeping across the nation, built on the House Freedom Caucus's success in Washington. Key excerpt: _The State Freedom Caucus Network (SFCN) was a natural next step for the House’s Freedom Caucus as an expansion of its ideals into state government. Both are part of the same greater organization, focused on providing resources to help win electoral power at both the state and federal levels._ _As of this year, 13 different state houses have Freedom Caucuses, and the hope is to bring them to all 50. Andy Roth, the president of the State Freedom Caucus Network, said Wyoming is a “case study of how a Freedom Caucus can execute its mission perfectly.”_ _Jessie Rubino started as the Wyoming state director for the SFCN in 2021 and, in the past four years, she’s helped the caucus grow from six members to eight, then to 16, then 26, and now 36._ Beware - this article is not a puff piece. There are plenty of quotes from liberal Republicans, especially WY Governor Mark Gordon, complaining about the Wyoming Freedom Caucus's influence, but it's still a relatively accurate account of the situation. [Read it here.](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjibOJaUv2Rh4ScPq8Uw1KKWa4JISlT7fYwFXdAe3-2BkOEkENWcsuYYJ19o1dUqSs5e-2BhdKbTVigeEXIr0sAEnP-2Fi325HKBYgjLdW2Vxus7eS8CHpZt-2FFUnpxp9qUrn2nNcw-3D-3D7wC1_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHer8nto4iWnlKn3ZlWBH1Ql5DlsAdouZl6r7HOsyQLEJEUbpqYd5hzefiF-2F8yrZTPWfGvHPGKr66xyMhUZ5j1l6RsuG9rJE1kvhgiLNLFfIXkbhSt5-2FvG0xJhwvpTlnfBRga9BbDkxHVC5y8q91KykFNWGFANnVJDXGrRDUO2FxIHHr0yptzuUb-2FEVE48xp3Yx8Mo4NJWx-2BGA-2BYiAUeHixFLLHycqwy8SF6vy8bTyxCURQ-3D)

**HELP US GROW** While many are heading to the beach or enjoying the summer sun, we’re staying focused—because the issues that matter don’t take a vacation.This summer is critical for laying the groundwork for our expansion into new states and keeping our current states strong.

But we can’t do it without you.

Grassroots donors like you keep us going strong. Every dollar counts—especially now.

Can we count on your support today?

Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum.

clean_body: | | | | Dear Friend, Because of the riots in Los Angeles (and elsewhere) and the war sabers rattling in the Middle East, we pray that you and your family are safe and that President Trump can restore order while negotiating peace abroad. | ILFC GOES TO DC The House Oversight Committee, led by Republican Congressman James Comer (KY), held a hearing yesterday to discuss blue state sanctuary cities. As part of those proceedings, liberal Illinois Governor JB Pritzker testified in defense of his crazy leftist policies.Most Republican state lawmakers in Springfield would normally grumble about this while watching the hearing on TV. But the Illinois Freedom Caucus was not going to allow Pritzker to gaslight the committee members and the public, so they traveled to Washington to attend the hearing. Then they held a press conference afterwards with House Freedom Caucus member, Rep. Mary Miller (IL), to expose Pritzker's lies. These include Pritzker claiming he has no idea how much taxpayers have been forced to spend to support illegal aliens in Illinois. The ILFC correctly reminded the public that it's $3.2 billion...and counting.Pritzker also claimed that his administration was fully supporting ICE's efforts in his state. Another lie. He has told local law enforcement officers to not cooperate. Below is with ILFC members, State Rep. Blaine Wilhour and State Sen. Andrew Chesney. Their message: Pritzker, who wants to run for President in 2028, is "not ready for prime time". | ANDY on WAR ROOM I joined my old friend, former HFC member Dave Brat, on Steve Bannon's War Room earlier today. We discussed the economic impact of potential new wars abroad and the one, big, beautiful bill (OB3). The short answer is we are fiscally vulnerable as a nation and it's imperative that we pass the OB3 if we're going to keep the economy strong, project strength overseas, and keep inflation from ravaging our country.And the only people standing in our way of that are Senate Republicans.Watch the whole thing below. | LOUISIANA Florida Governor Ron DeSantis has taken to the air waves to warn that rioters will be met with harsh opposition if they try anything in the Sunshine State. This includes giving people legal immunity if they are caught in the middle of a riot and feel it necessary to flee in their car to safety. The Louisiana Freedom Caucus to that message to remind their own citizens that they helped pass a bill last year that does just that. Protests are expected in multiple LA cities in the coming weeks. | WYOMING The Deseret News out of Utah did about the Wyoming Freedom Caucus , but also the growing "Freedom Caucus" movement that is sweeping across the nation, built on the House Freedom Caucus's success in Washington. Key excerpt: The State Freedom Caucus Network (SFCN) was a natural next step for the House’s Freedom Caucus as an expansion of its ideals into state government. Both are part of the same greater organization, focused on providing resources to help win electoral power at both the state and federal levels. As of this year, 13 different state houses have Freedom Caucuses, and the hope is to bring them to all 50. Andy Roth, the president of the State Freedom Caucus Network, said Wyoming is a “case study of how a Freedom Caucus can execute its mission perfectly.” Jessie Rubino started as the Wyoming state director for the SFCN in 2021 and, in the past four years, she’s helped the caucus grow from six members to eight, then to 16, then 26, and now 36. Beware - this article is not a puff piece. There are plenty of quotes from liberal Republicans, especially WY Governor Mark Gordon, complaining about the Wyoming Freedom Caucus's influence, but it's still a relatively accurate account of the situation. | HELP US GROW While many are heading to the beach or enjoying the summer sun, we’re staying focused—because the issues that matter don’t take a vacation.This summer is critical for laying the groundwork for our expansion into new states and keeping our current states strong. But we can’t do it without you. Grassroots donors like you keep us going strong. Every dollar counts—especially now. Can we count on your support today? Together, we’ll turn up the heat—and the momentum. We'll be back with another update next week. Until then, please be sure to our efforts so that we can support our State Freedom Caucuses!In Liberty, Andy RothPresident State Freedom Caucus Network |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be times like this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me.
Hi Peter, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.
Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me.
**As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.**
I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day.
I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and Heartland Patriots standing with me.
**[If I can count on your support this Pride Month, split a donation of $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today. Every donation helps me defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC)**
Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. **Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**
That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.
**[So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider making a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89760?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89759?refcode=em20250614-9009&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9009%2E614464%2EltBOSC)

Sarah

Your donation will help us prove just how strong the grassroots team backing Andrea is, and signal a warning to Republicans: OR-06 isn’t up for grabs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, -Salinas HQ | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to . | | = | Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States

Friend!

We’re officially halfway through the month — and halfway through our final full month before the June 30th FEC fundraising deadline.

As a non-politician who’s never held office and who refuses donations from corporations and special interests, _this is a big deal._

Our campaign isn’t powered by PACs. It’s powered by people. People who are fed up with politics as usual. People who want to send someone to Congress who doesn’t sound or act like every other politician.

That’s why I’m writing you today.

**This mid-month milestone this weekend is critical.** If we fall behind pace now, we may not catch up in time to hit our goal before the June 30th deadline. And that means we won’t be able to show the strength of our grassroots movement in our very first public FEC report.

I don’t want to do this the same way everyone else does. I don’t want to _sound_ like a politician. But I know this:**if we’re going to win, we need to be taken seriously.** And to be taken seriously, we have to show that this movement has real support.

**So here’s what I’m asking:**
[**Will you be one of 100 supporters to chip in $10 for this weekend’s mid-month checkpoint to help us stay on pace and prove that we have what it takes?**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=8530f43a2e104227b0bf695f5f045de3&_e=yiBQGHPjyGo3cqnBxg90hcAsQ5VGTboaWcau04rbPBjp3KpkynlxgfV8U6koEv3dFUrr2LgjsrNgyzMtCe5c8FUMucK7HXWv3kjpPk5qK7Jl2cPUI2pTb2czoaSUSSdwzGp4Ne_vwtWTxcH-YSYE8-TPA1KxgsI_QrlH--G1mis8u38DiO8S_Ei6I_eOmG-aOU0tWp7CL31Jx0Ro6LCGgChChrlrJNWfkBryYmBDoIDhj2FtGOh35kgsgmvzwPZsnEaDpggu4U91KOp0N4PZiytJqj_t--9TDMyeqaJFivN4RXDFj0ojnA0jgFYZjM7g_6G6SNnOkWR8st9osh4UpNMrW6VNGh4TXRc7ZJre4E8m_0WGxDyVOas-EJd79kSNzncaAOCgBbLs2Ban1KW1kc-2DXPuqg5YfHKyWczQu9E%3D)

[ ** CHIP IN $10 » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=8530f43a2e104227b0bf695f5f045de3&_e=yiBQGHPjyGo3cqnBxg90hcAsQ5VGTboaWcau04rbPBjp3KpkynlxgfV8U6koEv3dFUrr2LgjsrNgyzMtCe5c8FUMucK7HXWv3kjpPk5qK7Jl2cPUI2pTb2czoaSUSSdwzGp4Ne_vwtWTxcH-YSYE8-TPA1KxgsI_QrlH--G1mis8u38DiO8S_Ei6I_eOmG-aOU0tWp7CL31Jx0Ro6LCGgChChrlrJNWfkBryYmBDoIDhj2FtGOh35kgsgmvzwPZsnEaDpggu4U91KOp0N4PZi9KH39S9IJ11BeQRH0_0GbtHNdJxeA6919-bEgqwTGI-IjuLZAdwkXFwjnUm5-0TOEdit7-i17h7q4GCyqQfCkXXqTY33l86DUthN6AnDkQEJ3dXMgH8F8mi8l3jooI9Q02_ygngn3SG02Vc1af9LSg%3D)

The mid-month number matters. It will determine what kind of campaign we can run over the final stretch of this month.

Thanks for being part of this with me. Let’s finish the fight.

— Marty
Republican for NV-03

[ ** CHIP IN $10 » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=8530f43a2e104227b0bf695f5f045de3&_e=yiBQGHPjyGo3cqnBxg90hcAsQ5VGTboaWcau04rbPBjp3KpkynlxgfV8U6koEv3dFUrr2LgjsrNgyzMtCe5c8FUMucK7HXWv3kjpPk5qK7Jl2cPUI2pTb2czoaSUSSdwzGp4Ne_vwtWTxcH-YSYE8-TPA1KxgsI_QrlH--G1mis8u38DiO8S_Ei6I_eOmG-aOU0tWp7CL31Jx0Ro6LCGgChChrlrJNWfkBryYmBDoIDhj2FtGOh35kgsgmvzwPZsnEaDpggu4U91KOp0N4PZi-4IJf3etYHDqNNeKt-nbo71LSd_jwrx6il3bNKUB0PqDdLZwCBtAll5UMgSGbR-bSe6xYai8P5DNRPtrg0MCedfIi8w7l3yQg-SsaUAIZqFi4PfbB3BJhsUdmE2bZMPWzzoNxiB4NQ-l2RsYZNqs28%3D)

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

## _**BIRTHDAY GOLF BALLS!**_

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

Sen. John Kennedy **[didn't hold back on CNN,](https://substack.com/redirect/992bb558-6a56-4c2c-bc96-f64f8f48a3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** shattering their "peaceful protests" narrative about the LA riots and hammering Gov. Gavin Newsom losing control of "the goons."
The CNN host lost control of the conversation...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/992bb558-6a56-4c2c-bc96-f64f8f48a3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/992bb558-6a56-4c2c-bc96-f64f8f48a3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"How do you wish the Trump administration would handle these confrontations? Do you want them to be escalatory,... or do you think it would be better for the country if everyone tried to deescalate the situation?" the interviewer asked Kennedy about the administration's approach to addressing the riots.
**["Well nobody wants to see riots,"](https://substack.com/redirect/992bb558-6a56-4c2c-bc96-f64f8f48a3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Kennedy answered. "I would prefer to see local government handle it,... We have a lot of peaceful protests, but they're not all peaceful protests, a lot of them have turned into riots with people breaking the law, and the people doing that are gangsters and goons!"
Kennedy added, **["Those folks have to be stopped,](https://substack.com/redirect/992bb558-6a56-4c2c-bc96-f64f8f48a3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**... Someone is going to have to stop the gangster that are doing this, I'd prefer to have the governor and mayor do that, they were not able to do that! If they can't do it then it's the role of the federal government to step in!"
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/992bb558-6a56-4c2c-bc96-f64f8f48a3d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# _BREAKING:_ 2 Democrats shot by gunman impersonating a police officer
A Minnesota state lawmaker and her husband were killed and another Democratic legislator and his wife wounded in overnight shootings that**[Gov. Tim Walz called a "politically motivated assassination"](https://substack.com/redirect/30bf845e-9b61-48cb-88ea-df697a839ede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** carried out by a suspect impersonating a police officer who remains at large.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/30bf845e-9b61-48cb-88ea-df697a839ede?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **DFL Speaker Emerita Melissa Hoffman and her husband were killed** in Brooklyn Park, while DFL Sen. John Hoffman and his wife were shot in Champlin but are expected to survive after surgery.

* **The suspect impersonated a police officer and engaged in a gunfight with real police before fleeing** \- The shooter was described as wearing black body armor over blue clothing and potentially impersonating law enforcement when he carried out the attacks on the two separate locations.
* **Governor Walz condemned the violence as "targeted political violence" against democracy** \- The governor praised Hoffman as "a formidable public servant" and "giant in Minnesota" while emphasizing that "we don't settle differences with violence or at gunpoint" and calling peaceful discourse the foundation of democracy.
* **Authorities have issued a shelter-in-place order and activated emergency response** \- A 3-mile radius around Edinburgh Golf Course is under shelter-in-place orders, the State Emergency Operations Center has been activated, and officials are urging the public not to approach the suspect but to call 911 with any information.

* * *
# IDF says Tehran "will burn" if Iran continues missile strikes
The Israeli military **[warned Saturday that Tehran "will burn"](https://substack.com/redirect/c16f6fc6-86fc-457c-8332-07ba9bd60676?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** if Iran continues missile attacks as the countries exchanged fire following Israel's abrupt strike on Iranian nuclear facilities that killed at least 20 senior commanders and nine nuclear scientists, leaving three Israelis dead and dozens wounded.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c16f6fc6-86fc-457c-8332-07ba9bd60676?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **" If [Iranian Supreme leader Ayatollah Ali] Khamenei continues to fire missiles** at the Israeli home front -- Tehran will burn," IDF Defense Minister Israel Katz said in a statement.

* **At least three Israelis were killed and dozens wounded in Iranian missile strikes on Tel Aviv** \- Two victims died when their homes in Rishon Lezion were hit by Iranian rockets, including 73-year-old Yisrael Aloni, while 34 others were wounded and Israel's main international airport remains closed indefinitely.
* **Israel's surprise attack killed at least 20 senior Iranian commanders and nine nuclear scientists** \- The Friday strike targeted Iran's nuclear program and military leadership, killing the head of Iran's Revolutionary Guard and nuclear experts specializing in mechanics, physics, and materials engineering, with an estimated 70 total deaths and 320 wounded, while Iran's Supreme Leader vowed continued retaliation.

Hi Peter, it's Martin Sheen. I’ve often said that acting is what I do for a living, but activism is what I do to stay alive. **That’s why I’m emailing you today about Senator Jon Ossoff.** Senator Ossoff has spent his first term in the U.S. Senate fighting to deliver for Georgia — from working to upgrade public health systems and creating new good-paying jobs, to fighting for civil rights. We need to keep Jon in the Senate, but as the only Senate Democrat up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024, he’s MAGA’s number one target in the midterm elections. They are going to use every dirty trick in the book and spend hundreds of millions of dollars attacking Jon to try and replace him with a MAGA lackey. We need your help right now to fight back. In 2020, the Senate majority came down to Georgia, and donors like you from across the country chipped in to power Democrats to victory. In 2026, we need to do it again. [**So today, I’m reaching out to personally ask you to donate to Senator Jon Ossoff's campaign. Will you donate $10 right now to help re-elect Jon Ossoff and help Democrats take back the Senate majority? name: Mitch Kates
subject: these values are under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Today is Flag Day, Peter.

It is a day to honor the American flag and what it stands for: unity, independence, justice, and freedom.

**This year, we must truly take a step back and think about these core American values that are under attack by our President _every single day_.**

Here at the PA Dems, we are committed to fighting for these values and to electing public servants up and down the ballot who will protect them, no matter who they have to take on to do so.

name: Team Pramila
subject: No Kings. Not now, not ever.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In Seattle and across the country, organizers and protestors are rising up against authoritarianism and demanding the democracy we all deserve.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250614-5146-footer&t=1&akid=5146%2E420207%2Excg58F)
Peter, today, thousands are taking to the streets for No Kings Day to say it loud and clear:
**We will not be ruled by billionaire oligarchs, corporate greed, or wannabe kings.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250614-1?refcode=em20250614-5146&amount=3&refcode2=5146_420207_xcg58F&akid=5146%2E420207%2Excg58F)
In Seattle and across the country, organizers and protestors are rising up against authoritarianism and demanding the democracy we all deserve.
Real democracy means building power from the bottom up — not just in the streets, but in every corner of our government, too.
That’s why Pramila’s running a different kind of campaign: one that’s funded by grassroots supporters like you, NOT billionaires or corporate PACs.
**Right now, we’re working toward our mid-month goal of $10,000 by midnight tomorrow night.** Once June is over, we’ll have to publicly report our fundraising from this quarter — so it’s crucial that we meet this goal and show the strength of our movement.
[**Peter, if you're all in on the fight against oligarchy and wannabe dictators like Trump, will you pitch in $3 before tomorrow's deadline to support Pramila's work for our progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250614-1?refcode=em20250614-5146&amount=3&refcode2=5146_420207_xcg58F&akid=5146%2E420207%2Excg58F)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250614-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250614-5146&refcode2=5146_420207_xcg58F&akid=5146%2E420207%2Excg58F)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

name: Jay Jones
subject: Our massive voter turnout operation >>
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]
Hi friend,
The last day for Virginians to vote in the Democratic Primary Election is THIS TUESDAY , June 17!!
We are running a massive voter turnout operation this weekend to mobilize as many Virginia voters as possible ahead of next week’s election, especially young and minority voters.
Last week, I launched a Voter Turnout Fund with a goal of raising $50,000 in grassroots donations. Now, we're doubling down our efforts and increasing our goal to $65,000! Friend, will you make a donation right now to fund our voter turnout drive for these last few days? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
I’ve run for office in 4 elections. Every time, I’ve been proud to run a bottom-up campaign that puts the grassroots first. Every time, you — and so many other Virginians — have honored me by standing with me.
But we are going to need to do it again in this primary campaign in order to win.
By hitting our Voter Turnout Fund goal, we’ll have the resources to mobilize thousands of new voters and give us the best chance.
Friend, will you make a donation to our Voter Turnout Fund and help us hit our goal to supercharge our mobilization efforts this weekend? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones-voter-turnout-fund2-em-q22025?]
Thanks,
Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

Friend, will you make a donation to our Voter Turnout Fund and help us hit our goal to supercharge our mobilization efforts this weekend? Peter, I’m sick of all the broken promises and lies.

**Donald Trump said he’d lower taxes and lower costs.**

→ **He lied:** He is throwing around tariffs left and right that will mean _higher_ taxes on you and _higher_ prices for the goods and groceries you consume.

**Donald Trump said he’d fight for working class families.**

→ **He lied:** He is delivering tax cuts for billionaires like Elon Musk by _slashing_ critical social safety nets like Medicaid and Social Security for hardworking Americans.

**Donald Trump said he had nothing to do with Project 2025.**

→ **He lied:** Everything he’s done is by the _Project 2025_ book — from dismantling critical agencies like the Department of Education to spending $45 million worth of taxpayer dollars on a self-righteous, _North Korea-style_ military parade in DC today.

**So much for _promises made, promises kept._**

[Peter, the _greatest way_ that we can fight back is by building a grassroots movement strong enough to withstand Trump's lies and broken promises. With your help, we can flip the House, make Trump powerless, and put our common-sense, progressive agenda back on track. | [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=2f3b0734dd&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friends,

If you've watched the news recently, it may seem like there's a never-ending parade of new taxes being proposed and passed by politicians in Olympia and Seattle. I'm running to fight against these extreme tax hikes that increase the cost of living and harm everyday folks.

With budgets tight, people often tell me, "I would love to help the campaign, but it's hard to give money right now." I understand this, and I have great news--Parade season is starting! An easy and fun way to help me fight against extreme tax hikes is to join me and my team in walking the Enumclaw and Covington parades.
**[Sign up to walk with Team Dunn in an upcoming parade!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=4c98337d34&e=77eef70c61)** [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=4ec86ea161&e=77eef70c61)
The Enumclaw Parade is on July 4th at 12 p.m., and the Covington Parade is on July 19th at 10 a.m. **_[Let me know if you can join us by signing up at this link!](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=89d8977d6c&e=77eef70c61)_**

While politicians in Seattle and Olympia introduce their own parade of tax increases, we'll counter with a joyful parade walk--letting them know our campaign is the last line of defense against irresponsible tax hikes!

Thanks for all your help, and let me know if you can make it!
Reagan Dunn

P.S. Can't make either parade but still want to help? _[Sponsor a volunteer for $10](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=cfcdcd17ff&e=77eef70c61) to help us buy lunches and water for them! **[DONATE HERE](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=0be6126cd6&e=77eef70c61)!**_

---

name: Tobias Read
subject: Do you support voting from home?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250614em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250614em-rs]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I believe voting from home gives every Oregonian a fair and secure chance to hold politicians accountable—and it saves money and time, too.
But some Republicans want to block voting from home by imposing unnecessary barriers.
There’s only one explanation for this: Opponents to voting at home want to make it harder for regular people to participate in our democracy.
So I’m standing up to them and I’m fighting to protect the right to vote from home for all Oregon voters.
But I need to know you're with me: If you support my efforts to expand vote-by-mail access, please consider donating to help me continue fighting today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250614em-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250614em-rs]
Thank you for using your voice – speaking out is the most powerful way to make an impact, and I’m grateful to have your support.
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250614em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250614em-rs]

Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *
| **INSIDER ALERT:** **Huge Savings: Warehouse Overload - You WIN BIG!** If you've been watching the headlines, you already know - the threat of food shortages, blackouts, and supply chain failures is more real than ever. Our 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have been flying off the shelves, selling out time and time again. Why? Because people are waking up to the truth - you can't count on the system anymore. So we gave our warehouse manager, Matt, one mission: **produce as many kits as humanly possible.** And wow... did he ever deliver. The result? **A tidal wave of inventory just crashed into our warehouse - more kits than we have space for.** Now we're on the hook for major storage costs... and we need your help. **This is your chance to take advantage of our mistake.** We're slashing prices and practically *giving away* these premium survival food kits - just to move them fast. When you claim yours today, you're not only securing peace of mind for your family... **you're helping an American-owned company stay afloat through a supply chain nightmare.** And yes - **you'll get a stack of FREE BONUSES** as our thank you. [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjrIteknop5I8ITmbx0g50y&s=EIJAHLGLEDFPCHBD) [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjrIteknop5I9ITmbx0g50y&s=EIJAHLGLEDFPCHBD) **3 Months Of Food, Security & Peace Of Mind - All In One Kit** This is more than just food. It's **freedom in a box.** These 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are loaded with hearty, satisfying meals that are built to last 25 years. [**Click here now to stock up before our warehouse clears out.**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjrIteknop5IaITmbx0g50y&s=EIJAHLGLEDFPCHBD) That's right - **no junk fillers, no sketchy ingredients** - just real food, crafted for real emergencies. Hand-packed in a small American facility by people who actually care, these meals are designed to keep you nourished, calm, and strong when everything else falls apart. And thanks to the recent upgrades, **these kits contain more food than ever.** It's a massive value - and right now, it's the lowest price you'll ever see. Don't wait for a crisis to wish you had prepared. Right now, this overstock deal gives you the chance to save big, feed your family in an emergency, and protect what matters most. But this inventory won't last long. [**Click here to grab your 3-Month Survival Food Kit before they're gone.**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjrIteknop5IbITmbx0g50y&s=EIJAHLGLEDFPCHBD) Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjrIteknop5IcITmbx0g50y&s=EIJAHLGLEDFPCHBD) **_Rory H._**_
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**Click here to claim your exclusive deal on these Survival Food Kits while we still have inventory.**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjrIteknop5IdITmbx0g50y&s=EIJAHLGLEDFPCHBD)

name: Team Deb
subject: No kings. No tanks. Just people.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Deb won’t sit by while our leaders ignore the people and chase power instead of progress for all of us.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2582%2E400544%2E-FLN3Z)
Today, as Donald Trump paraded tanks through the streets of Washington, D.C., we were proud to see so many New Mexicans take a stand at the No Kings protests across the state.
Trump’s parade isn’t just a show of authoritarian force. **It’s a symptom of a broken system, and a distraction from the real struggles families across the country are facing every day.**
Deb knows what it’s like to struggle, and she won’t sit by while our leaders ignore the people and chase power instead of progress for all of us.
New Mexicans deserve a governor who will show up and fight for _everyone_ , not just the wealthy and well-connected. That’s why Deb’s running, and it’s why we’re asking you to support our campaign and help change the game for New Mexico.
**In order to keep our momentum going, we need to reach our goal of 10,000 grassroots donations by midnight tomorrow night.[Will you pitch in $5 now to put us over the top and help fuel Deb’s campaign for governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250614_1_nokings?amount=5&refcode=em20250614-2582&refcode2=2582_400544_-FLN3Z&akid=2582%2E400544%2E-FLN3Z)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250614_1_nokings?amount=5&refcode=em20250614-2582&refcode2=2582_400544_-FLN3Z&akid=2582%2E400544%2E-FLN3Z)**
Grassroots donations from supporters like you help us reach voters, stand up for our democracy, and shine a light on the struggles everyday New Mexicans are facing.
Deb’s going to keep showing up for New Mexico — in the streets and as governor — but she can’t do it without you.
Every contribution matters. Every protest and act of resistance makes a difference. And every one of us has a role to play in this moment.
[**So if you’re able, please pitch in $5 to help us get to 10,000 donations before our mid-month deadline tomorrow night. We are truly grateful for your support.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250614_1_nokings?amount=5&refcode=em20250614-2582&refcode2=2582_400544_-FLN3Z&akid=2582%2E400544%2E-FLN3Z)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250614_1_nokings?amount=5&refcode=em20250614-2582&refcode2=2582_400544_-FLN3Z&akid=2582%2E400544%2E-FLN3Z)**
Be fierce,
Team Deb

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: 2 shots of olive oil did this to her body
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

|
What would happen if you were to drink olive oil everyday? Nurse Cat wondered the same... keep reading to find out her surprising results.

We all know that high-quality olive oil has massive health benefits. So I decided to do an experiment on myself and consume at least a couple of shots (2-4 Tablespoons) of high quality olive oil every day.

**Here are some of the things I noticed:**
1. **Less hunger --**Since olive oil is a healthy fat, consuming olive oil stops hunger pangs. But olive oil is a type of fat, and it seems it would cause weight gain. On the contrary, I lost a **few pounds** the first two weeks of consuming olive oil. And when you look at the research, studies show that people who consumed at least **2T of olive oil a day lost more body fat than those eating similar calories** and no olive oil.
2. **Lower blood sugar --**Along with less hunger, olive oil helps to **lower blood sugar levels** , helping to prevent type 2 diabetes and insulin resistance. When blood sugar and insulin are lower, you are less likely to be hungry or to store calories as fat. Olive oil also reduces ghrelin, a hormone that stimulates hunger.
3. **Less aches, pains, and inflammation --**Fresh EVOO contains a compound called oleocanthal which has an **anti-inflammatory effect like ibuprofen** --without the negative side effects. A study from Spain showed that men and women over the age of 55 who consumed olive oil for one month had decreased blood markers for inflammation, especially IFN-y and CXCL1.
4. **Smoother skin --**Olive oil is anti-inflammatory, and this is reflected in smoother skin, less sun damage, and reduction of any redness or irritation. The antioxidants in olive oil help **prevent aging of the skin** , as well as fighting skin cancer. The antibacterial component of olive oil also helps to fight acne and other skin infections. Olive oil applied directly to the skin also works great as an excellent moisturizer and wrinkle fighter.
5. **Improved memory --**My thinking was quicker, my focus improved, and my memory was sharper. Olive oil consumption has been shown to have positive effects on cognitive performance. Studies on olive oil consumption **show slowed cognitive decline, and decreases in blood markers for Alzheimer 's disease**, including amyloid beta proteins, tau, and p-tau.
6. **Improved Cholesterol --**While my cholesterol levels are very good, I noticed that total cholesterol numbers dropped, along with lower levels of LDL, and triglycerides--both of which are tied to heart disease. In addition, HDL (our good cholesterol) increased. In a meta-analysis of 27 different trials with olive oil, it was found that HDL increases significantly, **while LDL and triglycerides are lowered**. All good for heart health and longevity.
7. **Better Digestion and Healthier Microbiome --**Olive oil has a lot of gut health benefits. It nourishes beneficial bacteria and helps heal the gut lining. Research shows it relieves gut irritation including bloating and constipation. Certain healthy gut bacteria have positive effects on **lowering cholesterol and fat loss** , as well as increasing feelings of fullness.

**Olive oil 's polyphenols can prevent other serious health issues**. Olive oil is effective for its anti-inflammatory whole-body effects, its ability to **fight and kill cancer cells** , reverse fatty liver disease, protect the kidneys, and promote healthy brain and nerve function. Olive oil is effective for heart disease, Parkinson's disease, Alzheimer's disease, multiple sclerosis, and to prevent or fight many cancers.

Olive oil is truly a powerful superfood and should be included in your diet on a regular basis. While I don't know if I will continue to have a couple 'shots' of olive oil every day, I do know I will be adding generous amounts to my vegetables, salads, soups, and main dishes.

Be sure to look for "Extra Virgin, Cold Pressed" olive oil, and check the bottling date to see how fresh it is. Look for olive oil that comes in a dark tinted GLASS bottle. Avoid plastic or clear bottles. Higher quality olive oil full of polyphenols should have a rich, fruity taste and stings your throat when swallowed--this is a reflection of the amount and quality of the polyphenols it contains.

_And speaking of high quality olive oil ..._

**Heart Surgeon: If You Cook With Olive Oil You Should Know This** If you cook with or consume olive oil, it is very important that you read this carefully.

There is a common mistake that Americans make every time they purchase olive oil.

The truth is, most Americans have no idea where their olive oil comes from or the quality of their oil, so they have no clue what they are eating.

**Some olive oil sold in stores could be old and spoiled.** Fortunately, there are a few easy things you can look for to help avoid this.

[**= > Click here to learn the 3 things to look for when purchasing olive oil.**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/5947dbb007dd4579949403b529f4735e-a5d7aac08abf470eb750cea31015f268/63)

P.S. If you cook with olive oil more than two times per week, and want to maximize the look of clear/smooth skin, and support joint health, it is even more important that you [**click here to find out more about your olive oil.**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/5947dbb007dd4579949403b529f4735e-a5d7aac08abf470eb750cea31015f268/63)

---

Research shows it relieves gut irritation including bloating and constipation. Certain healthy gut bacteria have positive effects on lowering cholesterol and fat loss , as well as increasing feelings of fullness. Olive oil 's polyphenols can prevent other serious health issues. Olive oil is effective for its anti-inflammatory whole-body effects, its ability to fight and kill cancer cells , reverse fatty liver disease, protect the kidneys, and promote healthy brain and nerve function. Olive oil is effective for heart disease, Parkinson's disease, Alzheimer's disease, multiple sclerosis, and to prevent or fight many cancers. Olive oil is truly a powerful superfood and should be included in your diet on a regular basis. While I don't know if I will continue to have a couple 'shots' of olive oil every day, I do know I will be adding generous amounts to my vegetables, salads, soups, and main dishes. Be sure to look for "Extra Virgin, Cold Pressed" olive oil, and check the bottling date to see how fresh it is. Look for olive oil that comes in a dark tinted GLASS bottle. Avoid plastic or clear bottles. Higher quality olive oil full of polyphenols should have a rich, fruity taste and stings your throat when swallowed--this is a reflection of the amount and quality of the polyphenols it contains. And speaking of high quality olive oil ... Heart Surgeon: If You Cook With Olive Oil You Should Know This If you cook with or consume olive oil, it is very important that you read this carefully. There is a common mistake that Americans make every time they purchase olive oil. The truth is, most Americans have no idea where their olive oil comes from or the quality of their oil, so they have no clue what they are eating. Some olive oil sold in stores could be old and spoiled.** Fortunately, there are a few easy things you can look for to help avoid this. P.S. name: Jenna Burns
subject: Fani Willis is facing my husband in court
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kM1u6jAQhZ_G2RHZY8fGCy_gcsOCqqoAqWIZx05xayfBzo_o01dQynbmmzmfThV675qrQmKNAM7OJASA6AoBXE5ziONn2G0X67f9ZnHhr6G4beHfA53gCbd1xaf5cGqnw0vaM31k3_v3iTzx4drbJ_wIzW2onL9NxSYzijYGs8wqIpiUVApGs7NijBPgFKAgBZYai4JSppcFl2KJpaGZU4ChwJwwAABCcymIxsYUltBG68Yihu85eRVsdHVF0jBXMXZdyOsuZF6dh6FPd7ESQTnHLm_H2tsx_Z7VXUBQPpQRlBOCsv1K2zmO8XhFtLyXRjf_veFHttK7LCrTz857l7hADH_8vckmBT8BAAD__5Hhbkg)
| |
---
Friend, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers. And right now, my husband is facing Fani Willis as she’s trying to lock him up for the _rest of his life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. **[Before I ask for your urgent help, let me start at the beginning...](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j09vozAQxT-NuYHsscHlwCGEkMNmVxWpuuoJGXvcsMKBmn_qfvqKCOUyhze_N2-eckPX2u-MyJwA3FozEgDCDwTg62N1fv7nfp3D_LUqwq_kj4u3LRx3dIEnfNcqWdbrx325XsZKNG_if_V3YU98-h7wCe-hETrVdpsqi8Bk3BoqAsyYFGnKUyl4cMt0nFJmlTWaCkEbgBcbo06VTZBKqTFoM6AQ04QJAADGo1SyhhoTI-O2aSwSQR85kXLoW63YOK3K-753ke5d0GW3aRrGx2MlgXJEPXuM1B1NP20EgbLDzlgC5YtoBI-bOESgIhRCxKFKExnalCraSK0s0u0KL-fJ1WM_e42EF3lxDqvTO4Fkkx2adnaEF6ffu6KVG1T7eSe82LuwOi_O9eV0Kco6Px6Or9e6Or3X17dDFW5jN07o3cMkgderZ4HPzLC2XdeOiSSCfj56by2XDH4CAAD__zecko0) ** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j09vozAQxT-NuYHsscHlwCGEkMNmVxWpuuoJGXvcsMKBmn_qfvqKCOUyhze_N2-eckPX2u-MyJwA3FozEgDCDwTg62N1fv7nfp3D_LUqwq_kj4u3LRx3dIEnfNcqWdbrx325XsZKNG_if_V3YU98-h7wCe-hETrVdpsqi8Bk3BoqAsyYFGnKUyl4cMt0nFJmlTWaCkEbgBcbo06VTZBKqTFoM6AQ04QJAADGo1SyhhoTI-O2aSwSQR85kXLoW63YOK3K-753ke5d0GW3aRrGx2MlgXJEPXuM1B1NP20EgbLDzlgC5YtoBI-bOESgIhRCxKFKExnalCraSK0s0u0KL-fJ1WM_e42EF3lxDqvTO4Fkkx2adnaEF6ffu6KVG1T7eSe82LuwOi_O9eV0Kco6Px6Or9e6Or3X17dDFW5jN07o3cMkgderZ4HPzLC2XdeOiSSCfj56by2XDH4CAAD__zecko0)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way in court... **life in prison** could be his reward. Our nightmare started nine years ago, when my husband responded to a call about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. _That's when it happened._ The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why [**I'm turning to you for help.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j09vozAQxT-NuYHsscHlwCGEkMNmVxWpuuoJGXvcsMKBmn_qfvqKCOUyhze_N2-eckPX2u-MyJwA3FozEgDCDwTg62N1fv7nfp3D_LUqwq_kj4u3LRx3dIEnfNcqWdbrx325XsZKNG_if_V3YU98-h7wCe-hETrVdpsqi8Bk3BoqAsyYFGnKUyl4cMt0nFJmlTWaCkEbgBcbo06VTZBKqTFoM6AQ04QJAADGo1SyhhoTI-O2aSwSQR85kXLoW63YOK3K-753ke5d0GW3aRrGx2MlgXJEPXuM1B1NP20EgbLDzlgC5YtoBI-bOESgIhRCxKFKExnalCraSK0s0u0KL-fJ1WM_e42EF3lxDqvTO4Fkkx2adnaEF6ffu6KVG1T7eSe82LuwOi_O9eV0Kco6Px6Or9e6Or3X17dDFW5jN07o3cMkgderZ4HPzLC2XdeOiSSCfj56by2XDH4CAAD__zecko0) James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago. Fani Willis just wants to make an example out of my husband - starting this Monday. Friend, for years we've been trapped in limbo. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. As you can imagine after 9 years of prosecution, what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. When we ran out of money, we had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. And now, after his trial judge REFUSED to address an important motion and follow the law – James is heading to the Georgia Supreme Court. Friend, that's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... [**Could you send an emergency gift today to help defend James while he fights for justice?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j09vozAQxT-NuYHsscHlwCGEkMNmVxWpuuoJGXvcsMKBmn_qfvqKCOUyhze_N2-eckPX2u-MyJwA3FozEgDCDwTg62N1fv7nfp3D_LUqwq_kj4u3LRx3dIEnfNcqWdbrx325XsZKNG_if_V3YU98-h7wCe-hETrVdpsqi8Bk3BoqAsyYFGnKUyl4cMt0nFJmlTWaCkEbgBcbo06VTZBKqTFoM6AQ04QJAADGo1SyhhoTI-O2aSwSQR85kXLoW63YOK3K-753ke5d0GW3aRrGx2MlgXJEPXuM1B1NP20EgbLDzlgC5YtoBI-bOESgIhRCxKFKExnalCraSK0s0u0KL-fJ1WM_e42EF3lxDqvTO4Fkkx2adnaEF6ffu6KVG1T7eSe82LuwOi_O9eV0Kco6Px6Or9e6Or3X17dDFW5jN07o3cMkgderZ4HPzLC2XdeOiSSCfj56by2XDH4CAAD__zecko0) His legal team is working day and night as they fight to get this motion addressed and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. We have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as his trial can’t start until the Supreme Court addresses the issue. **[So, if you're able, can you send your emergency tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF today to defend James before it’s too late?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j09vozAQxT-NuYHsscHlwCGEkMNmVxWpuuoJGXvcsMKBmn_qfvqKCOUyhze_N2-eckPX2u-MyJwA3FozEgDCDwTg62N1fv7nfp3D_LUqwq_kj4u3LRx3dIEnfNcqWdbrx325XsZKNG_if_V3YU98-h7wCe-hETrVdpsqi8Bk3BoqAsyYFGnKUyl4cMt0nFJmlTWaCkEbgBcbo06VTZBKqTFoM6AQ04QJAADGo1SyhhoTI-O2aSwSQR85kXLoW63YOK3K-753ke5d0GW3aRrGx2MlgXJEPXuM1B1NP20EgbLDzlgC5YtoBI-bOESgIhRCxKFKExnalCraSK0s0u0KL-fJ1WM_e42EF3lxDqvTO4Fkkx2adnaEF6ffu6KVG1T7eSe82LuwOi_O9eV0Kco6Px6Or9e6Or3X17dDFW5jN07o3cMkgderZ4HPzLC2XdeOiSSCfj56by2XDH4CAAD__zecko0) ** It's your [**emergency $35 gift**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j09vozAQxT-NuYHsscHlwCGEkMNmVxWpuuoJGXvcsMKBmn_qfvqKCOUyhze_N2-eckPX2u-MyJwA3FozEgDCDwTg62N1fv7nfp3D_LUqwq_kj4u3LRx3dIEnfNcqWdbrx325XsZKNG_if_V3YU98-h7wCe-hETrVdpsqi8Bk3BoqAsyYFGnKUyl4cMt0nFJmlTWaCkEbgBcbo06VTZBKqTFoM6AQ04QJAADGo1SyhhoTI-O2aSwSQR85kXLoW63YOK3K-753ke5d0GW3aRrGx2MlgXJEPXuM1B1NP20EgbLDzlgC5YtoBI-bOESgIhRCxKFKExnalCraSK0s0u0KL-fJ1WM_e42EF3lxDqvTO4Fkkx2adnaEF6ffu6KVG1T7eSe82LuwOi_O9eV0Kco6Px6Or9e6Or3X17dDFW5jN07o3cMkgderZ4HPzLC2XdeOiSSCfj56by2XDH4CAAD__zecko0) that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.
---
Sincerely,
---
Jenna Burns
---
P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! clean_body: | | | Friend, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been abusing her office to target innocent police officers. And right now, my husband is facing Fani Willis as she’s trying to lock him up for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way in court... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started nine years ago, when my husband responded to a call about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. With only a split second to act, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. Fani Willis just wants to make an example out of my husband - starting this Monday. Friend, for years we've been trapped in limbo. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. As you can imagine after 9 years of prosecution, what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. When we ran out of money, we had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. And now, after his trial judge REFUSED to address an important motion and follow the law – James is heading to the Georgia Supreme Court. Friend, that's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team is working day and night as they fight to get this motion addressed and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. We have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband as his trial can’t start until the Supreme Court addresses the issue. It's your that could make the difference between defeating radical Fani Willis and ensuring justice and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

clean_body: I hate to ask, but I need your help | | | | MAGA’s strength is being tested at this very moment—I know you’ll rise to the challenge. Friend, I’m launching the because the Democrats are watching our numbers like hawks, ready to pounce. If we don’t SHATTER records in the moment before my ADDRESS TO THE NATION, they’ll be claiming victory. They think they have us cornered , but if we come together and make one last powerful PATRIOT PUSH, we will WIN BIGLY. Every single donation is like fuel to the MAGA engine, driving us forward at FULL SPEED. Let’s show the world that we’re not backing down—not now, not ever. WE WILL NEVER SURRENDER. With your help, we will make America POWERFUL again. We will make America WEALTHY again. We will make America SAFE again. And yes, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Thank you, Donald J. \------ Forwarded message from Georgia HQ ------
Peter,
Marjorie Taylor Greene is laying the groundwork for a run for Governor of Georgia — and she’s doing it by standing shoulder to shoulder with Donald Trump as he manufactures crisis after crisis to grab more and more power.
But Georgia Republicans like MTG? **_They’re all in_** — enabling Trump’s worst impulses and lining up behind a dangerous, authoritarian vision for our state.
**But it doesn’t have to be this way.**
Georgia doesn’t need Trump-style politics. We don’t need chaos, cruelty, or conspiracy theories in the Governor’s Office.
We don’t have to accept this as our future. We can organize. We can fight back. **And we can elect leaders who believe in progress, not power grabs**.
[But first, we need to hit our mid-month goal of $10,000 to build real momentum before the end-of-quarter deadline. subject: All Hail King Donald Trump!
body:
Today, across America radical leftists are holding protests entitled, "No Kings" instead of celebrating the 250th anniversary of the U.S. Army. If Pr
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11751.1.8d6de6126022d92ab7dcce7d3e956dd5) |
---
Today, _across_ America radical leftists are holding protests entitled, **"No Kings"** instead of celebrating the **250th anniversary of the U.S. Army**. If **President Trump** truly was a _tyrannical dictator_ , the last thing these protestors would be allowed to do is... **PROTEST**. It is interesting to watch the Left operate _out of the shambles_ it is in right now. However, we must stay diligent and prayed up because **desperate people are willing to do desperate things**. **Pray for America. Pray for President Trump. Pray for Revival.** Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---

If you do not have a home church then join me at [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11753.1.9262b42d93f0e6ec1edc4c907f60c015)! **Tulsa** | 10am CT **OKC** | 6pm CCT Watch **online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11754.1.f67c3ad01896d2c6126c8b501e4479d6) Please consider partnering w/[Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11755.1.7e8bdcb574a1af3226822f879d65cf10) by visiting [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11756.1.3c164dd04e76f6bcc215b93086f68da4)

## The Reviews Are In!
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11758.1.d75d86041e1ba71dc3fc3ff8f266ec5a)
---
My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11759.1.86eb20c3b8abcc8c5b2232d9ca5947d6) is out! **I have been blown away by the response!** If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** plus the **downloadable eBook** for tablets and phones as well as **theme song** as a bundled package here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=22093903.11760.1.1d46edfad119c042b0dcff0905c4c488)_ I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine.
