* * *
# [The No Kings Protests In Pictures Nationwide](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165966705&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTY2NzA1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk5NDM5MTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjUzNTkxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AgCHPp_TwI_k3LRFWGY2d55TjJAgWQMOtA0j7SL4AA0)
### Powerful stories from around the nation, inspiring signs at the No Kings protests, and a tragic reminder of the political violence we face
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jun 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165966705&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTY2NzA1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTk0MzkxNiwiZXhwIjoxNzUyNTM1OTE2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.1Ukmhnkch8XnXe0L-Z0HXUMPYl_1uD3xo1C9wmdoZCY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165966705&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTY2NzA1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk5NDM5MTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjUzNTkxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AgCHPp_TwI_k3LRFWGY2d55TjJAgWQMOtA0j7SL4AA0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=165966705&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1OTY2NzA1LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk5NDM5MTYsImV4cCI6MTc1MjUzNTkxNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.AgCHPp_TwI_k3LRFWGY2d55TjJAgWQMOtA0j7SL4AA0)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9uby1raW5ncy1uby10eXJhbnRzLW5vLXNpbGVuY2U_.J6RZe3BtqQCye6gzCLmv2fa7vLg1n-fFfEfLyT2fbqk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/no-kings-no-tyrants-no-silence?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Across the nation, the people rose up for justice today.
From the coastlines of California to the quiet towns of New Jersey, from purple suburbs in the Pacific Northwest to the soulful streets of Memphis, to the former capitol of the Confederacy in Richmond, VA, millions of Americans stood up this weekend. They stood up not just for themselves, but for our collective right to live in a democracy--free from fascism, intimidation, and unchecked power.
These were the No Kings protests. But the day started with brutal political violence against Democratic politicians in Minnesota--a stark reminder of the work that remains before us, and why we must continue to raise our voice for justice for all. **Let 's Address This.**
Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join more than 133,000 fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..bXHFyuo_L1iC-Tl8kEaM8zneM6sHLWfK-OfXgMEsjk0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165966705)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d68958f8-ab56-4ad1-a3a6-2d013ce4a2fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I launched _Let 's Address This_ with the goal of elevating stories the corporate press ignores. On June 14, I asked folks across the country to share their experiences, images, and truths from the No Kings rallies. What came back was overwhelming: a reminder that we are not alone, and that courage multiplies in community. I wish I could share the hundreds of responses I received. Here's an inspiring cross section of how our fellow Americans rose up. The final story is of a courageous woman who faced extremists who tried to intimidate them into silence--but failed.
**Kirkland, WA:** Sarah Anderson reported a crowd of over 5,000 in a Seattle suburb that leans politically purple. This was not a partisan rally--it was a people rally. Peaceful, powerful, engaged. "This is what democracy looks like," she wrote.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/648b5c06-d0d6-4905-9932-07cdbae83739?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**North Ben, WA:** Lisa shared that she attended the No Kings protest in North Bend, where about 400 people gathered. This was about twice as large as expected, and in a known conservative town. Definitely a good sign of Americans standing united against kings.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1fb81a2-38ae-4fdb-aac5-a7449d550d51?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Chula Vista, CA:** Heading south of Washington, Lisa shared vivid photos of the Southern California protest. Diversity. Determination. Dignity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b58f52db-fa03-409e-a499-bcd2d598e58f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Lambertville, NJ:** Karin sent word from a masterfully coordinated card stunt initially intended for 200 people. Over 1,100 showed up. The cards? They were transported afterward to a solidarity rally on a Delaware beach.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/407f179a-8015-4a17-b1bb-7ee94818acc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Kansas City, MO:** Arthur Benson said it best: "The turnout must've been five times greater than the last protest here." The streets echoed with the spirit of Woody Guthrie's "All You Fascists Bound to Lose," as signs decried Trump's immigration brutality.
**Asheville, NC:** Cyn shared that their protest was mellow and peaceful, with an estimated 6,000 people in attendance. Given that Asheville's population is only 95,000, the fact that some 6,000 thoughtful activists attended is significant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4dc60de-3008-4c36-8b32-dc16e5dc1e47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Richmond, VA:** Mim Scalin and friends set up their protest right in front of a neighbor's house--a small group of five, including someone with mobility challenges who couldn't attend the Capitol rally. Cars honked. Neighbors waved. Mim said it best: "We were few in number, but grateful to be together to say NO to kings."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/746c4c10-d5cd-4fc0-ab5b-77bfb4b5a703?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And then there was Memphis.
**Memphis, TN:** Anna and her husband attended a peaceful protest. They walked a mile back to their car, holding a sign that read: "_No Nazis. No KKK. No Kings in the USA_." As they neared their vehicle, two older men approached them, pretending to be confused. After a short exchange, Anna and her husband recognized a Project Appleseed insignia on the men's shirts. What followed was a clear attempt at surveillance and intimidation. The men followed them, circled back, filmed them, and parked behind them--despite the fact the protest had ended and they were nearly a mile away.
Anna did not back down. She documented everything. She returned to protest organizers and media to report what happened--and later caught the same men photographing and filming peaceful protestors from their car. Anna's courage in the face of extremism is commendable and inspiring. My gratitude and kudos to Anna for stepping up--this is what getting into good trouble looks like.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..bXHFyuo_L1iC-Tl8kEaM8zneM6sHLWfK-OfXgMEsjk0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165966705)
## **UPDATE: Armed & Dangerous Fugitive at Large**
These protests weren't just symbolic. They were prophetic. Because while millions nationwide gathered to decry Trump's autocracy, news broke of a deadly political attack in Minnesota.
Authorities in Minnesota have identified 57-year-old Vance Boelter as the alleged murderer who killed Rep. Melissa Hortman and her husband and shot Sen. John Hoffman and his wife. Hoffman and his wife are currently hospitalized. My deepest condolences to all those impacted by this horrific act of political violence.
Boelter is reportedly impersonating law enforcement and remains at large, armed and extremely dangerous. A kill list found in his car includes names of Democratic lawmakers, abortion-care providers, and Rep. Ilhan Omar and Gov. Tim Walz.
If you have information on Boelter's whereabouts, please contact the MN state tip line at (651) 555-TIPS.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d8baee06-2af9-45bb-803e-009cf9b814c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
MN authorities have identified Vance Boelter (57) as the alleged murderer
## **A Final Note**
The No Kings protests are not just a political moment--they are a moral one. We are standing against tyranny, fascism, and the normalization of political violence.
What we're doing matters. And I'll keep documenting every story, every moment of resistance, every truth they want to suppress. But I need your support to keep building. Join us. Subscribe at [www.qasimrashid.com/subscribe](https://substack.com/redirect/55f9ec65-2f4a-4c2e-8058-7a5062d44a9e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I encourage you to continue to support independent voices that puts people over profit, justice over power, and democracy over kings.
**Let's Address This is made possible by you, the thoughtful person reading this. Join us and become a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..bXHFyuo_L1iC-Tl8kEaM8zneM6sHLWfK-OfXgMEsjk0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=165966705)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9880382d-267f-4e2b-bfea-38d1ba986614?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Holding this reminds me of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Words can’t do it justice... I’m eternally grateful.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e247039/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvRkRnc1lQbUVtUQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2MTQ/LbmNsd0VQdUFCTg/qP2hpZHM9bmNCNzZ1cVA3YzNHbGJscyZfbmxpZD1GeHBKSnFTQ1hmJl9uaGlkcz1uY0I3NnVxUDdjM0dsYmxz/gaE3_kQ/s8g3b4fee8f)

| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._kQ/s8h0ced190a)
---
Friend,
---
When the Radical Democrats arrested me and forced me into bankruptcy, even my most cherished personal possessions were almost stripped from me.
---
A watch I was gifted as America’s Mayor from our overseas allies after the tragedy of 9/11 was nearly gone – nearly taken as a form of “collections” last year:
---
**“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”** [SOURCE: _CNBC_]
---
_...But thanks to the support of friends and patriots like you, I’ve been able to defend myself, remain a free man, and retain my home and personal property._
---
**Now, when I put on that watch, I’m reminded of _YOU_ and your generosity – _truly_!**
---
The Deep State and the leftist media labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING.” They pushed me to the point of bankruptcy. And they stripped me of my law license.
---
_I was without resources and left with no means to defend myself._
---
**But that’s when patriots like YOU came rushing to my defense.**
---
It’s all because of your support that I was able to assemble the legal defense team needed to win and remain a free man thus far.
---
_But I’ll be honest with you, my fight is far from over._
---
**I have _ONE_ _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ yet to face... **
---
**If the Democrat Attorney General in Arizona gets her way, I’ll be in a jail cell until I’m 100 years old!**
---
And worst of all, these Deep State goons truly believe I’m finished, just like the media says, all because this case that’s already set to go to trial was brought on bogus _state-level_ charges that PREVENT President Trump from saving me with a federal pardon.
---
But, you see, even though the Democrats labeled me a “DEAD MAN WALKING,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and forced me into BANKRUPTCY, the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
**_...No one can ever tell me I’m not a fighter._**
---
Which is why, at 80 years old, I’m __still__ FIGHTING BACK.
---
When these leftist crooks first had me booked, they filed my mugshot under **booking # 2313757...**
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._kQ/s2mc92cf016)
__
---
_So, to show them that good, honest, and generous Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your continued support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._kQ/s3j299ec38d)
---

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily._kQ/sduc9d06a58)
__
---

Thank you and God bless you,

Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

subject: Volunteers needed!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250614-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2506-q2-jg?refcode=250614-email]
Peter,
Jena Griswold has never backed down from a fight to protect our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy. As Secretary of State, she stood up to Donald Trump and MAGA extremists—and now she’s running for Attorney General to keep Colorado safe, free, and fair for all of us.
But she can’t do it alone. This campaign is powered by people like you.
We’re building a grassroots movement to win this race, and we need volunteers to knock doors, make calls, and help us get the word out. Whether you’ve got a few hours a week or just one afternoon to spare, your time can make a real difference. Sign up using the link below, and we will reach out when opportunities become available.
Sign up to volunteer now! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/nLaGn7kiGEqBEIxGQjkLng2]Together, we can elect a fighter who will stand up for reproductive freedom, civil rights, working families, and the Colorado way of life.
Thanks for being part of the movement,
— Team Jena

| Here’s something I didn’t expect about being in Congress: the amount of attention that photos of me taking a rideshare to work would get. (I also love taking a scooter!) [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ad_5LBHUF6oZBQ8ISyVC3g~~/AAPPABA~/VzZisZFup9KRawIA3dF9kPEe_GgDudZtu5yRXpXPPdLdF-GbSQKjicaYdOEbZaIbxBeE4slQNvKWtAmq0J86Fd7zZ5cbd7pjxGxJJLn9qErA47YoOY0b7aK85KoeMlHu0D6o9LPdK1gX35m39wR6jmCVGLaPntStH8f3Xty864oNi2tyBcrnVQ3FW9m8PIzt-cHsfgJZEzsycZAXonwUqV7JMdwjhu9BN-raRpyYa0fWoDDiNLKfYiv9RKKrn1Wvs7Eeo8p1wXGaLON-1tXZ4qiV1AW2ibBoJZmR7lqNZ1NNhoTiL2AywJDxchS-E-cS9gLn23RFEcJWcVOJfC8DtO7IQpi1NVhxsCNH1veIKCw~) But I get it. This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently.
* **As a longtime organizer,** I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365.
* **As the only Gen Z member,** I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me.
* **As someone who grew up working class** and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to _uplift_ working class folks - not demonize them.

**And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars.** I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. **[**_But I know that with your help, I’ll stay here the same way I got here: one dollar at a time. So please, will you make a $27 donation today so I can keep fighting in Congress for _all_ of us - not just the few? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/ad_5LBHUF6oZBQ8ISyVC3g~~/AAPPABA~/VzZisZFup9KRawIA3dF9kPEe_GgDudZtu5yRXpXPPdLdF-GbSQKjicaYdOEbZaIbxBeE4slQNvKWtAmq0J86Fd7zZ5cbd7pjxGxJJLn9qErA47YoOY0b7aK85KoeMlHu0D6o9LPdK1gX35m39wR6jmCVGLaPntStH8f3Xty864oNi2tyBcrnVQ3FW9m8PIzt-cHsfgJZEzsycZAXonwUqV7JMdwjhu9BN-raRpyYa0fWoDDiNLKfYiv9RKKrn1Wvs7Eeo8p1wXGaLON-1tXZ4qiV1AW2ibBoJZmR7lqNZ1NNhoTiL2AywJDxchS-E-cS9gLn23RFEcJWcVOJfC8DtO7IQpi1NVhxsCNH1veIKCw~)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/wS0CgumNO42-2MvbrFFWHQ~~/AAPPABA~/Lp0huawXCPF9TrIFmkqoT8zox8zerHZwoNNXMOZV1BxldF2krf7VVhB2O22NyfyA6uy-YW38d74Dz_7jRGRaXM2G9RkcpAYq78AKvZeX24HEsKyp_ab-4pmD8qdiVq1jw-Tkl8Nbtj1v1uzEH_9HmQk3U8gZvTtLGKNmD5XNIohmwsBHI6ciP1woNU37ZWEz6ZeMRlCuyGzYGAPXDCFuepw2lctZ94o9LuCdpK013dGlJ7GDLXuzaJltge16scNQyOzXHy11mDcfRCF5Eohdv09cA9yV_hFUgQ_5SWcAlGauQ6W2dcG7VG13w1f9mtlCdnjnnVK1O_1eo4GmhJIDYX3_Z9p5e1tARX96RW0jY2lV24sFtrcTfIRQ13ldrAX5)

clean_body: | ~ | Here’s something I didn’t expect about being in Congress: the amount of attention that photos of me taking a rideshare to work would get. (I also love taking a scooter!) ~ But I get it. This isn’t the typical way members get to the Capitol. Actually, there’s a few things I do a bit differently. As a longtime organizer, I run a year-round organizing program that builds young, progressive power across Florida, 24/7/365. As the only Gen Z member, I personally know what it's like to be a part of the gun violence generation. Fighting to end gun violence IS personal to me. As someone who grew up working class and drove for Uber just to make ends meet while running for Congress, I know the policies we need to uplift working class folks - not demonize them. And on top of it all, I don’t take Corporate PAC or special interest dollars. I got here by relying on people like you. Together, we built a youth-powered, grassroots movement – one dollar at a time. Yet, a lot of people still think that because I do things a bit differently (or honestly, because I’m young and wasn’t born rich) that I don’t deserve to be here at all. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Grateful for your support, Rep. Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. In 2022, he made history to become the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress. Maxwell isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you join our historic movement today?** | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ ~~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .
